reviews.title: Made me break out :(
reviews.text: I'm very oily and acne prone. This formula feels good on the skin, but unfortunately it makes me break out and gave me a really weird texture on my forehead. It's still a good sunscreen, so I gave it 3 stars.

reviews.title: Facial sunscreen without the icky-ness
reviews.text: I don’t like to put sunscreen on my face because it’s either sticky, has a white cast, smells weird, breaks me out or just does not go well with my makeup. For the longest time my facial “sunscreen” was just to avoid the sun, stay in the shade. That is still my mantra, but occasionally when I know I’ll be in the sun I put on a good Asian sunscreen - because they tend to uncheck all the boxes of the things I mentioned above. That said, this is another sunscreen I am adding to my collection. It did not feel uncomfortable on my skin and did not leave any white cast or blotches. It absorbed pretty quickly and my skin didn’t feel tacky. Also, this is SPF 50! All in all, this is another Asian facial sunscreen that I am adding to my “loves” list.

reviews.title: Great for my oily skin!
reviews.text: I’m loving this sunscreen so far! It’s lightweight and leaves a nice matte/satin finish on my skin. It actually doesn’t make my skin oily nor leave a whitecast. The product feels like a lotion that glides on easy and absorbs well into my skin. There’s almost no scent to it, which is a plus. It contains pretty good ingredients to prevent water loss and keeps the skin hydrated and reduces the look of wrinkles! Definitely will be my go-to summer sunscreen!

reviews.title: Fancy but excellent
reviews.text:
Indeed, for a while we thought then name was slightly misspelled because the product is somewhat fancy. It's clearly a good quality sunscreen and experience has shown us that the odds for a Korean cosmetics product to be good are quite... good.
This sunscreen appears to be no exception. Texture is light and face feels good if used when spending a few hours at the pool or at the beach, and we tried both. And, yes, this is for face only, mostly because there's not much of it and it's not exactly cheap so enjoy it while it lasts.

reviews.title: My favorite sunscreen to use under makeup
reviews.text: I love this sunscreen for under my makeup. It’s all I use it for because once it absorbs into my skin, it gives a non greasy look. No white cast either. It takes about 10 mins for it to fully sink into my skin and I’m able to apply my makeup. I like that it is able to absorb into my skin even after I put on a serum and a day cream. It doesn’t cause me to break out but adds a layer of moisture to my skin.

reviews.title: Feels great on skin
reviews.text: Light weight, not greasy, did not break me out. Good product! Will buy again.

reviews.title: Nice sunscreen.🕶
reviews.text: Nice lightweight sunscreen.  This is perfect for wearing under makeup and does not feel thick or oily.  It does leave behind a slightly dewy appearance and is not matte.  No white cast as seen with thicker formulas.  This feels very moisturizing without feeling heavy.  Blends very well into the skin and has a very mild scent.  Bottle is easy to use and to dispense product.  Great sunscreen

reviews.title: Great Sunscreen
reviews.text: This is my new go-to sunscreen. It is lightweight and oil-free. I was worried that it would clogged my pores but doesn’t. Works well under makeup.

reviews.title: Feels like nothing is on my skin
reviews.text: I love this sunscreen, it quickly absorbs fully leaving NO gross residue behind! I'm super picky about sunscreen and hate the feel of anything on my skin, lotions, sunscreen, none of it! This is stuff feels like there is nothing on my skin!

reviews.title: Great for everyday
reviews.text: I live in sunny South Florida, so it's important that I do my best to try and protect my skin from the sun even with casual exposure. This is a very expensive and small quantity of sunscreen, but I think if you look at it for particular application it might be worth it. I used it entirely for a face sunscreen. It does extremely well to saturate into the skin and I didn't find it gave me a white cast at all, which is what I really appreciate about it. It can do very well as an everyday wearing type sunscreen that will give you protection from the sun, while at the same time moisturizing your skin. As a matter of fact, I found as a moisturizer it worked very well. I appreciate very much the sun protection SPF 50 that it has, because the sun where I live can certainly get very strong. I usually dislike sunscreens, because of the oily nature of them, but I found this one to be well balanced, and didn't leave me feeling greasy at all. I also found that it had a bit of a matte finish to it, so you didn't notice any sort of shining, especially for someone like me who tends to have an oilier t zone. In combination with that, I actually get dry areas on my chin, and this did very nicely to moisturize my dry areas while not causing any sort of exacerbation of oilier areas. All in all it's probably one of the best, if not the best sunscreen that I have ever used for my face. For everyday wear, and protection, I would certainly reach for this sunscreen without a doubt. I do recommend it.

reviews.title: Spreads easily and softens skin
reviews.text:
I got this for my sons face because his cheeks have been getting extra dry and the other sunscreen was not helping. It is very moisturizing and the skin felt silky smooth after just one application. It gives off sun protection for a while but i would definitely keep applying it throughout the day to keep it at SPF50.
Im glad it doesnt have the popular bad chemical sunscreen ingredients but it does list a lot of chemical ingredients ive never heard of. I hope these are not harmful. i will have to do more research another time

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Amazing sunscreen! After all the Korean sunscreen scandals, I went back to physical sunscreen and it broke out my skin so bad. So, after a long research, I found this product and I love it. It has the same UV filter as Krave Beauty, which is a brand I love. But, this one has better oily acne prone skin-friendly ingredients.

reviews.title: Excellent, party on brothers and sisters.
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:7cfc995b010d23bc7176b91f843fecfa]] Hotep and party on brothers and sisters and thank you for looking at my review of the HMPRT 80s 90s Costume, A Black Mullet Rocker Wig and Wig Cap, Black T-Shirt, Wayne’s World Baseball Cap, and Inflatable Guitar. What I like about this set it's a spoof of Wayne's World and it comes with a Wayne's World cap, a wig, T shirt and an inflatable guitar. The inflatable guitar gives a whole new meaning to the term air guitar. With this you can play Bohemian Rhapsody! “NOT” Long live, Queen.
“Wayne's World" was originally a recurring sketch from the NBC television series Saturday Night Live. It evolved from a segment titled "Wayne's Power Minute" (1987) on the CBC Television series It's Only Rock & Roll, as the main character first appeared in that show. A prototype of the Wayne character had appeared several years prior on CITY-TV in Toronto's overnight show City Limits. The Saturday Night Live sketch spawned a hit 1992 film, its 1993 sequel, and several catchphrases which have since entered the pop-culture lexicon. The sketch centered on a local public-access television program in Aurora, Illinois, hosted by Wayne Campbell (Mike Myers, the same actor from "Wayne's Power Minute"), an enthusiastic and sardonic long-haired metalhead, and his timid and sometimes high-strung, yet equally metal-loving sidekick and best friend, Garth Algar (Dana Carvey). Wayne lives with his parents and broadcasts his show "live" from the basement of their house every Friday evening at 10:30. The first "Wayne's World" sketch appeared in the 13th Saturday Night Live episode of the 1988/1989 season. The only thing I didn't like about the Cap is that it clearly looks like a woven Cap on the ad, but the Cap that I was sent is definitely a screen print which I guess is, OK? ” NOT”. I recommend my friend. Party on brothers and sisters and thank you for looking at my review. I hope it is helpful for you. If so, you can check the helpful box below, it will help me review some More. God bless you. May the rest of your life be the best of your life. O DEE thank you

reviews.text: This costume is great!

reviews.title: Epic set get it
reviews.text: Loved it.  Got it for a waynes world costume.  I am a female. Long hair so the wig cap came in handy.  Hat needed some shaping.. its a soft hat not hard hat but that and the t.. perfect! Tshirt quality is like a 5-10 target t so its nice it came with it. Id buy it again!  We won 2nd place in the competition. Just needed to add your own jeans

reviews.title: Party On People!
reviews.text:
What you get - A basically ready to go (just add jeans) Wayne's World Look including Waynes World Hat, Mullet Wig (with wig cap) inflatable guitar, and plain black T-Shirt.

Pros - While noone even from a distance is going to think you suddenly became Wayne from Wayne's World - this is a fun costume and brings back a lot of fun memories.

Cons - The wig is particularly cheap - but it goes under a cap so not a disaster.

Overall - for the price you would be hard pressed to get all the pieces separately so for me that counts as a win.

reviews.title: party on! excelente!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:3374f8248a4d50ea0b36f2f53972ccc1]] the guitar is a small, plastic blow up, but the wig, shirt and hat are good quality. the wig hair is a bit wild and will need some brushing or even a cut to really make it look like wayne’s (i think it’s longer than wayne’s hair). it’s a good value for an easy halloween costume. could also be used to dress up as a rock and roll guitarist just by switching out the hat.

reviews.title: Shyeah, Right! Simple but effective costume
reviews.text: This Wayne’s world costume arrived quickly and looks exactly as shown in the product images. This costume can be considered unisex and really is perfect for anyone who doesn’t like putting a crazy amount of effort into their Halloween look. Includes (1) wig cap, wig, inflatable guitar, black Wayne’s World Hat, and a single plain black tee. Everything seems to be of nice quality - the wig does tangle if not carefully handled. The guitar inflated just fine and would be easy to carry throughout the night or even to a party. Overall it’s exactly what it claims to be and I’ve been happy with it thus far. As far as the current set value of $35.99 - I do feel it would be more fairly set at $30 given the quality and quantity of items.

reviews.title: Just what I expected!
reviews.text:
No disappointment here. Everything is high-Halloween-costume-quality. The logo on the hat does have some pixelattion on the edges, but unless you are doing an EXTREME CLOSEUP, it's not too noticeable.
The shirt is a very very stretchy material, and the guitar is a good size when inflated.
The wig looks hilariously accurate, too.

reviews.title: Shuh!
reviews.text:
This Wayne's World costume set is pretty good for the value, but let's be honest. You really only need the hat and possibly the wig to complete this look. It comes with an inflatable guitar that is surprisingly cool, but I don't see it lasting the night if you start jamming out to some Queen. It also comes with a wig cap and a black t-shirt, but you can probably purchase those separately. The shirt is well made and the cap has a Velcro closure on the back. The Wayne's World logo is screen printed on the front of the cap.

It's not a bad costume at all, but it seems a bit extraneous, right?

reviews.title: Party on Wayne — Party on Garth
reviews.text:
OK, I’ll admit it… I’m a child of the 70s, and Wayne’s World came out right as I was coming of age. I loved the movie at the time, and its one of those iconic memories that people my age will identify with. Therefore, I just landed an AWESOME idea for a Halloween costume with this set.

This has all the key components to transmit yourself back in time and take on the persona of Wayne. I love it! The set looks really awesome, with the hat, the shirt, the hair, even a blow up guitar!! Just get yourself some ratty jeans, and you’ve nailed it.

Its months away from Halloween, but I can’t wait to bring some laughs to my friends when it gets here.

reviews.title: Sweet deal! Good quality
reviews.text: Impressed by everything in this costume set.  The black tee is thick cotton material and a real shirt.  Fully finished off as is the hat. I wear hats frequently and this Wayne's world one has made it into my regular daily wear caps.  The blow up guitar,  literally air guitar, is still blown up in my kids room.  Couldn't buy all these pieces separately for the price.  Would recommend.  Super happy with everything

reviews.title: Well made... some of it.
reviews.text: The hat and shirt in this set are stellar. They are well made and in great materials. The wig is...questionable. absolutely costume quality, but it will do in a pinch. Great for costume parties.

reviews.title: Re-live the 80's!
reviews.text:
If you want a quick and easy costume...here it is. This kit comes with just about everything you need to transform yourself into Wayne. This kit comes with the following:

Hat: The Wayne's World signature hat is black with white lettering. Features a velcro adjustment in the back. It fits my 7 1/2 head great. With the wig cap and wig on I have to adjust it out more - which might not work if you have a larger head or a thick head of hair. The hat is good (not great) quality. I would even wear it out in public without the wig.

Wig Cap: This is made of stretchy nylon - like a stocking - and you get two in the package.

Wig: The wig comes in a hair net, and is made with synthetic materials. The wig fits easily on top of the wig cap. You do have to work a little bit with the hair to get it to lay the right way, but it's not too hard.

Vest: Surprisingly this came with a vest, not a T-shirt. The picture shows this kit is supposed to come with a black T-shirt, so there may have been a mistake. The vest is decent quality though. It's a lined, 5-button up vest with adjustment straps in the back. Fortunately I do have a black T-shirt, which is more comfortable and true to the movie.

Guitar: This is a single chamber plastic blow up guitar. Fun shaped, light weight and easy to carry around.

Overall, this is a quick and easy costume. Easily recognizable by anyone born before 1990. I had to take off a star because I got a vest instead of the T-shirt.

reviews.title: This costume was a hit
reviews.text: Comes w every thing you need at a reasonable price.

reviews.title: Does The Job; Could Be Cheaper
reviews.text: While this is a decent costume, it doesn't take much creativity to put it together and comes at a somewhat high price tag. It's $35 at the time of review, which comes with the shirt, wig, wig cap, guitar, and hat. None of it is overly amazing. The hat is pretty cheap while the others are as expected. The shirt is probably the best. Turns out, it's a little more than cotton. It's nice and stretchy. It does fit true to size unlike most tee shirts these days. The mullet looks decent, although you don't need a wig cap for it. It stays on just fine without it. It will make an easy, but somewhat cheap costume if you are in a bind. That said, it does the job.

reviews.title: Funny costume, brings me back to my youth.
reviews.text: I grew up watching Waynes World so I think it will be hilarious to wear for Halloween this year. This comes with everything you need, just throw on some jeans. The wig is really shiny but I think it adds to how hilarious this is. It has a snug comfortable fit. I have a rather large head and was worried, but it fits perfectly. I cant wait to wear the hat. Best part about this costume is that half of it can be used for daily wear.

reviews.title: Not My First Choice For A Wayne Campbell Costume
reviews.text: The pictures show a more accurate hat with stitched lettering and the globe infilled in white. The hat here is screenprinted on and it looks cheap. For over $10 less or even more you can find a more authentic looking stitched hat. The shirt is just a standard black tee, nothing you probably don't already have in your closet. The wig is a frizzy mess, couldn't wear it for more than 5 minutes before the itchiness overcame me. The guitar is just under 3 feet long which would have made it perfect for prop use, not too obnoxiously big but not too small. What ruins it is the big "ROCK N ROLL" and the big black comic style "BANG!" clip art looking graphics on it. The product pictures show a blank white guitar. Overall for the asking price you're better off getting a higher quality hat for less that you can continue wearing post-costume party and find a better prop guitar. Do not recommend.

reviews.title: Wayne’s World!
reviews.text: Party time! Excellent!

reviews.title: Messy
reviews.text:
This scrub smells wonderful, just like ground coffee. It also does a good job of scrubbing my skin.

However, it is just super messy. It is not a cream consistency like most scrubs, it is very loose like plain coffee grounds would be.

reviews.title: Using In Soap Making: Robusta & Dead Sea Salt - Cinnamon, Ginger
reviews.text:
I initially tried this as a body scrub. I find it is too dry & too much got wasted to be effective.

I make my own cold process milk soaps & thought I'd give this a try that way. I make up my batch & mix some of this into part of the batter to do a layered swirl mix as to not over power the soap & make it too gritty. The bars look great & smell great, plus there is the natural exfoliation which is wonderful for the hands as well as the body.

I personally love this as a kitchen hand soap because it really helps to remove cooking smells from the skin. Plus, the granules make for a wonderful, although brief hand massage.

No toxic fragrances or perfumes, just natural safe ingredients.

Overall, I am more than pleased.

reviews.title: Super soft skin, but oh so messy to use!!
reviews.text: This coffee scrub smells divine while dry, and leaves my skin smelling ever so subtly like coffee and cinnamon.  Oddly, I don’t really notice the smell in the shower.  I love the exfoliation and use it on my entire body.  Out of the shower, I feel a mild oil barrier on my skin that I don’t care for.  Once I add my normal body shaping cream (Clarins Body Fit), I’m in heaven!  The 2 products together leave my skin super cool and tingly for about an hour, followed by crazy soft skin.  I don’t actually have a lot of cellulite (thank you Clarins!), but what I do have is less noticeable after just 2 uses.  So, what’s not to like?  This scrub is so incredibly messy, it’s borderline impractical!  Most scrubs are made with sugar or salt crystals held together with some form of oil or gel, and dissolve in the shower.  Ground coffee doesn’t dissolve and this scrub is dry, so it literally gets everywhere...like sand from the beach!  And worse, I have a walk in shower with white tile floors...coffee stains if it sits too long!  As much as I like the way this product smells and improves my skin texture, it’s a pain in my cellulite free backside to clean up!  Mixing it with a little water and creating a paste before use helps a little, and thankfully I have a handheld shower to quickly rinse it off my tiled walls and shower door, but I’m constantly concerned it’s going to stain my floor grout.  Deep sigh...I soooooo wish this product weren’t so messy!

reviews.title: Really Nice
reviews.text:
I got this for my wife and after the first use she absolutely loved it. She's tried a lot of scrubs and I've rarely seen her this excited over one.

Unlike other scrubs, this one is not very harsh. It's actually meant for you to rub in for a few minutes (you'd never be able to do that with the harsher ones). So just keep in mind, it works a bit different than other exfoliating scrubs. The results have been relatively quick as far as softness and health of skin.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: I like this coffee scrub! The ingredients are simple, yet powerful. It smells like a good, spiced coffee dessert with the cinnamon and ginger. As with any coffee scrub, you have to use this consistently to see any kind of results. I find that this improves my skin softness and shaving is a dream after I use this scrub. Overall a great scrub!

reviews.title: It is a coffee scrub for sure!!!
reviews.text: I love the smell of this body scrub.The combination of those ingredients are amazing:ginger,coffee,sea salt and cardamom,this blend is perfect,what can be better?I’m very satisfied that all the ingredients are natural and it is a paraben free product.The scrub in general does it work great,I can’t say anything right know about cellulite but it burns(a little bit,as it should) and I’m very excited to see the results in couple of weeks.Also the smell is very good,for coffee lovers this will be a pleasure to apply this scrub.

reviews.title: Smells amazing!!
reviews.text: This stuff smells soooooo good! It's a really energizing and interesting smell. I love it! It's a fun and different product that my husband and I both really love using to scrub up with. It removes dead skin easily and like I mentioned it smells heavenly!! I would definitely use more of this!

reviews.title: Love and Hate this Scrub
reviews.text:
I have a bit of a love/hate relationship with this scrub. What I LOVE about it is the delicious, robust coffee scent. It is STRONG and packs a powerful punch in the morning, which helps to wake me up. I also love the serious grit it has to it. The texture varies from fine grounds to courser grounds, with a higher ratio of course grounds. Each scrub feels like it's getting deep into my skin. I feel like I'm scrubbing off layers of dead skin, dirt, grime, etc. when I'm using this. My skin feels smoother and softer after I use this scrub. I apply lotion straight out of the shower and my body is soft as a cloud!

What I sort of hate about this product is how messy it is. It just falls apart and gets everywhere. I included photos of what a hot mess my sink and shower look like after using it. Other scrubs I've used in the past have some agent that keeps them together to prevent it from going everywhere, but this doesn't. One I tried recently that I loved was JOON X MOON (https://www.amazon.com/Watermelon-Exfoliating-Moisturizing-Nourish-Essential/dp/B0876GX6MQ/ref=sr_1_2?dchild=1&keywords=moon+cube+body+scrub&qid=1600826357&sr=8-2), and that is in cube form to start, then breaks down to scrub as you rub it and use water. It does an incredible job of exfoliating without making a mess of my small shower. If you're not into the cube thing, I also like stuff that B&BW makes and they sell it on Amazon. It's has a paste-like consistency and does a good job at making your skin feel soft like a baby! Here is a Bath & Body Works aromatherapy scrub - I loooove this one: https://www.amazon.com/Bath-Body-Works-AROMATHERAPY-Eucalyptus/dp/B005LZUP36/ref=sr_1_14?dchild=1&keywords=sugar+scrub&qid=1600826921&sr=8-14

The other thing I wasn't a huge fan of was the packaging. I have a tiny shower, so it is impossible to take anything in there without getting wet. Every time I take this into the shower, I'm nervous the bag will get soaked and ruin it. There is a waxy coat applied to the bag, which helps protect it, but it still doesn't give me as much confidence as something like a glass jar or tin would. Ideally, the scrub wouldn't get soaked until I'm ready to use it. It has held up through 3 uses so far but I may transfer it into a mason jar and store it that way.

The other thing that really bummed me out was that is stained my clothes!!! I towel dried after shower, put on moisturizer, then light gray leggings. There must have been a tiny amount of residule coffee scrub because it stained my leggings!!

Overall, a decent scrub to try. Not my favorite scrub, since it stained my clothes and made my shower a mess.

reviews.title: packaging could be better
reviews.text: love this leaves my skin so soft its amazing

reviews.title: Coffee Scrub
reviews.text: I didn't notice a distinct fragrance from this scrub.  It does faintly smell of coffee but I had hoped there would be more of a spicy smell.  But, this is a nice feeling scrub against your skin.  It does make your skin feel energized.  I'm not sure how long it would take to make my cellulite become less visible but I will keep using it for the mere purpose that it does feel good.  I would say too that it would make a good gift because it's so unique.  I do recommend this product and for the price it's a good value for either a gift or keeping it for yourself as a treat.  Enjoy!

reviews.title: exfoliates perfectly
reviews.text:
This thing leaves a great coffee aroma everywhere and make you wanna drink even more coffee
exfoliates just right and it does not sting as much as other products. The granules are the perfect size to give you that baby smooth skin afterwards without it feeling like sandpaper.

Definitely a good product to pamper your skin with, just make sure to have lotion on hand as it will dry it out.

reviews.title: Good, but there is better out there
reviews.text:
First of all, this stuff smells amazing! like a fresh pot of coffee!

Second, however, it's not much more than coffee grounds... I could pretty much duplicate this scrub from stuff in my kitchen for a lot less money. It's coffee grounds, olive oil, salt and sugar, basically. There are a few other little active oils which I happen to also have around as I make my own soap, so the vitamin E oil, ect, is already in my cupboard as well.

The big question though... is it WORTH duplicating (or purchasing again)?
The answer for me is, unfortunately, no. It doesn't do much for my skin besides leave it feeling exfoliated, which any scrub can do. As other reviewers have said, the packaging is not shower friendly and it's a loose scrub. So I had to mix this with some coconut oil and clean out an old empty jar to store it in the shower. It's a lot of effort for a mediocre product.

It does what it says but there are better options out there.

reviews.title: Smells great and left my skin feeling smooth!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:fbddc96f02162830083b4902b2c46e3d]] This scrub smells like coffee, my whole bathroom smelled like a coffee shop which didn't bother me at all. The scrub has an interesting texture...it's almost like a powder. My skin felt super smooth after exfoliating, so it does the job. It does get a little messy I have to say.  When I would grab some with my hands some of it spilled on the tub but it's easy to rinse off and didn't stain my bathtub. I love it...it's just a little messy.

reviews.title: Great for scrubbing off the dead skin
reviews.text: This is an awesome body scrub.  I love that is is made with coffee, the smell is so good and it just gives me energy and focus just smelling it in the shower.  I love how this really helps to polish the skin, I feel that my skin is much smoother after using.  I like that it has some natural oils in it so I feel like it does not overdry

reviews.title: Messy
reviews.text:
This scrub smells wonderful, just like ground coffee. It also does a good job of scrubbing my skin.

However, it is just super messy. It is not a cream consistency like most scrubs, it is very loose like plain coffee grounds would be.

reviews.title: Love!
reviews.text: This scrub is fantastic! Love the way it makes my skin feel after using it. Definitely recommend!

reviews.title: Great for minimalists
reviews.text: This is great for minimalists or teenagers. Keeps your essentials organized. you can keep makeup brushes and a few cosmetics in it. It also keeps jewelry, hair ties and other small items organized and easy to find. The mirror is removable as well. Very nice size, and can easily be wiped clean when needed. made of a thick plastic, and the holder slots are silicone. The mirror is a glass mirror. Overall, highly recommended.

reviews.title: Holds lots of make up and doesn't take up much space
reviews.text:
I got this to help organize make up on top of our dressers and it does a fine job of that.

Quality: The organizer is made of plastic with rubber on top and the mirror comes apart from the set and then is used to clover the middle sections. The mirror is not on a hinge and only just slides into a slot when you want to use it, I would have liked for it to attach more securely or to be on a hinge instead.

How does it work? It allows you to push lipsticks and other cosmetics into rubber X shaped holes that hold the make up in place standing up. On the other side you can lay make up across divided rubber slots and in the middle there are bigger sections to hold a compact or other make up. It works well, the mirror comes off the organizer and slides into a slot to stand up and be used.

Overall, this is a compact and nice organizer for the top of any dresser or table. The only con is the mirror could have been built in a better way to attach it to the organizer more securely.

reviews.title: Nice Little Open Storage- Not What I Would Choose For Traveling
reviews.text:
This CONBOLA Make Up Organizer is pretty handy for organizing small makeup items. I ordered the white and grey, and it looks quite nice. I would say it looks just like the pictures.

The grey is a sturdy and durable plastic. The white inserts are a nice, thick, and flexible silicone. It will separate into 7 different pieces which is convenient and also makes everything easy to clean. You can use it all together or individual pieces separately.

The mirror is fine and you insert into place and remove by pulling back out. I do think they missed an opportunity to have this on a detachable hinge or something.

I think my favorite part of this product is the silicone insert that you can insert various makeup pencils, brushes, etc in standing up. Most of my brushes don’t fit as well into the bigger sized slots, but it still works.

This is cute overall, but I think the biggest improvement that could be made to this other than a hinged mirror would be to make this deeper. As you can see in my picture, there is a standard sized setting powder sitting in the main compartment. It fits there, but not if you wanted to put the mirror/lid down to cover it.

Basically this is a cute open storage. Most off the products I have pictured would not fit in this for any type of closed storage. I think the company could make this design into and awesome display/storage case that fully closes with a handle for traveling or something- but it would have to be much deeper.

I don’t think this is something I would want to take traveling, because I would have to take everything out and put in a bag or something before also packing this up and that defeats the purpose of it for traveling in my opinion. Some people may like to have this to display and openly store all their items when traveling though, but it just wouldn’t be my first choice since you can’t pack everything inside it when it is time to go.

Anyway, this is still a nice little product if you think the size and function will suit your needs. I hope my review was helpful in some way, and if so, I would love to know- thanks!

reviews.title: great
reviews.text: my daughter loved this product. liked the fact is is light weight and easy to fold up and put in a case for travel

reviews.title: No es grande pero es super práctico para llevar en mis viajes
reviews.text: Este organizador es pequeño pero es muy fácil de llevar a mis viajes. Me gusta tener todo organizado y con este todo se ve bonito y organizado. No es grande en tamaño pero sirve para tener lo esencial. Me gusta mucho que tiene espejo y eso me hace todo más fácil. No es pesado y no ocupa espacio en mi maleta.

reviews.title: Came smudged with prints
reviews.text: The mirror came with fingerprints and smudges on it. Looked as though it had been shoved into the box. Theres no directions or suggestions for setup in the box. Things were easy to remove and move around to customize. I just wish I hadn't have had to sit and scrub the mirror to get the prints off. They've obviously been there for a while. It prompted me to also sanitized every piece a little extra just in case.

reviews.title: Great for small spaces and someone new to make up.
reviews.text: I bought this for my granddaughter who is just staring to wear light make up.  The size was perfect for her space.  She had more than enough space for her make up.  As an organizer for someone just getting started it was great.  My granddaughter loved it.

reviews.title: It’s Okay, But Not For Me...
reviews.text:
This is okay but there’s a few issues I have with it....

First, the mirror came with a little chunk in the corner gone. It’s not a big deal because it’s so small, but it would be nice if the mirror would have come better protected so that it wasn’t missing a piece no matter how small.

Second, this doesn’t really hold much unless you want it to be all separate parts. If you have it all put together with the side trays sitting on each side of the big oval tray, the silicone pieces over top the side trays, and the square tray sitting in the middle of the big oval tray - Then you can’t hold much with it. The side trays with the silicone pieces only hold so much. The one with the lines you can lay brushes in the grooves like shown in the photos on the product page. But, there’s only 4 grooves where brushes can actually lay, and more than 1 or sometimes 2 brushes is all that fits in each groove. The other silicone tray has the X’s that you can put things in so they stand straight up. There’s 11 small ones and 8 big ones. The big ones you could potentially fit more than 1 item in. Also, the middle tray part that the mirror goes over as a lid, if you’re going to do that, then you can only have items in that tray that the mirror will be able to lay flat over, so that limits how much and what you can place in it. If you have it all put together, then it doesn’t take up much room. But, if you have it all in separate parts (like the first photo on the product page), then it takes up a lot of room for not holding too much. I might as well keep using my cups or brush holders for my brushes, which hold a ton of brushes, and plastic or acrylic drawer organizers.

Third, I don’t like how the mirror just sits, it isn’t actually attached. It comes off so easy. One little bump and the mirror falls over. It would be nice if they would have that attached somehow so that it would fold down over the tray but still be connected.

Finally, it’s supposed to be easy to wash and dry. To me, the silicone pieces are not easy to clean. The dust collects on them like crazy. And I try to just wipe off the dust with a dry cloth but the silicone is rubbery and the dust just kind of sticks to it. If you use a wet cloth you’re able to get the dust, but you have to work really hard to get it off. I just don’t like it.

Overall, this just doesn’t work for me. I wanted it to organize things while taking up less space. But, when it is taking up less space, it doesn’t hold enough for me. If you’re looking just to hold a few small things. Like you have some small items that you just want to have a place, then this might work for you. As long as you don’t mind that the mirror isn’t attached and might come off easy.

reviews.title: For traveling or at home.
reviews.text: This makeup organizer has a spot for everything.  You can easily lay the mirror flat and put it in your suitcase.  The mirror acts as a cover to hold your makeup in the compartments.  You can take it all out and use it on your counter at home.  The whole thing is about 14 1/4" long and 1" deep.  It has foam inserts for your makeup brushes and eyeliners, lipstick or concealer tubes and a wavy type insert for laying your brushes flat as you use them.  The mirror has slots to make it stand up or you can hold it in your hand to use.  It's 6 1/4" x 7".  It is not magnifying.  The bottom has tiny foam pads to keep it from moving around.  It can easily be cleaned with soap and water.

reviews.title: All you need
reviews.text: This make up organizer is perfect for traveling or if you do not have much space for a bigger mirror. It is small enough to carry around and makes applying makeup very easy. I love how it has silicone like holders for your lipsticks or eyeliners and brushes as well as jewelry. This is definitely something worth investing in. I got this so I can take it on the go to retouch my makeup or do it if I need to have it done last min. It is something you can easily store inside your car or office/ work area. I most definitely recommend this to make applying makeup on the go easier.

reviews.title: I really wanted to like this
reviews.text:
When I receivedd this, the mirror portion will not stand up nor does it sit in closed easily.

I don't know if this is a design flaw, packaging, and slipping flaw

reviews.title: CONBOLA Make Up Organizer
reviews.text: Loving this makeup organizer so much! I usually have an over flow of makeup and brushes even though I try to purge from time to time the items that I do not use. This makes it so much easier to see what make up I am currently using. Love the little compartments and the attached mirror! I might also end up using this for jewelry as well since I think I don't like the clutter of jewelry I have going on right now. I like that this is also somewhat portable because I can move this room to room without spillage. Overall, a really great way to organize your jewelry or makeup items!

reviews.title: Liked it
reviews.text: Good purchasw

reviews.title: Good gift
reviews.text: Just like the photos. I would recommend to others

reviews.title: Travel aid but more compact
reviews.text:
I found this to be useful when I was traveling. It's easy to fold down and simple to use. The brush holders did not work for me but I was able to use the other side.

I think it should be made a little bit smaller

reviews.title: It is small and it is a little tacky
reviews.text: Its pretty basic but it packs up neat. Overall, I wouldn't use it with any other part or set but its a sleek, simple, and small.

reviews.title: great item, totally worth the price, no smell
reviews.text:
After reading some of the reviews on this item, I was wary of buying this item, but I'm glad I took a chance because the item really does live up to its promise to help organize your purse. The item is made of durable, quality material, and I can see it holding up for years to come. The price compared to other purse organizers is much more economical and I like that it has a bottom-it makes switching purses much faster than if I had to fish out the organizer and then move my loose items.

A concern listed in a couple of the other reviews is that the organizers smell-I did not encounter that at all, and I'm very sensitive to smells. The smaller organizer fits into my standard size purses and really does help keep me organized. I wish some of the pockets were of a different size, but overall the organizer fits my needs and I'm very, very glad I took a chance on this item.

I bought it through Amazon instead of the TV offer so I didn't have to worry about sneaky S&H charges etc, and as a minimalist, I only need one set, not two, and I certainly didn't need their "special bonus gift".

reviews.title: Not too practical
reviews.text: I found the Kangaroo Keeper locally, so didn't have to pay the exorbitant shipping they want online.  Nice idea but it falls flat.  Or rather it falls in a bunch unless you keep it stuffed with tall items.  I knew about this flaw from reading reviews so I bought it with the intention of reinforcing with coat hanger wire.  Now mine has a frame to hold it UP (the way it LOOKS in the pictures!) and a frame around the top to keep it open.  It took me a good hour to do this upgrade, but now I can use purses that I was about to throw away because they're too deep (and dark) to find things.  I say, don't bother with this item.  It looks like there are better designed ones out there.

reviews.title: Odor Terrible / # of Pockets Great
reviews.text: What a shame it has such a strong odor as many other reviewers have said as well.  Its overall design, size (I have the large) is great and functional, but I am going to have to take the loss and buy another all due to its odor whichcan't be healthy for us to be smelling!

reviews.title: poor product!
reviews.text: Was excited to see this on sale at a local store. I was happy and excited but was quickly disappointed. Product "large" holder is so small it is funny. Also none of my items (cell phone, check book, etc) fit into the pockets inside the carrier. Hence, product does not live up to advertisement. Don't buy it!

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: We ordered two of these for our trip to Alaska this fall and they were better then we expected.  They kept items organized in our backpacks they we kept with through the whole trip.  I used mine to keep track of my medications that I need to take everday.

reviews.title: Great idea.  Smelly Product.
reviews.text: i like the idea of this product.  I would like it to be a bit wider.  The draw strings are hard to pull.  The worst part is that it smells terrible!  I'm returning it.

reviews.title: Useless.. dangerous strings..needless strings..not even straps
reviews.text: A total waste of money...way to flimsy and cheaply made😠 very unimpressed! And why does it have 14 inch strings on each side on each bag??? Won't even give this away..garbage!

reviews.title: Keeper Keeps it All
reviews.text:
I bought this for my wife for Christmas to swap out with her MANY handbags.
PROS: Easy to organize all the little things.
CONS: Not good for even a medium deep purse as the edges keep falling in. You can get Velcro to hold in place, but kind of defeats the ease of use benefit.

reviews.title: fantastic buy!!!!! smell???? No way!
reviews.text:
Just got mine..I ordered a black and tan set. there was no toxic smell? I don't know where the reviews are from?? Possibly a competitor.. they are great organizers...I've had these before and I reluctantly Gave them away to my daughter in laws
this time I'm keeping them for myself!! I bought my first set about 12 years ago and they lasted so long.. they are still in great shape.. they came with a drawstring and no mini lights... These have no drawstrings... but have the light.. but them, you won't regret it..

reviews.title: Has a strong odor of dry-cleaning fluid that won't go away
reviews.text:
I was using several smaller cosmetic-type zipper bags to move my things from purse to purse, so when I saw this product, it looked as though it would do the job a little more easily. I don't know if I'll ever be able to find that out, however, because the inserts have such a strong chemical odor that I do not want to put them into any of my purses. I've tried spraying them with Febreeze and setting them outside to air out, and I have also sent them through a machine wash with extra detergent, but the odor persists.

Perhaps over time, the smell will finally dissipate, but until then, I can't review the performance of the product. It's too bad, because the insert looks as though it would be quite useful... if only it didn't smell like a vat of dry-cleaning fluid.

reviews.title: Can't get past the odor!
reviews.text: I purchased the Kangaroo Keeper at Walmart.  I haven't tried to use it yet, because after two weeks of airing out, and febreezing, the chemical odor is still so strong, I won't put one in my purse.  I thought perhaps Walmart got the "rejects" to sell, but after reading the other comments, I'm just grateful I can return mine, and not lose money on shipping charges.  My recommendation is to purchase locally, and check the odor before buying.  Personally, I will look for a different product.

reviews.title: Poor design and terrible odor
reviews.text: The previous reviewer is right, there is a vinyl-like smell that is very strong. I have not had this item long enough to see if the odor goes away over time, but I will not keep the Kangaroo Keepers for a different reason. There are two different size organizers that I thought would be ideal for my purses. I have tried both sizes and found that the pockets that are built in to each bag are not the right sizes for most things that I have. A few things fit fine, but most items just don't fit. Nice idea, but not well executed.

reviews.title: Great product!
reviews.text:
I love this product! Mine is well made and came with no unpleasant odor.
Pays to see some things for yourself. I change handbags often and this has added some order to my life.

reviews.title: Too Flimsy
reviews.text:
I bought the Kangaroo Organizer and have used it for a month. It made out of very flimsy nylon not substantial enough to hold its shape. The inside pockets are random sizes and placements that make no sense.

this was a waste of my $$$

reviews.title: Great idea.  Smelly Product.
reviews.text: i like the idea of this product.  I would like it to be a bit wider.  The draw strings are hard to pull.  The worst part is that it smells terrible!  I'm returning it.

reviews.title: Great Organizer
reviews.text: I bought this organizer for my wife. She carries more things in her purse then a soldier preparing for overseas duty. The last time she cleaned it out she found things that had been missing for years. This organizer works great.

reviews.title: Don't bother to order this
reviews.text: The "organizer" is very flimsy and does not stand up in your purse to help organize.  It's a joke....  I gave my to Goodwill.....probably should have just thrown them in the trash

reviews.title: This product was too small to be of any use
reviews.text:
I bought this product at a local store that has an "As Seen on TV" section. It's always a trial and error with those products but I figured there was no way this could go wrong and I really, really need something to help organize my bags. I'm a "tote" girl rather than a purse girl but with tote's there's barely any pockets and everything is just loose on the bottom. I saw this and since it had a large and small size I thought it would be great. I got home took everything out of my bag and started trying to fit things into the pockets. Sure it can hold up to 70 items but they've got to be small so my checkbook didn't fit, I always carry a little spiral notebook (the little ones that are about the width of a checkbook or smaller), that didn't fit. Sure there were places for all my pens but that was about all I could fit in the pockets. Some of them even had elastic tops, totally misleading. I tried stretching to fit things in but you can stretch the top all you want, it's the rest of the pocket that actually matters. I'm going to be returning this as soon as possible.

Luckily, I didn't notice an odor otherwise I'd be a lot more upset. As it is, I'm out $10 bucks and 15 minutes of deciding whether to try it or not.

[[ASIN:B003XF8RWC KANGAROO KEEPER (Tan)]]

reviews.title: Good, but could be better
reviews.text:
I received the tan and black keepers. The tan is SOO much better because it allows you to see your items better. I don't like that it cannot stand on its own but you have to find the perfect bag to fit this. I use a large eyeglasses case in the large compartment to give it stability.

So far for the LARGE size it's the perfect fit for my Juicy Couture Daydreamer Tote.
The small versions are pretty useless so far. I don't have any bags that fit that size the way I'd like.
There are a lot of very small pockets (pens, mascara maybe) that aren't useful if you need to carry bigger items with you.

The smell is bad. VERY BAD! I almost returned it, but I gave it a chance, aired it out a bit and then placed in my bag. It's been over a month and the smell has tapered off. I can barely smell any odor at all. I can't understand why companies can't use plain old cotton or natural products! It can't be that much more expensive!

All in all, I would recommend the Tan, Large size for a little extra organization until I find something better suited for this. Ladies, also look into Jen Grover's Butler Bags. They are good for organization.

reviews.title: Kangaroo pockets from amazon
reviews.text:
The kangaroo pocket was recommended to me by a friend. The first time I tried to use one, I found that the pockets were so deep, I could not remove the items from them. The next thing I found was that the entire pocket would not stay in place inside my deep bag I use for a purse. I am going to try some two-sided velco patches to see if they will hold the pockets in place inside my bag. And I may have to do same with the pockets that are too deep. One item I like to be able to retrieve fast from inside my bag is my cell phone and its gets lost in all of the pockets.
But I do I have another big purse that has stiffer sides and it may work in that one. But I am glad I purchased them because I am sure I can make some adjustments to make them work. I do like big purses. Three stars.

reviews.title: Overnite cream
reviews.text:
Goes on smooth. Takes a while to soak in and is sticky before being fully absorbed. Excellent results by morning.

I like it.

reviews.title: Not enough for me
reviews.text:
This moisturizer is a light tan color and has a kind of gel texture. It smells a little medicinal and comes in a jar. I get it out with a cotton swab to try to keep it from getting germy from my fingers. My skin is dry/combo, aging, dehydrated and acne-prone. I mostly need help on my cheeks this time of year, so that's where I've been using it.

I spread this on my cheeks and it immediately leaves a slight cooling sensation. It takes a while for it to soak in/dry down completely and it feels a bit tacky until then. Once the tackiness is gone, my skin feels very soft to the touch, however, when looking in my makeup mirror, my skin doesn't look hydrated at all. It looks just like it did before using this moisturizer.

I think this might be more suited to someone younger and with oilier skin. The ingredients are nice, just not for my skin, unfortunately.

reviews.title: So smooth!
reviews.text: I love the fact that this product is all natural and organic. As I've gotten older, my skin became more and more sensitive to certain chemicals and I always have to be vigilant when buying new products. This cream goes on so smooth and absorbs really well. I've been using this for a few weeks now and definitely feels a difference. This is great for when my skin gets super dry in the winter months, but also feel very lightweight and not greasy at all.

reviews.title: Really Like It
reviews.text:
I felt like my skin was looking kind of dull with the cica cream I was using for a while. My skin gets really dry so I was probably overdoing it with the cica.
I really like this. It takes only a little bit to cover your whole face. I do find that coming back for a second coat helps my skin not be too dry. It feels tight after it goes on but doesn’t stay that way. The predominant scent is tea tree which isn’t the best but not awful, and it dissipates quickly.
My skin does look brighter and fresher so I am happy! And I’m prone to some breakouts still at 42 but this hasn’t caused any issues there.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Yes, smoothing and moisturizing.

reviews.title: Moisturizing agents were quickly absorbed, skin felt hydrated
reviews.text: This is a review for the Perfect Reflection Face Brightening Moisturizer-Organic-Kojic acid-Alpha-arbutin-Niacinamide-Mulberry. This moisturizer has left a fresh scent on my skin. Its moisturizing agents were absorbed quickly leaving my skin hydrated for quite some time. I do recommend it especially for oily or normal skin as it is not a greasy or a heavy moisturizer.

reviews.title: really like the moisturizer
reviews.text:
it has a consistency that I like. I think it hit to sweet spot.
it's not too watery nor too oily.
it almost looks like honey.
Once you apply it, it spreads well evenly.
It doesn't leave much behind but at the same time gives you the sense that there is a layer of protection.

I like this moisturizer a lot.

reviews.title: So far so good!
reviews.text: I see and feel a noticeable difference with my skin after a few days. This moisturizer feels good on my face and does not feel heavy or oily. I decided to give this brand a try because it's made with organic ingredients which I think is healthier for your skin. I would recommend giving it a try!

reviews.title: Moisturizing and lightweight
reviews.text: This cream you just need a dap because a little goes a long way. I apply it morning and night on a clean face and neck. It goes on smoothly and leaves your skin smooth when it absorbs into your face. In the evening I apply and then use my jade roller to work it into my skin. I was attracted to this cream because it was organic and I have been very pleased with the results after using it for two weeks.

reviews.title: Night Cream
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:bd28ddd212060fc00cc2340f84b879d1]] I like how moisturizing it leaves my face. I only use it as a night cream every two days, I’ve noticed a little brightening since I’ve been using it the past month. I would continue using it.

reviews.title: Not moisturizing once absorbed but not drying either. Haven’t noticed brightening yet
reviews.text:
This comes in a plastic bag that is sealed. Inside it is just a jar, no outer product box. But, there is plastic sealing around the jar. When you remove the lid, there is no seal there. It is made in the US. The ingredients are listed on the label.

The product itself is a creamy yellow color. It has a slight scent to it, but I can’t quite place it, but it isn’t a bad or unpleasant smell, and I only smell it if I stick my nose right up to the jar. I don’t smell it while applying it. It has a gel like texture. It glides onto the skin. It feels extremely hydrating while applying it. Like your skin is going to be really hydrated. But, once it dries down it doesn’t have that feeling, it has a slight tacky feeling that takes a few minutes to go away. It does make the skin feel smooth and slightly hydrated but not as hydrating as I’d like. But, I didn’t get this to be my main face moisturizer. I got it for its brightening effects. So far I haven’t noticed any brightening, but something like this will take time.

Right now I can say that it’s not very moisturizing. It doesn’t feel drying, but doesn’t feel moisturizing once it absorbs either. I haven’t noticed any brightening effects, but I’m going to continue using it and hopefully will notice some after continued use. It does work well under my moisturizer and makeup. Right now I only feel comfortable giving it a middle 3 stars since I can’t really speak to its effects and don’t find it moisturizing.

reviews.title: I’m happy with it
reviews.text: I was looking for a face moisturizer I could wear that was organic.  I usually do a lot of research before trying anything new, and the Perfect Reflection Face Moisturizer seems to have all the popular organic ingredients I was looking for, at a good price.  I decided to give it a shot and I’m pretty happy with the results.  I can already feel my skins lot smoother and less dry.

reviews.title: Organic Face Moisturizer
reviews.text:
I like that this Face Moisturizer is Natural and Organic. It is Moisturizing, anti-acne, anti-wrinkle, anti-redness, brightening. It is slightly yellow and color and has the consistency of a light serum. I can smell the Tea tree oil in the product over everything else. It has Bearberry, orange, Licorice, Tea tree, willow, papaya, sugar maple, Organic-Kojic acid, Alpha-arbutin, and Niacinamide-Mulberry.
It goes on smooth and is not oily or greasy. My skin absorbed it quickly and it did a good job of moisturizing.
It came in a sealed 2 Oz plastic jar in a bag without and box.
It is manufactured in The USA and is a good value for an all natural product.

reviews.title: Great for my skin!
reviews.text: Earlier this year I began my skin care journey. I found a great cleaner, exfoliator , but most couldn't find a good moisturizer .  Most of them would either not really moisturize my skin or cause me to break out. With this one, not only is my face softer looking I think It's starting to make look younger. The big name moisturizers use a lot of  non organic chemicals.  I think the ingredients used in this product has along with the quality is the reason why it's helped me out so much. I'll definitely be subscribing to this product as part of my daily skin care regiment.

reviews.title: light and hydrating
reviews.text: bought this cream about a month ago and it came wrapped in an additional plastic bag which i appreciated for extra protection.  when i initially tried the cream it felt hydrating even on my dry skin yet not overly thick or sticky.  i like the light texture as heavier creams can sometimes break me out.  after trying the cream for about a month i can see the difference in my skin.  i appreciate the good ingredients for a reasonable price point for someone like me who is on a budget.

reviews.title: Improve my dark spot
reviews.text: I love it!! Before I would use the name brand cosmetics, but as I got older; I wanted to treat my body with more organic and natural ingredients.  My friend’s a pharmacist and she told me to look at the active ingredients on the label versus the fluff on the label.  Perfect Reflection face brightening moisturizer seemed to have the organic and natural ingredients I was looking for and the price wasn’t too bad.  I used it for a few weeks and it was able to clear up some of the dark spots on my face.  My skin also feels a more refreshed and has a glow about it.

reviews.title: Nice Roller
reviews.text: Excited to give this jade roller a try. Packaging is cute. The large roller was detached, but is very easy to attach. No issues with it coming off (yet). The longer silver end with the jade ball is actually a spring that comes slightly greased-so be careful when handling.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: I really liked the jade roller.  I use it every night in my skincare routine and it really helps make my skin look and feel amazing!

reviews.title: Relaxing Beyond Compare
reviews.text:
First off if you’re looking for a gift for someone this is definitely a ready made gift set ready to wrap-with a beautiful sturdy box that can also be used as a place to permanently hold the set. (The box top opens on one side with a hinge and doesn’t completely come off) It’s got nice purple tissue on the inside and the tool comes in a purple velvet carrying case. There also a jade Gua Sha tool included which is a perfect nice extra touch. If you’ve never tried gua sha you simply must try it. It is the most relaxing thing ever for TMJ issues especially if you grind your teeth at night or have tightness in your shoulders or neck. You use oil and gently scrape to release tightness. It is truly amazing and relaxing-a huge relief, really helps jaw clenching reduce massively!

The tool itself jade roller is bigger than I thought it would be. It’s very pretty, well made, sturdy, heavy in the hand and I absolutely love the jade. I’m kind of a sucker for massage tools, and I did question myself if I really needed yet another one but I was super drawn to this. I am SO VERY DEFINITELY GLAD I got this one, and if you’re on the fence I hope I can give you peace of mind that this is really truly worth the plunge. First off I’ll say I enjoy very deep tissue massage, and very strong pressure. So I thought what is this little thing going to do for me really? Still, I remained drawn to to it.

I’ll just say, it is utterly one of the top things I’ve ever done for self care. Very relaxing, rejuvenating, invigorating, and lovely-so very pleasurable. I put mine in the fridge for about twenty minutes, and started rolling (you’re supposed to start from the neck and always roll upwards onto the face) The chills I got from this procedure and the delicious relaxation that followed is almost beyond words. It was also oddly energizing. An unusual thing to feel energized yet calm and relaxed for sure! I personally have been using the side with the ball/ slightly springy end is emotional freedom technique tapping gently on the meridian points. It’s very effective for me.

I will say that the jade, the coolness, the gentle rolling etc. is supposed to bring the quality of youth to you, and I certainly felt the next day after using it once that I looked and felt more relaxed, refreshed, and my face looked younger. I felt like it reduced puffiness and tightness as well.

I felt inspired to get another gua sha tool so I got a titanium one today for larger muscles and deeper work since that is also wonderful.

I highly highly recommend these tools, and also as a gift, fantastic!

reviews.title: Beautiful and have seen improvement in eye puffiness
reviews.text:
I LOVE this jade roller! It was recommended by my friend. It has definitely improved some of my eye puffiness. My husband also likes it because of the massage ball attached for pressure points. He has noticed an improvement in his shoulder tension.

The box is beautiful that it is delivered in, and it is packaged well. The ebook that is emailed once your roller is delivered is a wonderful bonus too! It helps explain why this roller is unique and how to use it.

I am very pleased with this product and very happy I purchased it.

reviews.title: Make more  .
reviews.text: Good good result.  Very comfortable  ,easy to use ,very helpful .Thank you

reviews.title: Well made. Packaged well.
reviews.text: Well made. Packaged well.

reviews.title: Awesome Set, Great gift idea too!
reviews.text: This is such a beautiful set. The jade alone is stunning. The presentation is amazing making it great to gift. It really stimulates blood flow and collagen renewal in the face. What a difference in puffiness and glow on my face. Im so loving this set!

reviews.title: Heavy to hold
reviews.text: I have a hard time holding this Jade roller with one hand because it is very large and heavy, and I'm not a wimpy girl. I tend to use it more on my neck than my face because of its size. I keep it in the freezer and it really does wonders on the neck. I attempt to use it on my face but it's just a bit too heavy and large. The ball is of no use to me other than a few Taps on the neck/behind the lower neck. It hurts to use under my eyes. I haven't decided if I'm going to keep it yet. It came in a  lovely box and the set is very cute as a gift I just think that the size is the problem for me at this point.

reviews.title: Absolutely Love This!!!
reviews.text: Best packaging I’ve seen in a long time! The roller has a decent weight and the craftsmanship is excellent. Maybe it’s just in my mind but, I feel like it’s helping the fine lines on my forehead from wearing heavy glasses for years.

reviews.title: It’s a good jade roller
reviews.text: Very impressed. Received my roller packaged beautifully in a purple velvet pouch. It’s much heavier than my old roller which broke on my. It comes with another cool tool and works well. I put it in the freezer for a few minutes then rub it in an upward motion bringing down inflammation and working my oils and moisturizer into my skin.

reviews.title: Large roller
reviews.text: Great roller!  It’s a bit big but can work well on more than just your face for ultimate smoothness!

reviews.title: Good stuff!
reviews.text: Love this! The design is perfect for me. I didn’t give all 5 stars because the larger end was detached when I opened the package, it was an easy fix and still worked fine when I used it. Very cooling and very easy to use.

reviews.title: Love My Roller
reviews.text: Love my roller. This company is wonderful to work with. Packaging is great and I enjoy the product. Thank you so much!

reviews.title: Beautiful Jade Roller! Love it!
reviews.text: The Dr. KOKO Jade Roller was inside a purple velvet satchel and carefully packaged inside the green gift box pictured. I was pleased to find the gift set included a gua sha scraping massage tool, an informative brochure, and an eBook with beauty tips that are super helpful if this is your first time using a Jade Roller! This Jade Roller is larger than most Jade Rollers which I loved since it covers more surface area and is more functional on the ball side to roll the sensitive skin in the eye contour area. In my experience with some Jade Rollers they require you to apply significant pressure on your skin for the device to roll, can sometimes drag across the skin, and are squeaky! This Jade Roller performed like a dream and I have enjoyed incorporating it into my morning and nighttime skincare routines. After cleansing and toning I applied a hydrating toner in the morning or one of my favorite facial oils at night prior to using the Jade Roller. Then I applied gentle pressure while rolling the Jade Roller from the center of the face in upward and outward motions. I loved to put my Jade Roller in the refrigerator prior to use for an extra cooling sensation! There are many benefits to using a Jade Roller including stimulating circulation and enhancing lymphatic drainage which can decrease puffiness and under-eye circles, and even minimize the look of fine lines over time. The Jade Roller is also wonderful for working serums and oils into the skin for maximum effectiveness. The Jade Roller is easy to clean with warm soapy water. The Jade Roller would make a perfect Christmas Gift for a loved one, friend, or for yourself! I'm sure you will love it as much as I do!

reviews.title: Better than other jade rollers
reviews.text: High quality jade roller. I bought this because it’s a Gua Sha and jade roller combination PLUS the tapping stone. If you watch the YouTube video about this product, you’ll see how easy it is to use. The roller is detachable for easy cleaning. I keep the Gua Sha and the roller part inside my little cooler in my bathroom.  I wake up and use the Gua Sha with my favorite face oil. I feel like it helps the circulation on my face. Then at night, I use the jade roller after I put all my treatments as a relaxing massage. I own another jade roller, which I also bought from amazon. It works well, but dr koko jade roller is heavier and has more substance.

reviews.title: Not real jade stone
reviews.text: It’s ok but it’s hard to used the other side of the roller it keeps bending put & pulling my hair out.and also they claim it’s aunthenic jade which is not true this is made of plastic look like jade stone, why lie about it?

reviews.title: Great for my face
reviews.text: I love the little jade roller! it looks beautiful, I’ve been using it for probably a month and my skin is definitely smoother I feel like it’s a little bit plumper too and I’ve also noticed that when I stop using it my skin gets a little worse!

reviews.title: Nice Jade Roller
reviews.text:
This is my first jade roller and this jade roller is so nice! This roller feels like the legit jade! The design of this jade is roller is absolutely stunning with a jade roller on one side and the other side is the ball. Every time I grab this jade roller, it is always cool to the touch.
.
After one month of using this jade roller, I have seen that my skin absorbed a skincare product better. In particular, my skin under my eye looks more healthy. I especially love using this jade roller when I mask. It provides a sensational cooling effect because the jade itself is at a cold temperature.
.
On the other side, I have not seen any anti-aging results such as wrinkle reduction. I will continue to use this to look out for long term results.
.
Once again, I want to emphasize that the skin does not only reflect from what you use on the outside but what you put inside your body. There are many factors that come into play, such as life habits and diet. Although this jade roller may work for me, it may not work for someone else. In the end, it doesn’t hurt to invest in a jade roller. Just make sure it is the legit jade material because it will make a big difference!

reviews.title: Disappointed. Has a crack.
reviews.text: Don't post reviews very often but in this case I had to because I bought this after reading all the glorious reviews. I believe I got a bad piece. The roller looks sturdy and the jade is big, however, the one I received has a crack in it. (see pictures) Planning on returning this item.

reviews.title: Badger Sunscreen
reviews.text:
For the past many years, Badger is the only sunscreen I use as it is highly rated by the EWG (Environmental Working Group) that tests and rates all sunscreens.

This purchase is the first time I have used the Damascus Rose scented version as I try to stay away from heavy fragrances; however, this is a very light, pleasant scent. This sunscreen also seems much smoother and creamier than the regular version which I appreciate since it goes on the face.

I will not hesitate to buy this sunscreen again.

reviews.title: Lovely product
reviews.text: Love this Badger product. I used this as my everyday sunscreen for face and décolleté. Blends in well and is non greasy. The scent is lovely, natural and light. I am VERY picky about anything I put on my face as I have sensitive skin - this product ticks all the boxes for a light, wearable, everyday sunscreen. Badger also makes a 20% Damascus Rose sunscreen. I am switching to that because it has a higher SPF yet feels even lighter on my face. Either way you can't go wrong with the Damascus Rose Face Sunscreen!

reviews.title: AMAZING!
reviews.text: Makes your skin bright and beautiful. The smell is earthy and instantly relaxing and one of the best qualities of this product. It's very soft, therefore it applies to your skin like "butter." I fell in love with this product as soon as I used it the first time and that doesn't usually happen very often. A lot of products have amazing ratings and then can be very dissapointing but not with this one. This is definitely my new daily sunscreen lotion. The Badger company did a very good job with this product.

reviews.title: Nice SPF for your Face (with safe ingredients).
reviews.text:
I have photosensitivity, so I use a lot of sunscreen. Because of that I have looked into safe brands. Badger is my favorite. However, I had been using their regular sunscreens on my body as well as my face, and realized maybe I should try this one that is specifically for the face. I'm glad I did.

Zinc oxide is a safe sun screen ingredient. The downside is that it can leave a white-ish residue on your skin. I found with Badger's (and all brands using zinc oxide) this was true. I am very pale so it's not a huge issue to me. And I solved it best by exfoliating my face a few times a week (the white tint seems to grab more onto dry patches) and also after putting on the sun screen, I use that mineral powder makeup and I just tap on a little of that to get my regular looking skin color back. But with the regular badger sun screens, like most with zinc oxide, you really have to rub it into your skin. It sort of starts to "melt" a bit and smooth out, and on my body it's no big deal. But on my face, with sensitive skin, I like to rub it as little as possible.

And that is where this facial sun screen lotion comes in perfect. It is easier to smooth onto your face. It is creamier and lighter in texture. There is a slight white-ish hue, especuially if you overdue it, but it seems less than when using the other bigger tubes of Badger sunscreen. And it feels nice on my skin and leaves if feeling soft afterwards.

This is my first bottle of this lotion and I find the rose scent to be faint. I smell it just slightly, sort of mixed with a slight clean, herbal sort of scent. And it fades away soon enough. I saw other reviews state the rose smell was too heavy or smelt like a grandmother, so I am not sure who's bottle is the norm, or who got a bottle that is unusual. I hope I didn't get an old bottle. But it seems to be working as far as sun protection. i would love if it smelled a bit more like rose because I love roses and their scent. It is real rose. Badger does not use fake fragrance.

This is now what I will be using on my face year long. (Unless they come out with a facial lotion with SPF 30, which would be great.)

reviews.title: Okay, but keep searching
reviews.text: This cream looked old when I received it.  The pump stopped working every two pumps.  Even when I unscrewed the cap and moved it around, the pump just didn't work.  I've only used it a week, and now the pump has completely stopped working.  I just take off the cap, but the stick is so tiny that it's not that great at removing the sunscreen.  UGH!!!  Not worth the money.  If it works, I wouldn't know.  I can barely get enough out to use.  I would give it a zero for usability, but since it didn't make me break out, I think two stars is fair.

reviews.title: Left a white cast on my skin
reviews.text: I was super excited about this product and thrilled with the ingredients, but I did not like the white sheen it left on my skin.  I looked like I was ready for kabuki theater.  Gave it to my friend with a different skin type than me.  I have older skin (43) that is dry and rather thick (I have to exfoliate a lot).  I trust the other reviewers.  I must have weird skin!

reviews.title: Skin Saver
reviews.text: I'm a big fan of Badger's Cocoa Butter Lip Balms, and this sunscreen did not disappoint. It glides on and smells great in the process, and definitely saved me from getting a sunburn on my face when I was on a trip. I didn't put any sunscreen on my shoulders or arms and got a horrible sunburn but my face remained fine! I would definitely recommend this, it feels lightweight yet moisturizing, and I didn't feel like I was using sunscreen at all. Since it's broad spectrum it might appear to have a whitish cast at first, but within seconds that disappears.

reviews.title: Fancy Sunscreen
reviews.text: This facial sunscreen has a great smell and blends very well, without leaving white streaks behind. It didn't make my face oily and I felt that it made my skin look more even toned. I would like it better if some of the antioxidants were higher up on the ingredients' list but not if it compromised the consistency. Overall, I'm pleased with this Badger product, I'm going to have check some of their other stuff out.

reviews.title: ingredients list
reviews.text:
Why do I love this sunscreen? This one, unlike the normal badger sunscreen, does not make people stare at me. Dermatologists say that you should use a pea sized amount of sunscreen to cover your face. Try as I might, no matter how much I blended it, the original sunscreen would always give me a white cast.

Well, this sunscreen actually goes on invisible! It blends dreamily, no more smushing zinc bits around like in the original formula, and this one has great antioxidants in it!

Full ingredients list below, direct from the Badger website:

Active Sunscreen Ingredient:
Non-Nano, Uncoated Zinc Oxide 10.55%

Other Ingredients:
*Aloe Barbadensis (Organic Aloe) Extract, *Olea Europaea (Organic Extra Virgin Olive) Oil, *Sucrose Polysoyate (from Organic Soybean), *Ethyl Palmate (from Organic Palm), Aqua (Purified Water), *Sucrose Cocoate (from Organic Coconut), *Glycerin (from Organic Palm), *Citrus Medica Limonum (Organic Lemon) Extract, Chondrus Crispus (Carrageenan) Extract, Xanthan Gum, *Lavandula Angustifolia (Organic Lavender) Oil, *Hydrolyzed Soy Protein (from Organic Soybean), *Rosa Canina (Organic Rosehip) CO2 Extract, *Hippophae Rhamnoides (Organic Seabuckthorn) CO2 Extract, *Rosa Damascena (Organic Rose Otto) Oil, *Anthemis Nobilis (Organic Roman Chamomile) Oil, and *Calendula Officinalis (Organic Calendula) CO2 Extract.

* = Certified Organic
Total Organic Content (excluding water): 75.31%

reviews.title: Awesome Product!!!
reviews.text: Smells good, goes on clear, doesnt clog pores, and provides protection from the sun using non nano zinc!!!! Best facial moisturizer around!

reviews.title: Good protection, but bad scent!
reviews.text: I tried this sunscreen because of the great score it received on the EWG sunscreen report.  Everything about it would be great if it wasn't scented.  I mean no offense to anyone, but it smells very old ladyish to me.  The scent doesn't necessarily fade like I had hoped it would!  I will continue my search for a vitamin A-free, daily moisturizing facial lotion sunscreen due to the fragrance of this product!

reviews.title: Not bad
reviews.text: I was looking for a reasonably priced moisturizer that has sunscreen in it.  Based on reviews I decided to give this product a try.  It wasn't bad.  A little heavy but blends in well.  Has a little bit of a funny odor but I got used to it and didn't really notice it after a little while using it.  I have since started using Juice Beauty which I like a lot better and seems to last me longer and is more economical.

reviews.title: wonderful face spf.
reviews.text: excellent product! love the natural ingredients. used for a week in hawaii, and my face never burned. it doesn't irritate my skin at all, and the smell is light. will buy again.

reviews.title: Antioxidant face lotion combined with broad spectrum sun protection
reviews.text:
I have been looking for a broad spectrum daily face lotion/sunscreen for a long time. I read through all 27 "Best Moisturizers with SPF" on the Environmental Working Group's 2012 list and this Badger one seems promising.
--- INGREDIENTS ---
The lotion aspect is packed with all natural plant derived ingredients some with antioxidant abilities. The sun screen aspect provides broad spectrum UVA/UVB protection through a physical agent zinc oxide not a chemical agent; further, the zinc oxide used are non-nano sized at about 600nm and the Badger website provides a chart showing the size distributions of their ZnO particles.
--- USAGE ---
In terms of usage, I have been using this every other day for about a week. It glides on smoothly and has a light pleasant fragrance. It makes my skin feel soft and does not make my face whitish at all.
--- EFFECTIVENESS ---
I have not been exposed to the sun for more than 20 minutes at a time yet while having this product on my face. Will try to update review once I have more data.

I am slightly concerned with the relatively low SPF (16) compared to other daily sunscreens hence the 4 stars. But at the same time I did not want to have loads of sunscreen agents pasted on my face all day. So it's a trade-off.

Another product that may be promising with higher SPF (30) is Suntegrity Skincare All Natural Moisturizing Face Protection. However its ZnO particles are smaller at 220nm, but still non-nano by a long shot. Also it's about 1.5 times the unit price as this Badger one.

reviews.title: Nice not thick, absorbs.
reviews.text:
I’m using this XXI vitamin C cream with the firming cream.
My face feels smoother, and not breaking out using both of them.
This cream is not real thick, and absorbs well.
I use a little light make up and it goes on smooth over this, then use blush.

I like this, but not noticing a major difference.
I’m a older women.

reviews.title: Delivers Results I Rarely See w/Other Like Products
reviews.text:
While XXI Bio-Pure facial moisturizer is packed with great skin care ingredients such as jojoba, shea butter, aloe vera, sunflower seed oil and glycerin, I think its the Vitamin C that really makes this an exceptional product. At least for my skin it's exceptional.
