reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Nice shoes that fit the dolls well.  :)  Very pleased.

reviews.title: A slight case of false advertising, but interesting, nonetheless; I'm glad that I ordered these shoes!
reviews.text:
THE FACTS: These shoes arrived TODAY (Friday, 9-18-2015), about a MONTH ahead of schedule! Cool! There ARE exactly 10 pairs of them, so I'm not disappointed on THAT score. There are three pink pairs, two green pairs, a silver pair, a red pair, a blue pair, a purple pair, and a black pair, so, with regards to the variety of colors that I received, I am pretty impressed. The PRICE is right, too, so I'll be ordering MORE of these shoes...as soon as I am able to do so, because I DIDN'T receive the one type of shoe that I really, REALLY wanted. :( That's understandable, as the shoes ARE RANDOMLY SELECTED, but I am disappointed, nonetheless.

A NOTE ABOUT THE PRODUCT PHOTO: Okay, so if you click on the second available product photo (The one that has "15 pairs" written on it), you'll see several different types of shoes, from left to right. If I were to give these different types of shoes different, distinguishing "names", they'd read as so (from left to right, top row to bottom row):

* Stars (orange)
* Studs N' Ruffles (pink)
* Studs N' Ruffles (red)
* Bow @ the Back (pink)
* Moon Rocks (red)
* Chandelier (gold)
* Chandelier (pink)
* Ruffles Galore (purple)
* Strappy (pink)
* Latticed Roses (pink)
* Bow @ the Back (yellow)
* Ruffled T-Strap (White)
* Ruffled T-Strap (Blue)
* Ruffled T-Strap (pink)
* Ruffled T-Strap (black)

WHAT DID I RECEIVE? I got ten pairs of shoes, and half of them looked like some of the types that are listed above. There are a red pair of "Studs N' Ruffles" shoes, a pink pair of "Moon Rocks" peep-toe boots, a neon pink pair of "Chandelier" shoes, a silver pair of "Ruffles Galore" shoes, and a pearlescent blue pair of "Latticed Roses" shoes.

The other five pairs are...interesting, but they are NOT pictured on Amazon's product page. They include the following:

* Double Bows N' Studs: A pair of black, multi-strap, chunky heels w/ studs...and two bow accents (one at the top of each shoe, and one towards the peep-toe area.
* Hourglasses and Chains: This pearlescent pair of purple shoes is rather...interesting. Each shoe features scrappy "chains", and the high-top front of each shoe looks roughly like an hourglass. I actually LIKE these shoes, as they look daring and unusual.
* Pointy Toe: These candy pink shoes feature straps, "fabric" accents across the top parts of the shoes, and detailed-looking heels (the very bottom of each heel has a line across it).
* Spaghetti T-Straps: These lime green shoes are rather squishy...and cutesy! They are T-straps, but the T-strap accents are spaghetti thin, for a delicate effect. The heels are detailed-looking (See the description of the above shoes), and the portion of each shoe that creates the peep-toe effect fans out, like a bow, or a swath of fabric.
* Strappy Marshmallow-Toe Bow Pumps: These shoes are FUN shoes, too! They're lime green, just like the Spaghetti T-Straps, but they're really strappy, as in "ballet-style" strappy. Each shoe's strappy section ends in a bow, and the toe of each shoe is rounded, giving these shoes a rather youthful look.

WHO CAN WEAR THESE SHOES? I tried each pair of these shoes on the feet of a 1994 Barbie doll, and then I tried each pair of these shoes on the feet of a My Scene Barbie doll.

The Red Studs N' Ruffles: These shoes can be worn by the 1994 Barbie doll, but you'll have one heck of a time trying to take them off of her. They work well on the My Scene doll.

The Pink Moon Rocks: With regards to these shoes, it's..."smooth sailing" for BOTH dolls!

The Neon Pink Chandeliers: They can be worn by the 1994 doll, but you'll want to utter expletives when you're trying to take them off of her feet. The My Scene doll can wear them, too, but, surprisingly, you'll want to utter expletives when you're trying to take them off of HER feet, TOO.

The Silver Ruffles Galore: They fit relatively well on both dolls, and they're pretty easy to take off of both dolls, too.

The Blue Latticed Roses: They'll fit on the feet of the 1994 doll, but they're a bit of a pain to take off of her feet. They fit well on the My Scene doll, but they're a bit of a pain to take off of HER feet, TOO.

The Black Double Bows & Studs: They're kind of squishy, so they work sort of well with the 1994 doll, and they're REALLY easy to use with the My scene doll!

The Purple Hourglasses & Chains: These are a bit of a pain to use with the 1994 doll, and they don't even look GOOD on her; her feet aren't LONG enough for them! The My Scene doll's feet are long enough for the shoes, but they don't LOOK to be long enough for these shoes, and it's a bit tough to take these shoes off of the My Scene doll's feet, too. All in all, these poor shoes, which SHOULD look exciting, just look WEIRD. Hmmm...

The Pink Pointy Toes: The 1994 Barbie's feet are TOO WIDE for THESE shoes! They work like a CHARM on the feet of the My Scene doll!

The Green Spaghetti T-Straps: Forget trying to use THESE shoes with the 1994 doll! You and your modern Barbie dolls will have to put up a fight to get these squishy little shoes to fit, but they'll fit...You may have to work them into place with your fingernails, though...I don't know...

The Green Strappy Marshmallow-Toe Bow Pumps: The 1994 doll's feet are too wide...The My Scene Barbie can wear these shoes, but you'll have to put up one heck of a FIGHT in order to get them onto her feet; you'll have to put up one heck of a fight when you want to give her a new pair of shoes, too, 'cause these shoes don't come off easily!

THE GOOD: I like the price, the fact that I received a fairly good variety of shoes, the fact that I received 10 pairs of shoes, the fact that the shoes arrived early, and the fact that all of these shoes will at LEAST fit on the modern Barbie dolls!

At least 3 pairs of these shoes will work with the 1994 doll, so if you own older Barbie dolls, and you want to take a chance with this random assortment of shoes, you may be in luck, with regards to being able to provide at least a few of your older Barbie dolls with some new shoes.

Overall, these shoes do NOT feel super oily, super sticky, or super, super cheap. They are fairly cheap, so they feel slightly cheaper than some Barbie shoes, but, overall, they actually feel as though they're pretty decent shoes.

THE BAD: These 10 pairs of shoes DO feel SOMEWHAT cheap, which is less than desirable, but that just means that I wouldn't leave them on a doll's feet for prolonged stretches of time. I don't know weather or not they would stain a doll's feet...OR her outfits!

The way that the purple shoes look is a bit of a disappointment, but you might like them more than I do. I am a bit upset about the little black stains that are ingrained into the plastic of the pointy-toed shoes, making them look less than cool. The blue shoes won't stand, but that's just because of their design. I DON'T like the fact that it's physically difficult to use some of these shoes.

THE UGLY: The little green shoes have extra pieces of plastic still attached to them, and the larger green shoes won't even stand, due NOT to their design, but to the fact that their soles feature lumpy protrusions of plastic; it's also distressing to note that the strap on one of those shoes is already broken! I may just toss these two pairs, due to the fact that they don't really fit on any dolls, anyway. Maybe I'll try to dress Skipper in them...?

RECOMMENDATIONS: As with ANY Barbie shoes, I wouldn't recommend these to any child who's under the age of about 3, or so, as they are rather small; of course, THIS assortment contains some rather large, chunky shoes, so a 3-year-old SHOULD be able to be fairly safe...as long as they're not allowed to play with the small plastic bag that the shoes arrive in.

I would also recommend these shoes to ANY Barbie fan who is sick and tired of plain Barbie pumps, tall, boring boots, and cutesy, uninteresting little shoes. This assortment of shoes is for the Barbie enthusiast who really wants Barbie to look more interesting, unusual, and...WILD!

IN CONCLUSION: Gosh darn it! I still want those shoes with the bows at the back! LOL! Other than that, though, I have few complaints about this assortment of cool, unusual shoes!

reviews.title: None drying face masks that smells amazing
reviews.text:
I have a few products by Higher Education and like the majority of them. This clay mask is fantastic. It comes in a squeeze tube which makes it easy to dispense how much of it you need. They tell you to apply it liberally to your clean skin. When you do that you will notice that fantastic fragrance this has which is great since you will have this on your face for 15 to 20 minutes or so.

During that time it will dry out and harden. Once the time is up rinse it warm water. I prefer to do these masks before I go into the shower so I can just rinse them when I am in the shower, so much easier and less of a mess if you ask me.

Once you are done you will notice that your skin eels actually nice and soft. A lot of these clay masks tend to dry up your skin but I was impressed that this one did not. It actually felt almost moisturized but I still followed it up with a nice moisturizer right after I was done like I always do.

I have to say this clay mask is great. It smells fantastic, is nice and gentle and does not dry you out. There are not a lot of clay masks out there that I do like because most dry my skin out but this one is fantastic.

reviews.title: Good clay mask
reviews.text:
I liked this clay mask a lot. The mask cream is very thick indeed, and it takes a squeeze to get it out of the tube. It goes a long way, but at the same time, this is a small tube (3 oz). It dries quickly. And it's the type of mask that makes your face feel TIGHT. The type where you can't smile.
After about 20 mins, I washed this off. It was easy to remove. After using a few times, I think it does indeed have a brightening effect on the skin. It doesn't moisturize. At least it didn't for me, and I had to lather on cream afterwards as my skin felt a bit dry after the mask.
Overall I liked this. I like how it worked but it is on the pricey side.

reviews.title: Love This Product!

The clay mask itself is good quality, and dried without excessive tightening or drying. It washed off easily and definitely gave a clearer complexion. The instructions do advise to only use on t-zone if you have drier skin seasonally.

Overall, great product and I will use it weekly!

reviews.title: Good for your skin

reviews.title: Great self-care mask
reviews.text:
Most wash-off masks that I've tried are good for tightening the skin and minimizing pores, but I've been looking lately for a mask that won't strip my skin and will be good for self-care nights when I just want to hydrate my skin. This mask is perfect for that! Other than a couple of fragrant ingredients (citral, linalool,and benzyl benzoat) very low on the ingredient list, it contains a lot of really great hydrating ingredients, and it left my skin feeling smooth and firm but not tight. It doesn't apply very smoothly, as you can see in the photo I included, so it isn't the best skincare selfie mask, but in terms of functionality I really enjoyed it and will continue using it. They also included a sample of their eye cream for me to try that felt really nice too!

The only issue I had with it was that the packaging was pretty beaten up when I got it. It was still sealed with a little clear sticker on the top of the box, and there was a peel-off seal on the bottle, so it clearly was still unopened. Didn't bother me, I just thought it was worth mentioning.

The one I received expires in 1.5 months which is a very short expiration period.

reviews.title: Clogged pores rejoice!
reviews.text:
I'm a wee bit of a skincare addict, and I love trying out products (my husband jokes that my bathroom looks like an Ulta blew up). One thing I am always on the lookout for is a good product to help with the occasional breakout in my T-zone or the god-awful cystic acne that pops up every so often along my chin and jaw. Since my cheeks are on the dry side, I've only used this on my T-zone to deal with some of the stubborn clogged pores there, and so far so good. I like how the mask warms up a bit to help pores relax (if that's the right word since pores don't actually open or close) and the AHAs help to soften/dissolve the gunk inside the pores so it is easier to remove. Since I've not had to use more moisturizer than normal, this mask hasn't caused any dry or flaky skin. I also didn't leave it on for a full 20 minutes like the directions say you can do, instead opting to wash it off after just 10 (based on my patch test). Between the AHAs and the bentonite clay and the self-warming, I didn't want to push my skin to the point of irritation. The directions also say you can use this up to twice a week, but since I am also using retinol, I will likely keep this mask to once a week.

After checking out their main site, I found this line was created by pediatric dermatologist specifically to deal with skin concerns/conditions more specifically associated with those in their early 20’s such as stress breakouts, hormone changes, excess oil, etc., but they also offer products for dry and sensitive skin. I'm in my 40's and still deal with stress breakouts and hormone changes, and it's nice to see a product address the actual causes behind the breakouts rather than only the end result (the breakout itself).

The packaging for this product gets its own star. A full set of directions, possible side effects, and ingredient list - all printed in multiple languages - is included in folded pamphlet form along with the product, so no more hanging on to the box 'just in case.' You also get a little flag shaped card with a positive message printed on it is included. Tacky glued underneath is an information card underneath that says what the product is for, how to use it, what to expect, possible side effects, and a coupon code for either a percentage off or a free product if you decide to purchase directly from their main website. Additionally, a sample packet of another of Higher Education's products is included for you to try. You can tell that a lot of thought went into making the purchase and use of this product a pleasant experience.

reviews.title: Warming sensation is so good
reviews.text: I love a good face mask - this hits all the marks for me. It is thick and basically feels like wet pottery in your hands (hence the clay), smells nice (somewhat perfume-y) and most importantly, feels like something I’d get at a spa. When I first put it on, I was surprised by the warming sensation, since I didn’t realize it had that effect. I liked it! I’ve had masks like that before and they just add another dimension to the experience. I left it on for 10 minutes and washed it right off. Some clay masks I’ve used are hard to wash off - not this one. Face felt smooth and had no irritation afterward. I really like this brand.

reviews.title: Really cleans out pores
reviews.text: This is a wonderful clay mask. It's a little thick coming out but it's very easy to spread. Has a nice subtle sweet scent. You'll feel the mask warm up a bit when it begins to work. So don't think you're having a reaction it's just how it works. You can actually start seeing speckles in the areas where the pores have been cleaned out. It was so easy to remove. I used a warm wet cloth and easily wiped it off. My skin was so smooth and so fresh looking. My pores were so clean and clear. They appeared smaller and tighter. I'm really happy with this mask. Now if you look at the photo I uploaded you'll see the expiration date is 9/20 which is only two months away. The directions recommend using once to twice a week. There's no way I'll finish this before it expires. (Just a side note: I also recieved a retinoid cream from the same brand with the same expression date) and I just recieved these products. Just keep that in mind when purchasing. Product wise though is a definite 5 stars!

reviews.title: The gentle warming is SO relaxing
reviews.text: I love the gentle warming effect of this mask! it feels great on and the warming seemed to reactivate for me so after rinsing it off my skin felt warm for a little while afterwards, which I loved! This mask left my skin feeling nicely moisturized and not tight which I prefer. I didn't need a lot for application and it dried nicely then came rinsed off as expected for a clay mask. It is easier to wash off in the shower or with a washcloth at the sink.

reviews.title: Worth the money?
reviews.text:
This mask is okay, but there are better ones out there, especially for the price (currently $25).

The consistency is a little on the thin side, but applies smoothly. It dries okay, and the smell is mild and pleasant. It washes off easily, and it did leave my softer and a little brighter.

But it really didn't do much for the overall quality of my skin - the softness and brightness were gone by morning, blackheads were still visible, and existing acne was not improved.

I have personally tested a number of masks that did a lot more for my skin, and some at half the price. This one isn't bad, and may be a great option for those who want something mild, but I wouldn't buy it again.

reviews.title: I love this!!
reviews.text: OMG!! This is the best. It made my skin look bright and clear, and it has a sweet smell. I have really bad acne - when even I touch my face my skin it breaks out, but this didn’t make my acne any worse. That was my biggest concern, so it passed for me!

reviews.title: GLO Science Teeth Whitening Pen
reviews.text: I am not a fan of this GLO Science Teeth Whitening Pen. The clicking mechanism is super annoying- a twisting mechanism would have been so much easier. The thick, bulky, silicone tipped applicator is annoying as well and a lot of the gel gets left in its little bumps and grooves. It doesn't apply smoothly or evenly at all. I have been using it twice per day but have not seen any results. The taste of the gel is absolutely horrible- there's like a weird floral perfume quality to the taste. Do not like.

reviews.title: Good so far
reviews.text: Love the convenience of this pen, just wish the gel would come out a better way. First off, it took FIVEver to expression the gel out. I think I clicked the bottom 50 times before a tiny bead of gel started to appear, I had to aggressively click and slam the pen onto the counter to get more product out. Once I was finally able to get enough product out, I dried my teeth (after flossing and brushing first) and wiped the silicone bristles onto my teeth from premolar to  premolar on my upper and lower teeth, I used the box it came in to fan and dry off my teeth. I did this before bed time so I wouldn’t have the urge to eat or drink after. The gel will become stringy once your inner lips and cheek touch the gel and there’s a mild taste to it.  So far I’ve used this pen nightly for 4 days and I’ve seen a tiny bit of results. You’re supposed to use it twice a day for 2 weeks. I haven’t experienced any sensitivity from the gel, partly because I’ll use sensodyne toothpaste to brush and the gel is formulated with potassium nitrate that helps prevent sensitivity. Other good ingredients include xylitol and natural antioxidants. Overall good product, just need a better way to get the product out without having to click it. Twisting would be a better option and maybe transparent packaging so you know how much product is left.

reviews.title: Needs to be used twice a day for two weeks
reviews.text: The pen is super convenient, easy to carry and conceal. You push the base to get the gel started, once you start to feel resistance, you know it's at the top. When using it, ensure your teeth are dry enough to hold the gel. I like that it is no rinse needed, just wait 20-30 minutes after applying to eat or drink. While the idea is great, the results were minimal. To see max results, the gel needs to be applied twice a day for two weeks. At that rate you would be better going a different route.

reviews.title: Hard to apply accurately
reviews.text:
After 3 applications I do not see the effects yet, although I feel the sensitivity, so it has the peroxid working.

My main complain is the applicator tip. The goo comes out in the middle of it, and it has some rubber bumpy thingies around. The surface of the tip is relatively large and you do not see the edges or the goo why applying it (as it faces your teeth). So I would say it is much harder to apply this right next to your gum line accurately, than some other whitening pens having a pointy bristle top.

The idea is good, but currently I would prefer a smaller tip (even as a 6ft tall male).

3 stars for now, let me use it for a while and update the review if my opinion changes.

reviews.title: easy for sensitive teeth
reviews.text:
GLO Science Teeth Whitening Pen 35 Aplications, Safe and Efective, No Sensitivity, Easy to Use Dentist Invented Whitening Treatment, Travel-Friendly

Are my teeth whiter? Yes. It's not so white that anyone will see me and be like 'wow your teeth are so white!' but it is whiter and I notice it, which I prefer. I have very sensitive teeth and almost no enamel. The pen is a click pen, and you have click quite a lot to get it started. I thought mine was faulty at first, and the clicker even got stuck half way down but I smacked it and it popped back and I kept clicking. The silicone tip has little bristles and it does a good job of coming off on your teeth - I was worried the gel wouldn't grip onto my teeth and would slide, but it didn't. It does have a cinnamon taste, and it does dry in 30 seconds, it was easy enough to smile for 30 seconds and it was on there. Truly I forgot about it after that (don't eat or drink for 30 min if you can). Are my teeth whiter? I couldn't tell after 1 use, but after two, I also couldn't tell... BUT I took a before and after photo (which I'll save you from because my lips look awful right now) and my teeth are definitely visibly whiter! I'm happy with this, it's easy to put on, doesn't make my teeth sensitive, works for whitening, dries quickly, and you don't even have to spit it out.

reviews.title: Easy application
reviews.text: This product is currently on the trial period and so far I haven’t seen any improvement to my teeth after 2 weeks. I’m hoping it will help my teeth become whiter. The good side about the product is the neat packaging and how easy, simple, and practical way to use it. With a thin layer of the gel, brush it on the teeth, the taste is somewhat tolerable, then let it dry for 30 seconds and no more rinsing.

reviews.title: Horrible Flavor, Non-Existent Results
reviews.text:
Being a tea and coffee drinker, my teeth have a tendency to stain from time to time. I have used OTC whitening products in the past with a lot of success. I was originally looking at the Colgate pen, but saw very mixed reviews and decided to go with this one.

Packaging, top notch. The colors, construction, and branding are all on point. However, that's where, for me, the good news ends.

To start the pen, be prepared to click 30-40 times to get the first bit of gel to come out. After that, sometimes just opening the pen is enough to cause it to ooze... other times, you are going to be clicking 5-10 times to get it to dispense the gel.

To prepare the teeth, I use a Kleenex to wipe the teeth down so they are dry. I apply a generous coating of the gel to all the teeth in front (top and bottom)... Once applied, I leave the mouth open and teeth exposed to allow the coating to dry (suggested was 30 seconds... I went up to 1.5 minutes with no difference). Once you close your mouth, the product immediately starts foaming (H2O2). The flavor is not good... I know this is subjective... but it is like dropping cinnamon red hots into Vanilla Coke... letting it set until flat and then watering down to almost no flavor... [in short, back wash.]

After 9 days, there has been no change in the color of my teeth. I have used a color guide from my dentist to follow the process, and I have stayed right around a 6.

Horrible taste, ineffective whitening, more than $20... Yeah, not for me.

reviews.title: It works
reviews.text:
I have been using this for 4 days and the result is really there. Basically, I applied this composition to the fangs, as they differ in color from all other teeth.
In such a short period of time, I noticed a change of about 2 tones.
Despite the fact that the manufacturer writes that the composition is absolutely safe and natural, I would not use it for more than 7 days in a row. Although the instructions say about 2 weeks of use 2 times a day. So far, I have not risked for such a long period. It's still hydrogen peroxide.
But in general, this whitening pen really works and I cannot but rejoice it.

reviews.title: Great whitener!
reviews.text: The glo to go teeth whitening pen is so easy to use! Whitening results each time I have used it! Easy to take anywhere. Great subtle flavor, not tingly or too strong. I love having this whitening pen on hand for when I feel like I need it!

reviews.title: Didn't work for me
reviews.text: I used the pen a couple times and I am yet to see any results. The flavor is horrible. I thought it was expired initially because it tasted so gross. Also it took me a while to get the gel to come out. After clicking about 20 times it finally cam out. Not worth it.

reviews.title: Convenient and easy to use
reviews.text:
This whitening pen is convenient and easy to use!
The pen tip allows me to put the gel on parts of my teeth that whitening strips doesn't cover. After three consecutive days of use, my teeth were visibly and noticeably more white!

reviews.title: Pen doesn’t work
reviews.text: The pen would not dispense the product.

reviews.title: Easy to use, visible results after third use.
reviews.text:
Very happy with this teeth-whitening product. This product works and is gentle, just be sure to follow the directions and don't overuse it.

My teeth are pretty white, but I'd noticed in the last year they were looking less bright. I drink coffee and coke, and I'm 45. This product appealed to me because it's very easy to use.

The pen has a clicker on the end to release the product and you apply it to the front of your teeth. I used it twice a day for the first three days and after achieving the results I wanted, I have been using at night every other day.

This product contains hydrogen peroxide for whitening, xylitol for oral health, and potassium nitrate to reduce sensitivity. When you apply the gel, you let it dry for 30 seconds, and they you can't drink or eat for 30 minutes. I would use this before bed, before working out, or after dinner while watching TV.

By the third application I could tell a big difference in the whiteness of my teeth. They were much brighter and whiter. I had just the slightest sensitivity after using this. Would recommend this product. Great value, easy-to-use and it works.

reviews.title: Quick results
reviews.text: This teeth whitener is easy to use and my teeth looked whiter after just one use. I like that you only have to wait 20-30 minutes after applying before you can eat/drink and also that you don't have to brush your teeth afterward. When I first used I had to click the button probably 20 times before any of the gel dispensed but after that it was smooth and easy to apply. Right after I use this my teeth look noticeably whiter and brighter especially for the first day or two, but the brightness kind of fades although overall I am seeing, hopefully, a long lasting whiter smile.

reviews.title: Easy to use
reviews.text: Sasy to use.. small and congenital

reviews.title: O Star since it was dried out and could not try!!
reviews.text: It was dried out so I never got to even try it—now noo return

reviews.title: I am very happy that I was given a chance to try Luxy ...
reviews.text:
I have lost a considerable amount of weight throughout the years, because it was imperative for me to maintain a healthy weight due to the fact that I used to have full blown type 2 diabetes. With weight loss or weight gain comes stretch marks. I am very happy that I was given a chance to try Luxy Beauty Care's Stretch Mark Cream. I have been religiously using it on my thighs and I can honestly say that I am very happy with the results that I got. Two thumps up for this product!

I received one or more of the products mentioned above for review purposes. Regardless, I only recommend products or services I use personally and believe will be good for others. I’m just a regular consumer and I appreciate reading and giving honest feedback about products that regular people like me use on a daily basis or consider buying. My views and opinions are from a customer/end user’s standpoint.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Thank you good price with high quality well that we will use

reviews.title: Overall Good Stretch Mark Cream
reviews.text: I been using this stretch mark cream for several weeks now. I like that it smells really nice. Its also very moisturizing as well. I feel that its important to use a product to help prevent future stretch marks as well as fading old ones away. I was focusing on certain areas by my chest. As I am a very busty lady so you tend to get stress marks. I have noticed fading of stretch marks in those areas when using this product compared to other products I have used in the past. Over all I am pleased with the product. I have not had any skin reactions to the cream as well. Which is a huge plus. I received this product complementary in exchange for inspection and my honest opinion. All thoughts are my own, and results may vary. I was not obligated to leave a positive review.

reviews.title: It is a pretty thick cream so it hydrates the skin but it ...
reviews.text:
Luxy’s Stretch Mark Cream is specifically formulated to increase your skin's collagen and elastin production to help prevent and diminish the appearance of stretch marks. It is a pretty thick cream so it hydrates the skin but it is absorbed quickly. It’s free of harsh chemicals, which is good for my sensitive skin and it works on all skin types. There is no offensive menthol or eucalyptus scent, like many other stretch mark creams I have tried (I'm sure Dave appreciates that!)

I’ve been using for about a week and I think the cream does help reduce the appearance of stretch marks by giving the skin a more even tone; my stretch marks seem smoother. Suggested use is twice daily and for improved results, it is suggested to use with a derma roller. I have been using the derma roller with the cream and while I think it’s pretty impossible to rid yourself of the stretch marks, for me, anything that makes them less visible is great! I haven’t seen “wow” results yet, but a week is pretty early. I do see a difference, even if a little one so I’m curious to see what they will look like after I finish the bottle.

*Product received in exchange for review*

reviews.title: Works Best On Fine Lines or Marks
reviews.text:
I found this to do a nice job of smoothing the skin and minimizing some of the finer marks and flaws. It left the treated areas looking more universal as a whole, and the skin feeling more soft and smooth tho the touch. I could see a lessening or lightening of the color in some marks, but they did not all disappear. The marks that were recent, thin or fine to begin with seemed to do better with this cream than the ones that had been around longer or were larger in size.

This was easy to apply and didn't seem to leave much of a residue behind. It takes a bit more than some of the thinner creams I have tried, but applies more thickly and evenly too. I had no staining or damage to my clothing when using this either. There is a slight smell to this cream. It is a medicinal smell, almost minty to me but it is there.

*A sample item was provided for review purposes.

reviews.title: Four Stars
reviews.text: Good

reviews.title: Great Product
reviews.text:
I Was Selected By Tomoson To Sample And Review Stretch Mark Cream By Luxy Beauty In Exchange For My Honest And Unbais Review Of This Product!
My Thoughts Of This Stretch Mark Cream Was Very Nice. It Has A Thick Goopy Texture That Absorbs Fairly Quickly. I Have Only Been Using This For About A Week Or So, But I Can See A Slight Difference. My Stretch Marks Are Lighter And I Do Feel That If I Keep Using This Bottle Till It's Empty That My Marks Will Be Barely Visible. The Cream Absorbs Into The Skin Quickly And Does Not Leave You Greasy Which I Love That It Has Alot Of Moisturizing Power Too. This Cream Is Reasonably Priced And It's Very Easy To Use.
Honestly I Have Not Heard Of This Company Before Getting The Chance To Review This Product Though Tomoson, But I Highly Recommend This Cream. Their Products Are Made In The USA.

The Ingredients In This Cream Is Deionized Water, Caprylic/Capric Triglyceride, Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice, Shea butter ( Which I Love ), Glyceryl Stearate, Glycerin, Stearic Acid, Organic Olive Oil, Cetyl Alcohol, Cocoa Butter ( Another Butter My Skin Loves ) , Jojoba Oil, Mango Butter, Rose Hip Seed Oil, Grapefruit Seed Extract, Sodium Hydroxymethylglycinate, Tocopheryl Acetate, Panthenol, Potassium Sorbate, Orange Oil, Disodium EDTA, Sodium Hydroxide.

Luxe Beauty Care Stretch Mark Cream Is An Anti-Stretch Mark Formulation That Helps Diminish The Appearance Of Old Stretch Marks And Prevents Occurrence Of New Ones. Suitable For Men/Women, It Contains Shea Butter, Cocoa Butter & Mango Butter Which My Skin Loves And Just Soaks Up. It's FDA Approved And Contains No Harsh Chemicals.

I Only Recommend Products Or Services I Use Personally And Believe Will Be Good For Others. I’m Just A Regular Consumer That Will Recommend Luxy Beauty Stretch Mark Cream To Others And I Appreciate Reading And Giving Honest Feedback About Many Products Just Like This One That Regular People Like Me Use On A Daily Basis Or Just Considering Buying. My Views And Opinions Are From A Customer/End User’s Standpoint.

reviews.title: Works Good For Minor Stretch Marks
reviews.text:
Because I am a plus size woman, naturally I have stretch marks on various areas of my body. I have been using this Stretch Mark Cream by Luxy Beauty Care for a couple of weeks now, and I have had some pretty decent results so far using this.

I have stretch marks on my stomach, upper arms and around my bust. The stretch marks on my arms and bust are fairly small in size and more minor than the ones on my stomach. I have found that this cream is working well for my arms and bust, I am seeing progress in their visibility. On my stomach, the ones that I call my tiger stripes, they are a bit more stubborn. I think that if I use this cream for a while, and keep up my routine, results will come. I do recommend for those stubborn stretch marks to exfoliate the area a few times a week. This method in combination with this stretch mark cream has been my best friend!

I give this 4 stars, it is a great product, and one that I definitely recommend giving a shot if you want to treat your stretch marks. However if you have the stubborn ones, this will work, but it goes a bit more on the slower side.

Please note that I was sent this product complimentary to try out in my home in order to share my honest experience, thoughts and review.

reviews.title: This product works GREAT!
reviews.text:
**Disclosure: I received the product mentioned below for free usingTomoson.com. However, all of the opinions expressed are my own.

As a mom of three, with a normal weight of 135 lbs, and am now down to 200 lbs. from 240 lbs., I have some stretch marks. I don't really care what others think of them, I have issues with weight, and I have 3 babies that I stretched that skin for. =) I do however, get annoyed by them, I care what I think of myself and how I appear. That is why A.) I am on a weight loss journey, and B.) I am on a stretch mark removal mission!

I want to say that I was very skeptical of a cream making these huge discolored stretch marks go away. I have tried all sorts of lotions and creams, from the stores, and even the cocoa butter secret while you are pregnant. Nothing has worked. I still got them while carrying each child. I was eager to give this a shot, something I have not tried before.

In the picture I provided, I wanted to demonstrate how thick this cream is. It has a light scent of citrus, and leaves your skin feeling soft and cool. Suggested use is 2 times a day for at least 3 weeks. I used the cream on my right side of my abdomen only for purposed of seeing how effective this product is. I am very surprised! I had equal amounts of stretch marks on both sides.
I have definitely seen a difference in clearing of these stretch marks, and I know I am not the only person who hates that irritating itch associated with the dryness of stretchmarks Not to mention the discoloration. The only thing I really see is a shiny glare where you can tell the skin was at some point compromised. Overall, I LOVE THIS PRODUCT! I would and will definitely recommend this product to friends and family. I intend on purchasing more as my weight loss journey continues.

**Disclosure: I received the product mentioned below for free using Tomoson.com. However, all of the opinions expressed are my own.

reviews.title: I'll stick to the coconut oil
reviews.text: Ive tryed many products to try and fade my marks sadly this product turned out just like the rest...used the whole bottle and didn't see a single difference. Didn't care for the smell but was an ok moisturizer.

reviews.title: One Star
reviews.text: Regular lotion that smells like orange.

reviews.title: Awesome Cream!
reviews.text: I bougth this for my sister and I can't tell you how much she like it. Its a great cream and completly recommended.

reviews.title: Strong Hold, Classic Scent
reviews.text: I love the smell of an old fashioned barbershop, and this pomade captures the scent really well. The Ace High holds my hair really well, and doesn't leave it feeling greasy or slick after applying. A little bit goes a long way too, so this tub will last quite awhile. And it washes off very quickly and cleanly too.

reviews.title: I became an immediate fan
reviews.text:
This product has everything I like. A likeable backstory about the founders, produced in small hand crafted patches, and delivers the quality results that it promises.

I wear my hair short (buzzed on the sides) with about 3-4 inches on top, which I style differently depending on the day. I usually like it combed to the side, and pushed back, but with volume to give it a nice swoop. My hair is fine, but a lot of it.

I’ve never been a fan of pomade in the past because I find it doesn’t hold it’s shape and is too shiny. However, this pomade provides a natural looking shine, while holding my hair in my preferred style. The pomade itself is very light and thin. I didn’t think it would work when applying, but within seconds it began to form my hair into my go-to style. It dries to a “tacky” feel, which allows you to readjust throughout the day, but wouldn’t feel comfortable to run your fingers through it. After applying, the product easily washed off my hands, and out of my hair at the end of the day.

The scent is good but not overwhelming. It has the typical “masculine” scent that you will find in deodorants, body wash, shaving cream, etc. for men. The scent lingers till you wash it out.

Overall, I will definitely be using up this entire jar.

reviews.title: Great scent, good hold and volume, rinses poorly
reviews.text:
After having had a 1/4-inch buzzcut for about 15 years, about 18 months ago, I started growing out my hair, which is now quite long and sits around the bottom of my ear. As a result, I've been using different types of hair products to style it in different ways and keep it under control. Given a chance to try this pomade, I decided to give it a shot.

Packaging-wise, this is really simple: a glass jar with a metal lid. It has that old-timey barbershop feel, and would look nice on your counter or shelf, if you're into displaying your grooming products. Just remember it's glass, and an accidental drop on your counter or tiled floor is going to result in a disaster. The lid is a good quality and the seal seems to keep the product fresh.

As soon as you open this jar, you'll recognize that "barbershop scent". It has that minty-eucalyptus odor that's refreshing and eye-opening. There are days when I use this, when I'm sitting at my desk I wonder "what smells so good"...and I realize it's my hair. So if you're into good scents and smelling-good for yourself or others, you'll definitely like this.

The consistency of this product is quite interesting. It looks like vanilla pudding. However, it's definitely much thicker than vanilla pudding. It's not sticky. It feels and looks like a compound that would end up very oily in your hair, but that's not the result. Even given my hair's length, I don't have to use a lot of this, and typically on damp hair I only have to use about two fingertips' worth of this product in my hair.

While your mileage may vary, when I put this in my hair, it has an immediate effect. It provides immediate styling strength. It also helps to add a bit of volume, so that as I comb it through, I can easily prop-up the parts of my hair to give it a little volume and height. It dries well and doesn't get too stiff, leaving my hair with some movement, where I'm not afraid to run my fingers through it or adjust it. I'd say it's really good for my more "casual day" styles.

My only complaint, and for me this is really important, is that it doesn't rinse well in the shower. I only wash my hair every third day to maintain its health, and while nearly every other product I use rinses almost cleanly without leaving much of a residue, this particular product won't rinse cleanly. This becomes a problem if I use this on day two, but want to use a different product on day 3, for example. It definitely adds to residual build-up. I realize not every product rinses cleanly with just water, but this one is particularly problematic, forcing me to either wash my hair earlier or plan the days on which I use this so the build-up doesn't become an issue on consecutive days. So, if like me, you don't like washing your hair often, this may be a deal-breaker.

Overall, though, I'm quite impressed. The small jar is actually going to last me quite some time. It has a great scent and styling power. I'd probably use it every day if it weren't for the rinsing issue.

reviews.title: Excellent Hold
reviews.text:
When I first opened the jar, I groaned a little. Judging by the consistency of the product, I thought it was going to be more of a styling cream, than a conventional pomade. It felt too loose and watery.

I'm not really sure how, but this stuff changes dramatically when you apply it your hair. It firms right up and makes it very easy to put your hair in place and hold it there.

When it drys, it holds well. It's not as stiff as hair gel and has a little bit of flex, but it should hold up well, unless it's very, very windy outside.

A little bit goes a long way. I don't doubt that this jar will last a few months. Then again, I don't have a lot of hair.

There is not much of a scent and once it's applied, you won't notice it at all.

I'd say this is the best pomade I've found and even beats out American Crew in terms of quality and value.

reviews.title: Works Great!
reviews.text: Ace High, High Noon Pomade works well on both my beard and hair. It left my hair feeling flat, which is a bit of a bummer. However, it has a pleasant and mild scent. A little bit goes a long way with this product. Also, it's worth pointing out that this product is made in the USA and comes out of Detroit, MI. Overall, this worked great!

reviews.title: Great hold
reviews.text: Product works great and holds my hair in place well while I’m working

reviews.title: Nice hold
reviews.text: First impression is that the smell is mainly eucalyptus based, but not too strong. The texture out of the can is at first very creamy, which I thought may affect the holding power, but once I worked in a couple of fingertip sized scoops into my hair, I found that the pomade started to take hold and firm up. My hair held its shape throughout the day and was easy to fix with a comb if needed. When washing it out, despite containing oils and wax, regular shampoo seemed to do the trick. Little to no residue leftover in my hair after a shower.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: The best pomade out there. Period.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Love this stuff. Once I figured out how much to use, since it is more like a cream than a wax, it’s been fantastic. Smells like that classic barber shop smell. I’ll certainly buy this again.

reviews.title: Love the scent
reviews.text: Love the scent! Wish I could get it in a cologne!  Stuff works great been using it for a few years now and don’t use any other brand.

reviews.title: Best I’ve found so far!
reviews.text: High quality product that actually holds all day. Lasted me a year. It is not super shiny, but not matte either. It is a reasonable balance. I’d recommend trying it!

reviews.title: Does a great job on short hair
reviews.text: Great product. Non greasy. Easy to blend into hair. Nice scent.

reviews.title: Thicker, oil based; smells great!
reviews.text:
This was a big change from my previous pomade which was water based and lighter. Ace High is much thicker and oil based. I like it but would prefer if it were a little lighter. This stuff just grabs on to my hair as soon as my fingers make contact. It holds really well and I got two compliments the first day I put it in. I found it takes a few washes to come out. Unfortunately my wife doesn't like it and says it looks too greasy. So I'll use it on work days but avoid it going out with my wife.

So if you want a more natural, thicker and slicker pomade, I recommend this! And my son, daughter and I all agree it smells great too. My teen daughter liked it so much she said when she starts dating she wants him to wear this stuff!

reviews.title: Gentle hold, nice shine.
reviews.text:
LOVE the natural ingredients and scent of this product for the men and boy folk in my house. However, we have found that it performs best in cool dry weather. It doesn't hold so good (and we haven't found a product that does so I still say this is still a great product). We got two from this brand, the clay and the pomade. We use the clay for lift on the thick hair and the pomade for a smoother look on the thinner hair. Both are well liked in our house.

Thanks for reading. I hope this review is helpful!

reviews.title: Great product but could smell a lot better
reviews.text: It’s great for my hair but it smells like pine sol…

reviews.title: Good, But I Disagree On The Scent
reviews.text: This is among the best holding pomades I've used and it washes out easily.  I appreciate the glass jar, the hand crafted presentation, and the feeling that it uses natural ingredients and I'm not slathering a ton of chemicals on my dome.  But — and this is certainly subjective — I find the scent to be a lot more "Grandma's Medicine Cabinet" than "Grandpa's Barbershop".  And it's not exactly a subtle scent, either.  I mean you kind of have to love it, cause it's going to hit you square in the mirror each morning.  I'm glad they make an unscented version; going with that next time.

reviews.title: Wax Feel, Easy to Wash Off
reviews.text: You don't need much to get a strong hold in your hair.  It really feels like a thick wax based pomade, but you can easily wash it off your hair with one round of shampoo.  Fragrance is a bit like cologne.  If you're looking for a clean cut look with a modest shine in your hair, this is a good buy.

reviews.title: Pine Sol Scent with decent hold
reviews.text: The hold is decent. Scoopability is a breeze. Scoops like cake batter. But the scent...... exactly like Pine Sol cleaning solution!!!!  Guys, please change this scent!!!!  You’ll sell more if you do!

reviews.title: I haven't found a place to buy replacement heads when needed.
reviews.text:
This Women Ultra Smooth Razor works well. It glides smoothly and cuts great. My problem is I don't see a place to buy replacement heads only razor blades. Instructions say to replace the blade every two months.

The pack comes with a base, handle, and two razor heads. The razor heads have covers on them and they are magnetic. There are instructions but it does not say where you can buy replacement heads.

I will not be recommending this Women Ultra Smooth Razor to family and friends.

reviews.title: No replacement heads?
reviews.text: I got this razor for my daughter but ended up keeping it because I liked it so much. First of all the handle is a heavy duty handle with some weight to it . I like that. It also has a magnetic feature to change the blades . I was worried it would fall off when shaving but it stood firm. The magnetic feature makes it super easy to change heads. Unfortunately I didn’t  see any replacement heads to order on Amazon. I would have liked the kit to come with more heads,  it comes with two, one to use and one replacement . I really like the aloe strip that surrounds the 5 blades , most of my other razors it’s just on one side. The razor cuts close and is comfortable to use. It also comes with a ceramic base to hold it . It looks great and simple while being stored.

reviews.title: Love the razor but what about refills?
reviews.text:
Review for: Women Ultra Smooth Razor Womens Razors for Shaving Comfortable handle 5-blade Razor + 2 Refill Blades

I love this razor. It provides a really close shave, leaving my legs smoother than other razors. It is easy to use and the handle is large enough that it is easy to hang onto, even in the shower. The blades flows along the contours of my legs easily and does not cut me. It has a cover for the blade and a holder for when not in use.

It comes with two blades and if I knew how I could be replacements, I would throw out all the other razors in my house.

reviews.title: Good Razor - Very Disposable - No Replacement Blades
reviews.text:
This is a very straight forward razor with a stand up holder that uses a very low power magnet to keep the razor in place.

The razor itself is nothing fancy and I have been using it for about four days. I have not had any issues. The handle is a little awkward to hold when it gets soapy, but it is not a deal breaker. I do like the stand up holder because then the razor is standing and out of the way. I do wish the magnet was a little stronger.

There is one replacement blade, but apparently after that you have to buy a new kit. I could not find replacement blades for sale anywhere on Amazon.

reviews.title: It’s like magic!
reviews.text: I don’t know where to start. This is the best razor and holder! The holder is heavy and feels like porcelain. Very sturdy and well made. Holds the razor nicely. The razor works even better than I thought. The first shave, I didn’t think it was shaving because the lubrication on the pads above and below blades was so much it would sort of string out. Not in a bad way. But the razor shaved nicely. I’ve used it about five times and the lubricant is still on there! It’s almost like a person wouldn’t need shaving cream! I keep looking at it wondering how they did it. It’s amazing! Like magic. It’s very sturdy made.

reviews.title: The handle becomes slippery in the shower
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:605657cac95f549a7d3c2e340303de40]] I love the sleek design of this razor and the ceramic base it comes with. The razor gives a super close shave and makes my skin feel soft and smooth. The only thing that makes me nervous is the handle. It becomes slippery in the shower so I can't get a good grip. It worries me that I will cut myself when I am shaving. I searched if the company sells refill blades for this but they don't have them. You will have to purchase the whole set again, so that is something to think about before purchasing.

reviews.title: The Best Razor Ever
reviews.text: Comes with a cover which is what I needed. Also has shaving aloe cream around the razor. Not like others only have it on the top. Came with an extra cartridge. Sits in the most adorable ceramic stand. I purchased this razor for my teenage neice & she loves it. Perfect

reviews.title: Love it!!!
reviews.text: It works  great!!

reviews.title: Good Razor But Seller Does Not Offer Separate Replacement Heads
reviews.text:
This razor is different from any of the ones I have used before. I love the magnetic head that pops right into place. The handle is fairly comfortable to hold and the frame of the razor head has a moisturizing coating that gets activated with water and helps lubricate skin for easy gliding. The razor blades are sharp and help achieve a clean shave. This is supposedly good for about 2 months of use, after which the replacement head that comes with the razor can be changed. I also love the ceramic base that the razor comes with and can be stored in.
Now for the critical part. Although the handle is comfortable, the slick coating may make it a little slippery if using in the shower. The magnetic razor heads, although a unique and interesting feature, are impossible to find the replacement for. Even the seller's page only lists the razor itself, but not the replacement heads. This means that after the 2 heads that the razor comes with have been used up, you would have to purchase a new razor.

reviews.title: It’s like magic!
reviews.text: I don’t know where to start. This is the best razor and holder! The holder is heavy and feels like porcelain. Very sturdy and well made. Holds the razor nicely. The razor works even better than I thought. The first shave, I didn’t think it was shaving because the lubrication on the pads above and below blades was so much it would sort of string out. Not in a bad way. But the razor shaved nicely. I’ve used it about five times and the lubricant is still on there! It’s almost like a person wouldn’t need shaving cream! I keep looking at it wondering how they did it. It’s amazing! Like magic. It’s very sturdy made.

reviews.title: Effortlessly glides
reviews.text:
Works great on sensitive skin and glides effortlessly
It has a comfortable short handle that is easy to hold.
This razor has lubricating strips that are surrounding the blades for a smoother shave (especially for my sensitive skin). This razor is not as good as my gillette but has decent blades, a pivoting head, and protective microfins.

reviews.title: Great razor, but no way to buy just replacement heads (at least not when I’m writing this)
reviews.text:
First the good…
I love the razor! It’s cute and comfortable to hold. The razor has 5 blades that are stainless steel. It says they’re made of high quality steel in the USA. The razor head is magnetic so it just clicks right on, I was a little worried with it being magnetic that it might slide or move during use, but the magnets are strong and I wouldn’t even know they were attached magnetically has I not done it myself 😂 It has a metal handle that’s comfortable to hold. There’s a nice ceramic base for it to sit in when you’re not using it. The razor head moves nicely to conform to your body as you shave. It says it goes down 15 degrees and up 65 degrees (it says degrees Celsius in the image but that’s only for temp, not angles so not sure why they added the C? 😂). It has aloe on top AND bottom for extra protection and slip, which is nice. It said it came with 2 replacement razors, which I thought meant it came with the main one and then 2 additional ones, making 3, but it only comes with 2.

Now for the bad…
They recommend to replace the blades every 2 months. But how?! There’s no replacement heads here on Amazon. Why sell something on here that requires replacement heads but not sell the replacement heads on here? Hopefully they will add them before I need them because I love the razor. The razor is currently $11.99. For that you get the razor handle part, ceramic stand, and 2 razor heads. So, if I replace the razor head every 2 months like they recommend, I’ll get 4 months of use out of this. Do I want to spend $11.99 every 4 months just to get replacement heads? That is $5.99 per replacement head if that’s all I’m buying it for. Then I also get a ceramic base every time that I won’t need since I’ll already have one and another razor handle, which I guess isn’t a big deal to replace over time. I can get 4 Venus Gillette replacement heads here on Amazon for $10.99. It’s basically the same thing but I can actually buy a replacement head for it.

So, I’m not sure about this. I love the razor, but it isn’t anything crazy special. The Venus Gillette ones I usually use have aloe on them and 5 blades that work well. I don’t get the nice ceramic base for it to sit in, but that’s not a huge deal to me. I can at least replace the heads easily with it. So, it’s up to you if you don’t mind spending the $11.99 to get replacement heads for this and having to get the handle and base every time too. It’s a really nice razor that works well and is comfortable to hold, and it has a nice base to sit in. The only downside is the replacement heads. Like I said, hopefully they’ll add the replacement heads onto Amazon soon. Right now, I’d say it’s a great razor and if you don’t mind that you can’t buy replacement heads for it, I’d recommend it. If you do mind that you can’t get replacement heads for it, I’d still say it’s a great razor so maybe by the time you’re reading this they have added the replacement heads onto Amazon, so you can check and see! If they have, I’d recommend it. If not, I’d say skip them if it’s an issue not being able to buy just the replacement heads.

reviews.title: Very effective
reviews.text: This is a solid shaver. I like that it has the built-in moisturizer strip and that the blades are VERY sharp. I wish it was like the other shavers that have the safety wire for added protection, but I didn't cut myself when I used this. It also has a nice weight to it. I like that it also comes with a stand to hold the shaver although I won't be using it as I wouldn't want to leave this on my vanity and have our 3 year old daughter try to handle it.

reviews.title: Does the job

This cream moisturizes the skin nicely and keeps the skin soft and smooth. Does not have very strong fragrance, which i like.
The box comes with English labels on the our and Korean on the inside. There are no application instructions in english but I believe applying the cream isn’t rocket science.

reviews.title: Can't Go Wrong with Celleanser
reviews.text:
Celleanser has fast become one of my wife's favorite Kbeauty skin care brands, maybe even just brands in general and this vegan clean cream is no exception. Lots of moisturizers either smell like a bunch of liquid chemicals squeezed into a tube, feel greasy after applied, are heavy or leave her skin with red streaks and irritate

Not this one. There's none of that here. This feels clean, smells great, isn't too light or dense, goes on real smooth and moisturizes her skin as promised

Even the box is fun to open!

reviews.title: The Toner Delivers it’s Promise!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:d2b95b7c15ed2b6eaea9b511c54f2fd]] Another superb addition to the Celleanser family! This toner is really terrific in that it helps to maintain a natural skin glow! It fits quite nicely into any skin care routine and leaves your face feeling it’s best!

reviews.title: It's okay
reviews.text: This Celleanser clean cream is good, but nothing spectacular. Has a medicinal fragrance that fades quickly. Doesn't leave your skin feeling heavy or greasy and absorbs quickly, but not much hydration! I usually follow about 30 minutes after applying with the Celleanser Therapy Water Bounce Cream for better results. Reasonably priced, and good for when you're on a budget.

reviews.title: I am loving this brand!!!
reviews.text: This cream added to my routine really helps keep my skin hydrated all day. I have mature skin and any added hydration that lasts is my new best friend. This is perfect, especially for the Chicago winters! 🧡🧡

reviews.title: It works well!
reviews.text:
- Pretty thick cream good for fall or winter, or dry skin
- Dries down to a skinlike finish
- Scent is mild and herbal
- Didn't break me out

reviews.title: English directions/info would be nice
reviews.text:
First off, I absolutely love that this is right away labeled as both vegan and cruelty-free. It's nice not having to search around and see if a product meets those requirements.

The product itself is a moisturizing cream with little to no scent. It goes on smooth and seems to get absorbed by my skin pretty quickly and doesn't leave much behind in terms of a greasy feeling or anything like that. However, some English instructions or general information would be great here. It says anti-wrinkle, so I assume it's primarily intended for the face, but some confirmation would be great. Other information such as how much to use, how often and when to apply, etc. would also be good. There's a lot of text in Korean on the box, so I assume that's where the info is if there's any.

reviews.title: A Very Nice Hydrating, Soothing, Barrier-Repairing Antioxidant Cream
reviews.text:
(Ingredients list is at the bottom of this review.)

I have really enjoyed using the Celleanser Vegan Clean Cream, and my skin seems to like it too. I also tried the Celleanser Clean Toner Mist, and the Celleanser Clean Serum. They all worked nicely for my dry, sensitive skin, and they worked nicely together.

This cream has a thick and creamy texture. It is very smooth and soothing to apply to the skin. It soaks in well, but it doesn't disappear. It leaves a nice layer of extra hydration and moisture on the skin. Though, it is lightweight and breathable. Not heavy at all. It is not sticky, and it layers perfectly with other products. The scent is sort of lightly herbal or earthy, similar to many Korean skincare brands.

I will say that the finish isn't my go-to. It isn't really dewy or glowy. But I wouldn't call it extremely matte either. Maybe somewhere in-between, but more toward the matte side. I typically like to use dewy, glowy skincare, so I would probably use this product at night for that reason.

The packaging is a nice 60ml tube with a flip-top cap. A little goes a long way, and I imagine this tube will last me a while. At $19.99 for 60ml / 2.02 fl. oz., it's an excellent deal. Especially because the ingredient list is nice.

I haven't been using it long enough to speak on the long-term results, but I do like the cream so far, and I will definitely continue to use it. I would recommend this to anyone who likes the ingredient list and wants to give it a try.

A NOTE TO CELLEANSER: It would be wonderful to add accurate, full ingredient lists to all of your products listed on Amazon. It would go a long way toward helping your customers save time and make informed decisions without any hesitations or uncertainties. Thank you!

INGREDIENTS:

Water, Cetearyl Alcohol, Propanediol, Glycerin, Macadamia Ternifolia Seed Oil, Pentaerythrityl Tetraethylhexanoate, Caprylyl Methicone, Phenyl Trimethicone, Glyceryl Stearate, Camellia Sinensis Leaf Extract, 1,2-Hexanediol, Solanum Lycopersicum (Tomato Glycopersicum) Fruit Extract (Toma) , Potentilla Chinensis Extract, Cornus Officinalis Fruit Extract, Taraxacum Officinale (Dandelion) Leaf Extract, Narcissus Tazetta Bulb Extract, Asiaticoside, Madecassic Acid, Asiatic Acid, Centella Asiatica Leaf Extract, Rehmannia Chinensis Root Extract, Angelica Gigas Extract, Polyglyceryl-3 Methylglucose , Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Extract, Rosmarinus Officinalis (Rosemary) Extract, Thymus Vulgaris (Thyme) Extract, Origanum Vulgare Flower/Leaf/Stem Extract, Paeonia Lactiflora Extract, Citric Acid, Astragalus Membranaceus Extract,Carbomer, Ziziphus Jujuba Fruit Extract, Xanthan Gum, Tromethamine, Ethylhexylglycerin, Dipotassium Glycyrrhizate, Caprylyl Glycol, Hydroxyacetophenone, Adenosine, Disodium EDTA, Lavandula Angustifolia (Lavender) Oil, Linalool.

reviews.title: my new favorite
reviews.text: The moisturiser is creamy without feeling greasy. I have combination skin that can lean more towards the oily side depending on what part of my cycle I am on. It is gentle on my skin and even if I am having a breakout of hormonal acne it does not irritate my already inflamed skin. I use it in conjunction with the toner and I can see a difference in the feel and look of my skin. I use a small amount after applying my toner and serum and it blends in perfectly with the other items in my skin care regimen. It has a barely there scent that smells of moisturizer. The cream works well with my primers and foundation and I have not noticed any pilling of product when layering. The minamalist packaging is nice and gives the product a high class feel. The box it came in is basic but when opened reveals a beautiful interior which mirrors the results of this product. Simple and elegant on the outside but amazing on the inside. A good add to your beauty routine or even as part of a self care gift or kit. I look forward to seeing what will be added to the items this brand makes.
