Treat yourself, a sister, mom, best friends or all of the above. Very nice gift in a sturdy box.

reviews.title: My wife loved it
reviews.text: I got this for my wife as a gift and she loves it.  It comes with a small cup with a lid that she uses all of the time.  The smell is very pleasant.  She hasn't told me about the bathing stuff yet, but I imagine it is good too.

reviews.title: Adorable packaging
reviews.text: I purchased this for a white elephant Christmas gathering and all the ladies loved it. It was stolen from the original person how picked it so you know it was a good gift. Would definitely purchase again.

reviews.title: Great Relaxing Gift Set
reviews.text: This is quite a nice gift set to pamper yourself or give to a special friend. I love the combination of items, it is almost like opening gifts on Christmas and pulling out one item after the other. I love the soap bar and the bath bombs. The candle is also a nice touch and smelled amazing! This is probably silly, but my favorite item in the box was actually the bottle opener that is shaped like a key. It is so unique and functional, and something that will last a long time. I was not so impressed with the wine stopper. It looks like metal but is made of plastic. I also don't really like messages on my cups, so would have preferred that to be plain or with a graphic/picture design. The cup itself is good and has a nice sliding lid that fits quite snuggly. The set also comes with a blank card inside. Overall, quite a nice gift set and put a smile on my face when I opened it.

reviews.title: Greatest Experience And Exciting
reviews.text: Good Idea Gift

reviews.title: sweet product to give to firend
reviews.text: my friend loved it it’s a good gift set

reviews.title: Ideal self-care spa gift.
reviews.text: There is a lot to like about this gift set. Firstly, the packaging makes it truly giftable and the aroma from the lavender scented candle ascents the other self care goodies. Secondly, The tumbler is a nice touch with the included reusable straw and a complimentary message on the front. This 10 piece gift set is a winner. Plus the value is in the package. A perfect gift for the ideal woman.

reviews.title: Gift
reviews.text: Could not believe the value of this item for the price. The packaging is beautiful and looks expensive

reviews.title: Easy gift!
reviews.text: I love that this gift comes packaged and ready. I threw a card and a bow on top and was able to give it to my sister in law for her birthday. She enjoyed it. It is a nice option for the people you never know what to get!

reviews.title: Works good
reviews.text: I was impressed by the temperature control and that it actually does heat up the water and fairy fast.  Only things I would change is add more bubbles and spread the feet out more, they feel like your feet are cramped in there having to hold your legs together.  Would buy again.

reviews.title: This thing is amazing! I was honestly quite surprised about the size ...
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:7cd974a6de47cf93a9edc7773b930b9e]] This thing is amazing!  I was honestly quite surprised about the size of it.  It's huge and  very comparable to what you see at nail salons.  It's already set up to use - all you have to do is attach the wheels!  It comes with two different foot massage pads which easily snap into  place at the bottom of the unit.  It's relatively heavy so it's nice that it does have wheels.  It stands at about 19" tall.  The water level is about 6" so you get a good amount of depth around your feet / ankles/ mid calf range.  This thing can also fit a wide variety of sized feet!  It feet my husbands size 13 very easily!  My six year old daughter loved this as well.  The panel is LED touch screen.  It's pretty easy to use.  Just push whatever function you want.  Make sure to read the instruction manual as it is more in depth and really gives more information on how to use the functions.  You can have bubbles - the massage rollers going - the fountain! - and of course - the heater to warm the water.  That does take a while to heat the water so I recommend adding warm water already to cut down on the amount of time spent waiting.  Overall, this is a really nice foot spa!  Great value.

reviews.title: Heating element did not work, or digital panel. Defective so returned & have to pay return shipping. Very disappointed
reviews.text:
Heating element did not work, nor did digital pad work properly. Very disappointed. Item was defective yet
I have to pay for return shipping. If it was a question of I had changed my mind I have no problem paying return
shipping, but this was defective. Know that if you purchase and return this seller does not pay return shipping
costs on defects.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Awesome

reviews.title: This item is too heavy to pull. I couldn't ...
reviews.text: This item is too heavy to pull. I couldn't empty the water out.  The hose is too short so I had to pull it outside to empty it.  The instruments meant to massage your feet, do not work as I expected.

reviews.title: Good machine for Big sore feet
reviews.text: Works great!  Be careful with the tab that hold the drain spout in place. I pulled on it and it broke, you're actually supposed to lift up on it before pulling it out. The machine operates well. Good heat and I like the two different stiles of foot massage options that come included.

reviews.title: Great machine. Warms water quickly
reviews.text: OMG, Great machine. Warms water quickly, has a number of features ranging from salt holder, water fountain, and best of all, 2 auto foot massage pads. Don't need to do anything but sit back and enjoy the pads do the work.

reviews.title: Home Spa Heaven ~
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:a4a584a64c290ec35e3eb063c37e5b8d]] I recently was able to purchase the LuxorWare Foot Spa Massager sold by Luxor Outlet in a gorgeous coffee/cream color scheme and let me tell you, it is amazing. It is so easy to use ~ it basically comes out of the box ready to use...All I had to do was pop on the wheels & add water and it was ready to go. I was worried it would be difficult to use but I can honestly say that it is beyond user friendly...each function has a separate button making it extremely easy to customize for the perfect foot massage.
So let me give you the details ~
It comes with motorized roller covers (you actually get two styles of interchangeable massage plates) that hit acupressure points in your feet, water circulation and heat (adjustable) therapy, air bubbles and water jets to stimulate foot reflex zone, an Aqua Massage from calf to toe) and a super easy to use splash proof touch panel with LED screen display
You can also adjust the temp and set different timers and add essential oils. This is the most complete home foot spa I have ever seen. I have used it probably every other night since I purchased ~ my feet have never felt so pampered!!

reviews.title: Great spa!
reviews.text: I am loving this foot spa.

reviews.title: Great for the money, just wish all the rollers moved.
reviews.text: Nice foot spa and easy to use.  I like that it comes with two sets of foot rollers, I just wish all the rollers moved as opposed to two of the four.  I do not think the red LED does anything therapeutic.  I have size 11 US feet and there is plenty of room to feel comfortable.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: Best foot spa I have ever used! I bought it for my husband and he loves it too. Lots of room and almost just as good as going to the salon for a pedicure.

reviews.title: Definitely a 5 Star.
reviews.text: This is a great foot spa. The water heats up fairly fast and stays hot.  It has a variety of choices for temperature controls and timer so I can control the degree of heat I want. I have recommended this LuxorWare high end model to many friends and relatives. Love it.

reviews.title: Noisy. Otherwise ok
reviews.text:
Thought it would be a good idea to have since my husbands feet ache a lot.
Once I researched how to stop the constant beeping (unplug while running then plug back it, and start up again.. many times over) but now it squeaks all the time like it needs to be oiled. (??)
It’s honestly to cumbersome for me (52yo female) to drain and clean. Weighs a lot (obviously) when full. But if you're hard of hearing this might be perfect for you. It heats up without issues and otherwise functions fine.

reviews.title: I like it; however
reviews.text:
I like it; however, it has one small disadvantage. The unit is rather tall and if you are tall, i.e., more than 5'8", or you have a low couch/chair you will be in a very awkward position not to mention get tired soon (your back will tell you that :-)
My suggestion would have been to create depressions in the tub so that the leg will rest comfortably.

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: This is clearly the best in the market. My wife and I are very thankful to this little wonder.

reviews.title: Robust, many features, lots of pros and few cons.
reviews.text:
I had a HoMedics foot spa that I bought from a big box drugstore when I had a foot infection three years ago. It broke after 3 uses. But I liked it, and wanted to replace it with one that was more robustly built, had a reliable water heater, and came with good foot massage tools.
After a lot of research, I settled on the LuxorWare Foot Spa Massager. I've used it a dozen times (my husband has used it, too), and I'm so happy I bought it! Here are the reasons I love it:
• It is heavy and well built. The plastic seems thick and strong, and it seems pretty well constructed, especially the foot massage tools.
• The tub is deep. When you fill it to the maximum fill line, it comes up a few inches above the ankle.
• The water heater is excellent, going from 86 degrees F to 115+ degrees F (I haven't maxed out on the heat, as 103–105 degrees F is super warm). And the heat stays where you set it without variation unless you dial it up or down.
• The timer goes in 10-minute increments and beeps at you when you have 5 minutes left, so you can put down your book and get your towel ready. A nice feature I wasn't looking for, but am glad is there.
• The water, while not swirling or bubbling briskly, does move enough for me, and comes from enough directions to work on the entire foot.
• I use scented Epsom salts in it, and they work fine. Every other time I use the unit, I put a couple of inches of hot water with a tiny bit of dish detergent, insert a pair of foot massager tools, and turn the motor on briefly to get the lightly sudsed water to run through all the openings (the buttons on top of the unit operate different squirting gizmos). I follow this with a freshwater rinse and the unit is clean again.
•Best thing: There are 2 sets of foot massaging tools, that pop in and out easily (I've only changed them with an empty unit before I fill it, so I don't know whether they can be changed with water in the tub.) They both work well and are vigorous enough to really stimulate and massage my feet. I like the vigorous massage, but if you just want a gentle massage, you can simply rest your feet on the devices and they'll feel very mild and gentle.
Here are the cons, though in my opinion the plusses far outweigh them:
– The casters are small and don't roll easily, especially on a rug. I have to use the handle and pull the unit along carefully by the rim to scoot it across the floor. It's not that it feels heavy (though it is, so tall and full of water); it's just awkward to shuffle it along.
– Because it's so tall, it holds a lot of water, and I need a bit of strength to heft it up onto the edge of the bathtub to empty it. The drain spout is down at the bottom of the unit, which makes sense, but you have to get the unit high enough to actually drain the water out into some receptacle, which would have to be so low to the ground that it would be difficult to get all the water out efficiently. So I do make the effort to lift the whole unit up on the bathtub edge and dump it in (pouring over the non-motor edge!).
– This one I learned the hard way: The handle is only for PULLING the unit gently across the floor. Not for lifting it! When the unit has water to the max fill line, the handle does not lift the load from the middle and actually TIPS the water out the front (onto the rug or floor). So just use the handle for a guide, not to lift.
Bottom line: I would definitely recommend this product and would buy it again.

reviews.title: Great for apply massage oil
reviews.text:
This jade roller bottle has been great for applying massage oil when I use a gua sha tool on the neck and back of my spouse. It gives the right amount of oil and spreads it around nicely. The jade ball feels very comfortable when rolling it on the skin.

Note: the bottle is not sealed so any liquids inside the bottle will flow out if not kept upright.

reviews.title: love this little roller
reviews.text: this little jade roller feels good on your face even without putting in ice or in the refrigerator. of course it feels fabulous after in the refrigerator to roll under your eyes in the morning. a must have

reviews.title: Working well for my moisturizer
reviews.text:
I got this to apply moisturizers and toners that come in liquid form and are sometimes sort of awkward to apply. This method seems less wasteful than a cotton ball. So far, this is working pretty well for that purpose.

The jade ball is nice. The bottle looks like glass but I think it's a thick plastic and it has measurements listed on the side. The black top is plastic, and I'm hoping that holds up, it might be a little thin where the roller is. Where you screw and unscrew it, that feels a little weak. So far it's holding up okay, though. There's also a clear plastic lid. The product page seems pretty serious about keeping the bottle stored upright, but the box doesn't mention that. I can see how fluid would come out though, so I'm not pressing it.

This seems pretty good for my needs and I'd recommend it. If you need a roller for something you have to refill often, you might want something with a stronger screw top, but for a thin toner or moisturizer this is working well so far. I'll update if I have any problems.

reviews.title: Cool little tool!
reviews.text: Neat little tool for helping ease minor pain or just using with warm massage oil. I tried it with ice and while it felt nice and cold and relieving, it was a bit messy as the ice melted if you tipped it up. It would leak some. I did enjoy using it with warm massage oil though. It made application super easy and less messy than normal. It will continue to be used for oil application as it works really well and glides on smooth with the jade roller ball. The container is plastic, so don’t place it in the microwave.

reviews.title: Jade roller ball
reviews.text: I was not expecting this to be empty and container so small  you have to crush an ice  just to use. This I feel would be perfect for beginners to a Jade roller. This is leak proof and can feel the oil I put in. I do feel this is a bit high in price.

reviews.title: Convenient and useful
reviews.text: I really like this. I mainly got this to either add small ice cubes to and/or keep in the freezer to help with puffy eyes. It seems to work well. Be cautious though when it’s at an upside down angle, liquid seeps past the roller ball but only while rolling. This is normal but can be slightly messy if you’re not expecting it. This will be useful in the mornings before getting ready for the day. I also think it could help relieve headaches by rolling on the temples and possibly even adding a smidge of diluted peppermint essential oil. I’ll have to experiment with that. This is made of plastic with a jade roller ball and measurements of 5ml to 30ml on the bottle. Very convenient.

reviews.title: Nice
reviews.text: My niece is an esthetician & has used a jade roller on my face while doing facials but I don't like having to keep them in the fridge so when I seen this that I can just put ice in to get cold knew I had to have it. I put oil on & then roll this over my face. I absolutely love this roller. Easy clean & stores away on my make up table in a holder

reviews.title: Meh, there’s better options
reviews.text:
I am very unimpressed with this jade roller. Upon ordering I thought this would be a lovely addition to my skin care routines. I thought I could use it for depuffing, to help increase product absorption or simply to apply a little massage oil before using my myofascial tools. I’m not even entire sure I can utilize this..

First the roller part detaches from the lid easily. On unboxing and just checking out the tool I placed the cap back on the tool and then when i went to remove it for first use the roller ball came right off the top. It took me about 15 minutes to be able to twist lock the rolled ball back to the lid. (First photo) Once I got the roller ball re attached and tried to place ice in the main compartment I found you cant get regular shaped ice in. Only broken ice will fit into the packaging. Secondly, the first time I place ice in it the roller was not cold at all what so ever. I actually had to place ice, let it melt and then place a second round of fresh ice in it for the roller ball to actually get cold. Thirdly, it has no fluid control at all what so ever. So when using this with ice or if the ice melts at all it will just profusely leak water all over where ever you’re applying it. So that rules out me being able to use this with massage oil.

I do like the size of the jade roller and I feel like the concept is there it just needs better packaging. I can’t say I would recommend this because it feels cheap. There’s better jade roller options on the market that would provide better consistency with use, effectiveness and results.

reviews.title: Broke immediately
reviews.text: This product seemed amazing. The jade was so smooth and soothing. However, the first time I tried opening it, it wouldn't close again. After struggling for a few minutes, I got it to close but I couldn't take the cap off or the top would pop off if I wasn't super careful. Cheap product.

reviews.title: 3.5 stars. Too small to fit ice cubes.
reviews.text:
This feels really soothing, especially around the eyes. I had a migraine with eye strain, and using this fresh from the freezer helped relax my eye muscles. The cold feels really good. Though I suppose I could freeze a spoon and use the back of that instead, the ball works well.

I like the roller ball part, but I don’t think the long, narrow shape of the tube works well. It’s too small to fit an ice cube, and I’m not going to crush ice to put in there. (I grabbed some fresh snow from outside to see if adding ice helps. ). I also wouldn’t store oils in there, because it’s not sealed, so the oil would spill if it tips over. And the long, narrow shape makes it more likely to be knocked over. The tube should be more short and squat, and should be sized to fit a standard ice cube. So I like the roller ball because it feels good around the eye area, but the tube isn’t very useful to me. I have it stored in the freezer so it will be nice and cold when I need it.

reviews.title: Stocking stuffer
reviews.text: This is a handy little gadget for gifting at holidays or birthdays.  It's basically a 30ml (1-oz) vial that's topped with a roller ball.  You can use it for essential oils application.  The unit is not sealed so you need to store it  with the ball side up.  Stating this, it does not travel well.  I find that with my hydrating liquid it feels so good on my face after it's been stored in the fridge.

reviews.title: Nicer Than I Was Expecting
reviews.text: I've used a jade roller before but this one is much nicer. It is made of a very thick plastic that has measurements on the side. The jade ball rolls smoothly. I have used this with my moisturizer and my face lotion. I'm going to get more so that I don't have to clean this in between. Although this is very easy to clean. So far I'm a fan of it.

reviews.title: Quality seems low but hasn't broken yet.
reviews.text: I wish I could freeze this, but the cold water did feel good on my face in the morning.  It seems a little flimsy so I hope it continues to work.

reviews.title: works well for oils
reviews.text: I am really surprised how cool this jade ball feels, without any added ice or products.  It says to crush ice, but the bottle is really small, so cold water is totally fine. I think this works great with massage oil and essential oils, as long as you take care to make sure the lid is secure. It does leak a little when water is in there, maybe just the thickness of product.  This is a nice addition to any skin care routine, or a great gift idea.

reviews.title: Relaxing Mini Face Massager
reviews.text: This roller works nicely when chilled in the freezer and for applying oils. It is small and difficult to get ice cubes from my freezer into it, but that's the whole point, it's a mini roller so you need mini ice cubes. Crushing the ice in a plastic bag and pouring the crushed ice in is an option.

reviews.title: Jade stays cool even without ice
reviews.text: I like this roller, I was impressed when I tried it the first time without adding ice, the jade was cold and it stayed cold for a while, it felt nice on my eyes, under eye area and temples, those are the areas that I work on every time I use it, the tube is small but I have used crushed ice that comes out of the fridge's door and I fit the smaller pieces so haven't had a problem with that.

reviews.title: Nice addition to beauty routine!
reviews.text:
I'm actually fascinated with this and its a nice addition to my morning routine.
I keep it in the freezer overnight then in the morning I add my serum (enough just for one use) and not only does it help apply my serum but it also helps with inflammation!

reviews.title: Decent option for a first time user
reviews.text: This isn't a terrible option for starting to explore the benefits of jade rolling.  It's definitely not leakproof, and there is a warning about this in the instructions.  In order to use it with ice you have to melt or crush the ice down enough to fit in, and then the cold doesn't last long.  But overall the basic functions of this are a great place to start to see if it gives you the benefits you need.

reviews.title: scent is too much for me on this one, but there other ones are awesome; great nourishing scrub
reviews.text:
This is my second scrub with this company. The first was great, but I find that the fragrance is too much for me with this Honey one. These products do contain "parfum" as an added ingredient, but it is last on the list. I have included a picture of the ingredients as I do not see the list anywhere else. My other salt scrub by this company-bloodorange, and that scent is wonderful and fresh, in bottle, in shower, and on skin after (very light). This one is just heavy, rather perfume like. I have noticed some shea containing products have that, but the other one that I do like has shea as well but isn't cloying. So I don't know. I'm afraid it might trigger a headache for me. I may have to have someone else in the household finish it off. Love the other one I mentioned, though!

As for how it works- no problem. A thick frosting like creamy texture with a hint of grit. It does a nice job cleaning, polishing, and leaving the skin feel smooth and moisturized. It is a gentle scrub- very gentle. Definitely softens skin. I scoop out a generous 1/8-1/4 cup amount to use on my body. With that amount, I expect several uses from this squat container. I particularly like this one for my legs and feet as they are the most neglected in terms of skin care.

I really do like Natural Soultion salt scrubs, and it appears that there are 4 kinds. This one based solely on the fragrance is a miss for me, but another one happened to be a hit for me, which I will continue to use as needed.

EDIT: While a whiff from the container is too strong for me, the actual aroma in the shower continues to be pretty tame. It dawned on me to smell my skin after showering (something I didn't do with prior showers prior to initial review), and my skin doesn't have that strong smell that I note from the container. It smells pleasant and light, and I wanted to come back to say so.SO I just wanted to say that I haven't had a headache, and I don't actually smell like the scent from the container- I was concerned I would have that perfume smell. It isn't there, thankfully.

I'd boost it to a 5 rating, but the product descriptions says, "No Artificial Fragrances Or Perfumes", and "parfum" is on ingredient list- and doesn't say where that is derived from.

reviews.title: Really good stuff!
reviews.text:
This body scrub is really nice. It smells so good and it smooths the and nourishes the skin perfectly. When you rub this gently onto your skin then rinse it off you can instantly feel the difference. It feels as if all the dead skin has been removed and your pores have been opened. It leaves you soft and refreshed as well as incredibly relaxed.
This is a big jar as well that you get and it's worth it for the price. It's definitely worth giving a try if you are interested and able to. It's really good. I love it.

reviews.title: Very small salt crystals, but smells good!
reviews.text:
The best way to describe the scent of this exfoliating scrub is to say it smells like you just walked into a day spa. It's a truly lovely smell, light, fresh, salty, and luxurious. I've actually tried using it as a lotion instead because the fragrance is so nice, but it didn't really work out. It's very creamy, though, and when you put a dollop in your hand, it might seem like there aren't any salt crystals in it, because the cream is thick like lotion.
There was quite a bit of settling in the packaging when I opened the jar, and since I ended up using quite a bit in the shower, I don't think it'll last very long--perhaps a month. The salt crystals are very small, and when I tried to vigorously scrub, it washed away before I could properly exfoliate.
How I recommend using it, in order to get the best use out of the Himalayan salt is to wet your leg before you step unto the shower, so it's a little more than damp. Then take a dollop and scrub your leg, and when you're done with whatever appendages you wanted to exfoliate, hop in the shower and rinse it off. Somehow, when my legs and arms were really drenched, the scrub just slid right off. Less moisture helped it adhere better. The smell really is great and refreshing, and once I've figured out how to use it, I've started enjoying it more.

reviews.title: Love this scrub
reviews.text: This is the most amazing sugar scrub. I feel like I've been to the spa after a quick shower at home. Hoes on smooth Lily. Rinses cleanly. Soft relaxing scent. Not too harsh on my sensitive skin. I love it.

reviews.title: Gentle Body Scrub
reviews.text: A nice body scrub, not too abrasive. However, I didn’t feel that it was that great as an exfoliating scrub and I found the smell to be a bit overwhelming.

reviews.title: works great
reviews.text: I like this body scrub, it works great and smells nice too.  It works great in the winter to get rid of that dry dull skin.  It left my skin feeling soft and smooth.  easy to use and left my skin feeling great.  A lot of things in one scrub.  very happy with it.

reviews.title: Hard to use in shower
reviews.text:
This product smells good and feels great, and works very well with dry hands. The only issue I have is when trying to use in the shower, most of it goes down the drain. It just falls off of my hands and skin. It is so slippery, most of it falls the the shower floor before I can get it rubbed on lol. It works very well if my skin is dry, I can actually rub it on and scrub, but if I'm wet, i can't manage it. Lol. Now using a nice thick wash cloth helps, but I just feel like my money is literally going down the drain. Hahahahahaha

In order to use this, I get in the shower, scrub with the body scrub, and THEN turn on the water to rinse, wash hair etc. This works well, and I do feel really nice afterwards. I really enjoy the smell too.

reviews.title: Naturally Wonderful
reviews.text: I love anything with Himalayan Pink salt and this product is no exception. I like that it feels natural, like I can make it in my kitchen and It mixes easily with my shower gel. My skin feels so soft and smooth after using this. When the seasons change, I like to use an exfoliating scrub because I tend to have dry, dead skin. This scrub is exactly what I need to transition from warm weather to cooler temperatures. Definitely, recommend this product.

reviews.title: Very pleasant to use, and moisturizing!
reviews.text: This is a really nice body scrub which is very pleasant to use.  The honey  base is not overly oily, and even without a heavy amount of scrubbing it does a great job of busting through more stubborn buildup of old skin, etc.  I like it a lot, and will definitely be using this more!

reviews.title: Great scrub!!!
reviews.text: This scrub smells good. It's a very warm, comforting scent. I used this scrub in the shower after I shaved to exfoliate my legs and loved how it left my legs feeling. It's also really hydrating, so I didn't feel like I needed to immediately slather on lotion...

reviews.title: Great product all around!
reviews.text: I love this exfoliating scrub! I tried the one with honey and it smells great, works amazing and left my skin feeling like new! I gave 4 stars because the seal was not on and it leaked out, I worried that it had been tampered with but I didn't see any obvious signs that it had. I tried this on my hands first and had no adverse reactions so I used it on my face and body thereafter. This did burn a little on my face but so does any exfoliating scrub as I have somewhat sensitive skin. It made my skin so silky soft and moisturized! I thought it would be sticky as it contains honey and it wasn't sticky at all. The price is very fair considering this has no artificial ingredients and no chemicals. It didn't leave me feeling greasy or oily, just buttery smooth and clean. I'm in love with this stuff and will be buying more!

reviews.title: Yogurty Texture With a Bit of Salt
reviews.text:
My skin is soft after using this body scrub, but I don't think I can exactly attribute it solely to this scrub. Contrary to public opinion, I liked the smell. It has a think yogurty texture with just a bit of textured Himalayan salt, not sure you can call it a scrub.

I was surprised when I opened the container. When I opened the lid to the cream inside. The foil cover seamed to already be broken. Made me unsure if I should be putting it on my body. And the product seam to be organically spooned in the container, it reminded me of a homemade product. But after all that worry, my skin is fine and I am fine.

Over all I think it is fine. If you are wanting a scrub, this is not the product for you. If you are looking for a moisturizer, this may be the product for you.

reviews.title: Great product all around!
reviews.text: I love this exfoliating scrub! I tried the one with honey and it smells great, works amazing and left my skin feeling like new! I gave 4 stars because the seal was not on and it leaked out, I worried that it had been tampered with but I didn't see any obvious signs that it had. I tried this on my hands first and had no adverse reactions so I used it on my face and body thereafter. This did burn a little on my face but so does any exfoliating scrub as I have somewhat sensitive skin. It made my skin so silky soft and moisturized! I thought it would be sticky as it contains honey and it wasn't sticky at all. The price is very fair considering this has no artificial ingredients and no chemicals. It didn't leave me feeling greasy or oily, just buttery smooth and clean. I'm in love with this stuff and will be buying more!

reviews.title: Puts A Layer Of Silky Smoothness Between You & Your Make-Up
reviews.text:
N3 No Name Necessary Pore-Minimizing Mattifying Oil and Shine Control Anti-aging Makeup Face Primer Spray (200ml) puts a layer of silky smoothness between your skin and your make-up. I have combination skin- some parts dry, regular and oily. I also have aging skin, so I really didn’t think this primer spray would help me, but it surprisingly did. This comes in a spray bottle and you have to shake the bottle well before spraying, keeping your eyes tightly shut.

It sprays with a fine mist, but has a foaming in it. After spraying, I gently rubbed it more evenly on my face. It dries instantly and wow, my face felt like velvet. If anyone knows about aging skin- your make-up shows the fine lines and wrinkles more exaggerated. This primer spray somehow smooths your skin more, leaving it like a smooth slate for make-up. I am very impressed with this spray, as nothing helps aging skin like this does for make-up, powder, even touch up concealers. A wonderful product. 5 STARS.

reviews.title: Seems good
reviews.text: I think I like this - I've never used a primer before, and the first time I tried it, I didn't really notice anything. No pore shrinkage. Nothing great. But then my daughter used it and her skin looked great.So I tried it again I think my skin looked better - not matte, but kind of smooth and glowing. I have used it a few days and I think I like it. It's refreshing, yet really odd to spray it on my face.

reviews.title: Great product, face stays looking fresh all day
reviews.text: I am typically low maintenance with make up but wanted to try this product as I live in the sweltering heat of south Florida year round. First thing I noticed is this is a very nice sized bottle, almost as big as a standard can of hairspray.  I have been using this product for a week now and have definitely noticed a difference. My pores are less noticeable and my makeup lasts much longer than without the product. My face looks and feels smooth all day.  It’s so easy to use too!  All you have to do is shake it up and spray your face several times before applying makeup.  I haven’t noticed a scent to it and barely notice the product at all when I spray it on.  Now I just wish I had a travel size to take with me on upcoming trips!  I definitely recommend giving this a try!

reviews.title: Very fine mist
reviews.text: This primer is nothing short of amazing. The mist that a nozzle gives is a huge deal when it comes to coverage. Some times if the mist is too much its just too messy. But the mist on this one is so fine I barely felt anything on my face when I was applying it and had to be sure that I was even getting product on my faec and opened my eyes to check. I did use more than the recommended amount, which I found to be a bit on the low side since the size of the mist is so small the amount of product that you get out on a single spray is minimum. After I applied, I watched in the mirror as it dried, and the effects were amazing. My shine do go away and I could literally see my pore getting smaller. I could see myself using this alone on a hot summer day without makeup because the finish it gave was just that great. My makeup also went on very easy and smooth and felt as if it was gliding across my face and not going into every wrinkle and groove. I didn't wear my makeup anything close to 16 hours but I did make it through a 8 hour workday flawless. Defiantly a staple now in my makeup bag.

reviews.title: Helps a bit
reviews.text:
I wear a lot of makeup when I have to perform for movie parties, and my costumes are usually extremely hot, so I can use all the help I can get when it comes to keeping my makeup in place! This does seem to help a bit, I notice in particular that my cheek color stays on much better. When I don't use a primer, it's like my skin drinks it up within just a few hours. So it definitely helps with that.

I really don't see any change in the texture of my skin when I use it, no minimizing of lines or pores or anything like that. I was kind of hoping a nice little mist of vitamins might help (& feel good) even when I'm not wearing makeup, but to be honest it doesn't really feel much different. I tried for a few days & then I kept forgetting all about it - that's how dramatic the difference...wasn't. I'll still keep using it under makeup for performances, when I really need that stuff to stay put, but I probably won't rush to buy it again after I run out.

reviews.title: Did not work on my oily skin
reviews.text: I really wanted to love this product and have been using it for a few weeks, before applying my makeup. My skin is oily and I get shiny really quickly. I was excited to try this product because I was hoping it would diminish appearance of pores and keep my makeup on looking matte longer. But with or without this primer my results are about the same. I get shiny within just a couple of hours. I did not notice much result from it at all. It works like a mist - and it’s quite pleasant, makes it easier to apply my makeup, but other than that no promised results.

reviews.title: Quick Application and Lightweight
reviews.text: Never having used a spray on primer I wasn't sure what to expect. I like this primer. I need about 3 pumps and my face is covered in a fine mist. I can pat to spread out the mist if it looks unevenly applied. It dries quickly so I can begin applying my foundation. I haven't noticed my skin getting any more or less oily late in the day. My old primer was much thicker than this one. I like the lightness of it and I like how quickly it dries. There is no scent which I also like. My sensitive skin has not reacted to this product. I would recommend.

reviews.title: Shine control and staying power!
reviews.text:
As a person who wants my makeup to stay put throughout the day, I'm always looking for something new that will hopefully work. I'm surprised with how well this helps my makeup last on my oil prone face. I also use this alongside my Revlon primer which is a spread on formula, and Urban Decay's All Nighter, but I saw how much of a difference it made when I started spraying on N3 Primer Spray after using Revlon's.

My face does get oily after my shift at work and I don't even do anything that would cause me to sweat since I have a desk job but this has curbed that shiny face a whole lot and I can get off work and look in the mirror and notice that my makeup is still in place and looking good unlike how it used to look before, patchy and uneven, almost as if the oil on my face started to make my foundation separate and I hated it because it looked terrible. I'm so glad I gave this primer spray a try.

The spray has a pleasant smell and I like that it's also a big bottle which will last me for a while. I am definitely adding this product back to my makeup routine once I run out.

reviews.title: Finally
reviews.text: This is literally the only primer I've ever tried that actually delivered on it's promise to keep my makeup going all day. I've battled with my oily skin forever and, primer or not, by midday my makeup would be totally gone. Today, for the first time in my life, my makeup has lasted until I got home. I don't know what kind of sorcery this is but I love it.

reviews.title: Good smell, fine mist, helps with oil
reviews.text: Refreshing mist to put on before makeup, I do believe it helps with oil. Smells good and the spray is very fine.

reviews.title: I like this Primer
reviews.text:
This was my first time trying a primer. I was having pics taken during 90deg weather and thought I'd try it. Generally, I do not wear makeup so this was a stretch. The directions said to spray 8-10 in away from the face - I had trouble spraying from that far away. When I did manage to spray it, I got it onto my eyes which could be user error but......

Once on, it tingled a bit but did seem to minimize my pores. My makeup definitely went on better and seemed to stay on better in the heat/humidity. I'm definitely going to keep using it since I seldom wear any makeup. I'm not sure if I had to apply daily that I would bother.

reviews.title: keeps the face looking matted
reviews.text:
this stuff works so well! my skin tends to get oily by mid day, esp during the hotter days, but man this stuff really works! the spray not only keeps the face looking matted but it also help keep my makeup lasting through the day! so amazing what a few sprays does!

i've had it for a couple of months now and i still have alot in the bottle left. it's definitely a stock up item!

reviews.title: Amazing stuff!
reviews.text:
Coming from a total Makeup Klutz, this product is - fantastic??!
I don't always wear foundation or pressed powder or anything to cover everything, but I really should.
Had an event on Sat. that I stepped it up for & tried this... long story short, IT WORKS.
I washed & lotioned my face as usual, then waited an hour or so to let it totally absorb.
Sprayed this & let it dry.
Applied a cream foundation that I've used before but, this time, it seemed to spread more evenly & easily and it looked really smooth & nice!
Received husband compliments & girlfriends at event compliments!
Whatever the magic is in this spray bottle, I'll be sure to keep it on hand.

reviews.title: Works ok
reviews.text: Doesn’t feel greasy

reviews.title: The best primer I have ever used
reviews.text:
This Primer is wonderful, the best I have ever used.
This product is extremely smooth, silky and super easy to apply. It makes my skin feel like silk and keeps make up on longer than usual.
I will definitely be ordering this one again

reviews.title: Terrific results from a very unique design
reviews.text:
I have been a huge fan of the relatively inexpensive, paperish, hugely saturated facial masks by companies like My Beauty Diary and others ( you can find my many positive reviews) until stumbling upon these lacey, saturated, fantastic masks.

I really can't contribute more than other outstanding reviewers have elaborated on the technical advantages of these lacey versions compared to the paper ones except to say how wonderful it is to position the mask over your face and neck and then be able to gently secure it by pulling it over your ears. Genious. The paper masks were good except the chin area never stays in place and I'm always checking to make sure the rest of it hasn't slid around on my face.

These cost a little more but the results were so great after my first one, I immediately purchased 3 more boxes of this version and another one to try out.

I am way past 50, but my skin looks terrific. Smooth, soft, healthy and glowing. I could not be happier. Go ahead and give these a try. But you better hurry before I buy them all up.

reviews.title: Amazing and Hydrating
reviews.text:
This is the first time using this product and I was pleasantly surprised. When I received the box the first thing I liked was the packaging. Adorable box with cute cartoons on it and the individual mask package is really nice as well.

How I used it. First washed my face and dried it. Then gently took the lace mask out of the package and peeled the backing off. The mask is loaded with product on it and I didn't waste a bit and put excess from the bag on my hands and arms as well. I padded the mask down on my face and attached the part for you ears to secure it on your face. Then went to relax for the next 15-20min and enjoyed the feeling. When you take the mask off do not wash off the serum instead run it into your face.

I've never used this brand before but I'm officially hooked! I've just turned 30 so I'm taking my skin care more seriously these days and very happy I found these masks. It's been a week since I've used it and my face is still feeling and looking great. I've started to purchase their other masks to see what I like best. I have nothing bad to say about this product it worked very well for me and I did notice a difference in my face. It also really liked the strap that goes under your chin. When I took it off it felt like it lifted and tightened my skin with still being extremely hydrated.
Try it, it's great.

reviews.title: PINKGO Girl white yogurt face mask
reviews.text: Of all the PINKGO Girl sheet masks, this one is my favorite and seems the most effective.  It is very luxurious.

reviews.title: Nice but not for sensitive skin
reviews.text:
This is the first time that I've used a mask from this line. And I have to admit that the packaging influenced my purchase:)
I really like the feel of the serum and the light fragrance. I, unlike other reviewers, couldn't fit it over my ears. Also the eye holes were way too small. Tip: use the peeI off backing and laid it on my neck and chest.
Left it on for 10 minutes and when I removed it I have small bumps all over my face, but now after 30 minutes, they seem to be going away. Once the serum dries it does feel a little tight on your face but it does not dry out the skin. I finished with a rich moisturizer to "seal the deal." The next morning my face felt very soft but still had a few bumps around the mouth area. My advice would be for those who have dry, sensitive skin, might want to be weary of this mask. Not the mask's fault, mind you, just not a good match for my skin. I would have given it 5 stars but took one off because of the bumps...

reviews.title: Awesome face mask
reviews.text: I actually bought this in the brand's variety pack. They are all great but this one stands out in my opinion. It feels amazing on and my skin feels great after I take it off.

reviews.title: Magic mask
reviews.text: Amazing! You will see the results from the first time

reviews.title: Works! Felt the firming and moisturizing of my skin minutes, and hours later
reviews.text:
My delight with this lace face mask was beyond expectation, I do recommend it.
5 packs came in the box I will continue to use this product, I’m even going to share a pack with my sister and best friend. Perfect for busy moms like us who need a little fun and self-pampering once in a while!

I’m used to to gel and cream masks that you leave on, so this concept was new to me and I have to admit it was a unique and very cool experience. It was very easy to use: wash face, then simply apply the lace mask over face, leave on for 15 mins and done.

I was laughing and making faces at my family with the dainty pretty lace sheet on haha, it was fun and funny. The cotton material is stretchy so it fit on my face just perfect and The best part is it had no smell, it stayed on my face while I walked around the house, and after I took it off and wiped my face clean I did feel good about it and felt the firming and moisturizing of my skin minutes, and hours later.

If this review was helpful please give a thumbs up thank you

reviews.title: ... for my face and didn't notice much benefit but adorable lace pattern
reviews.text: A little small for my face and didn't notice much benefit but adorable lace pattern!

reviews.title: Vendor gone bad!?!?
reviews.text:
04/28/2016-UPDATE: I just received my 5th order of this mask in 5 months and while I still like it very much, the formulation has changed from a lovely light serum gel to a more watery, less slickery one. With the other boxes, there was still an abundance of serum on my face after wearing for 20-25 mins to massage in along with my finishing serum. Now its dry in places after that time has elapsed. I hope the next box is the old formula.
06/10/2016-UPDATE: 6th order is the same watery texture but a new addition is a medicinal, Mercurochrome smell. Very odd. It seems to be working okay, but not as great as the first several orders.

I have tried many types of sheet masks with good and bad results. This one has had the best result of all the ones I've tried. At first I was not too keen on the lace aspect, but the over the ear hoops for the face and extra length for the neck area piqued my interest enough to buy my first pack. After cleansing, toner and misting on essence is applied, I put the mask on for 20 minutes and finish up with my serum and moisturizer. The mask is saturated with liquid so I take the backing and what is left in the packet and rub on my hands, arms and décolletage. The serum soaks right into the skin leaving it soft and free of any stickiness. The next day your skin will look even better. I try to do two a week and have ordered the yogurt twice, the other brightening one and the papaya (regular sheet mask). I will continue to keep in rotation as they do work well, don't break me out and are priced and packed for convenience.
UPDATE!!! 12/09/2016-I have ordered this mask numerous times and it has gotten progressively worse with each order. This time the mask lace was brown in color, smelled really bad and spoiled and medicinal(never had this before) yet the expire date on the packet was 20181027. Needless to say it went straight in the garbage. I don't know what is going on with this vendor but I will not be ordering this again.

reviews.title: Best brand here on amazon hands down. Best customer service as well!
reviews.text: These are simply amazing! All of the Hey! Pinkgo Girl masks are though. Just incredible!

reviews.title: Super moist, reduces acne scars, and dries out pimples!
reviews.text:
Super moist! They drip while on my face! They're that moist!
After one use my acne scars were visibly lighter and my skin was glowing.
They're an essential part of my skincare routine now(:
Also idk why but it slightly dries out active pimples while still hydrating my face, It's so cool.

reviews.title: works amazing on my skin and the ear straps are great
reviews.text: works amazing on my skin and the ear straps are great. i never have to worry about the mask sliding off.

reviews.title: Will purchase again!
reviews.text: My face has been greatly improved since I started using this mask. During the weather change my skin turned so dry, flaky and itchy that the makeup didn't stay. This rich sheet mask provides so much moisture and nutrients, and fix those problems on my face. I just finished my first box and will definitely purchase again!

reviews.title: High quality five-star sheet mask
reviews.text: I absolutely love this lace sheet mask mask! My face tends to be dull and dry due to the lack of sleep. This mask never disappointed me. It made my skin glowing and looking healthy. I also noticed some of my dark spots are less visible. So glad my face can improve so much just by putting the mask on! Love love it! Do yourself a favor and give it a try!

reviews.title: Cool, but not effective
reviews.text: Cool concept as a mask, its so pretty, but I don't see any noticeable results. I like this brand after buying the "Hey! Pinkgo Girl black rose collagen mask, so decided to try this because its more expensive and fancy, but the cheaper ones worked way better on me. These are kind of too thick, which makes me feel like nothing is actually being transferred onto my skin. It doesnt absorb the liquid from the bag and transfer it onto my face - i feel like it just absorbs all the liquid into the mask itself! Stay with the cheaper ones!

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Amazzzing! Will auto-order these for sure!

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Works great and Brightens immediately, the yogurt does the trick in the masks!!

reviews.title: Great product,instant result
reviews.text: I like this product very much,my skin feel very soft and smooth.it's fully soaked in serum,my skin look glowing also.truly love this product.but it's little bit costly

reviews.title: Very nice!
reviews.text: I really liked using these. They seemed to have a really good effect, without irritating my very sensitive skin. I'm always worried when I try something new -- I get redness, irritation and in bad cases hives so trying anything is a risk. I had absolutely NO problems with these and they left my skin feeling soft and supple and well moisturized.

reviews.title: Much more than just hyaluronic acid! Very moisturizing and best fitting for my face. 5 stars⭐
reviews.text:
I love these masks! For the price and how many you get, I was surprised to find the plastic backing. I really like this, because I can open it up and make a few cuts using the plastic and its cutouts as my guide to make it easier. I cut right through the plastic and the mask at the same time. I always have to cut a little slit at both the inner and outer corners of the eye openings, and also the outer corners of the mouth opening, as I like to move my mouth a bit and I have extremely dry eyes and the serum always gets into them, if I don't. This also lets it lay down flat on my nose and eyebrows better. I also cut four slits at about 10 and 2 o clock and 4:30 and 7:30, or roughly equal spacing coming upward diagonally from my eyes and coming down and outwards diagonally from the corners of my mouth. My face is a bit small, and this helps me to be able to overlap those areas and make them fit better, especially with larger masks. With these, I have to do the shallowest cutting ever, because they fit so well. They cover my entire face better than any mask I've used. I haven't had a problem with them lifting up or drying out at all. It also helps with something I will share later in my review.
It takes a little finagling, but I manage to squeeze a bit of the serum off the mask while removing it from the package. I start before I even open the package by pushing all the serum to the bottom. I cut the top open, grab the top of the Mask, and fold the sides of the package inward, almost in half, using my non-dominant hand. I start pulling out the mask while squeezing the top closed around it as best I can. This squeezes out a good bit of the way too much extra serum that comes out if I don't do this.
I love hyaluronic acid, but these masks have so many more wonderful ingredients than just that. Almost every ingredient is so nutrient-rich or moisturizing for the skin. I use Retin-A and these are the most soothing masks 1 to 2 days after my application nights, which are every 3 nights. These moisturize my face so well and they feel great while I have them on. I don't want to take them off when the timer goes off. There's plenty of serum in the package to use elsewhere, like on your neck & decollete, and even on your hands. I always put a moisturizer on afterwards to hold all the nutrients and moisture in properly.
I learned a trick while back from another reviewer that I've been doing since I read it. When taking a mask off my face, I cut it into 4 pieces. Mainly, I cut them apart at the forehead, cheeks, and chin areas, using the four diagonal cuts I made, but you can make the cuts as you wish. I usually discard the small pieces that cover the nose and upper lip. I then take those four pieces, put them back in the serum that's left in the package remoisten them, with these that is no problem, or just add a little hyaluronic acid serum to moisten them again, put them on my neck and decollete area the best I can, and wait another 15 or 20 minutes. This really lets me get the most possible use out of every mask.
I really love these masks and all of the skin loving ingredients they contain. They make my face feel wonderful afterwards and the effects last all day, if not longer. These are definitely on my must-have list. Highly recommend!

reviews.title: Good hydration and plumping!
reviews.text: I like these face masks, and for the price, they cant’t be beat!  Pros:  they stay in place without slipping or dripping, even while I move around; within an hour of use my skin feels more moisturized,; after several uses my skin looks more plumped; non-irritating and scent free; they cover my entire face; and of course, at about $1 each, the price is great!  Cons:  the masks are folded with a backing sheet but are still trickier than most to unfold; the eye holes are a little small; and my skin feels sticky after I remove the masks and pat in the remaining serum, so I have to splash cool water to get my skin feeling clean.  Overall, these are a great as a daily mask!

reviews.title: Pretty good anti aging facial masks..
reviews.text: These face masks seems to be really good for now for me skin,it moisturizes and hydrates very well and I really like how my skin looks and feels after using this mask.I have a sensitive skin but I didn’t notice any irritation or redness,good product.

reviews.title: Decent face mask
reviews.text: I have been trying to find a solution to my dry skin.  I used these face masks to see if there is any difference in my skin.  I have to say that these face masks really absorb moisture into my skin.  I have used other masks in the past with mixed results.  These come individually sealed pouches with a piece of thin plastic inside to hold the mask.  I think these masks have a good amount of liquid inside each pouch.  The mask is rather thin.  I wore the mask until the liquid dried out.  It did feel nice on the skin and provided good moisture for my face.  The hyaluronic acid is an added bonus to this mask because it does make the skin retain more moisture.  I think this does help my skin with slight improvement but this feels like an average mask in general.  This is a decent set of masks for the price.

reviews.title: Good Face Mask for Moisturization
reviews.text:
The order of the face masks come packaged in a box. There are 24 face masks individually packaged. The mask comes with a clear plastic layer underneath that's folded up with the face mask. This allows for the face mask to be easily removed andn opened, because other products just have the face mask folded up by itself and it's always a struggle to unfold them.

The face mask is a perfect fit for my face. There are plenty of face masks out there that are oversized or does not have the slits in the right place to fit the face form, but I could tell the fit would be perfect the moment I put them on.

The face masks are soaked in hyaluronic acid and there was plenty left in the package after the face mask was removed, for me to squeeze additional gel onto my face. I left the face mask on for about 15 minutes. The area around my nose and cheeks still had plenty of moisture on it but the edges near the chin were dried up. The face mask seems to harden in the areas that are dried up.

After the application, my skin did not absorb all the serum and it was still wet. I gently tapped around the area to get it evenly spread and dissolve. The skin felt moisturized. It wasn't sticky nor did it dry up my face. I am satisfied with the result and the product.

reviews.title: Keeps me moisturized
reviews.text: I've been using these every week. So far I've seen  that my skin is retaining moisture better. My skin also looks more taunt. Very happy with my selection.

reviews.title: Helps with my adult acne
reviews.text: I struggle with adult acne and these facemasks help keep my condition under control. These masks feel soothing to my irritated and inflamed skin and moisturize the areas that tend to get dry from acne medications. These have a mild scent that doesn't flare my skin problems further. The masks stretch and po ssf ition well and are comfortable and breathable to wear. The pack is a great value as one box lasts me over a month. They are the perfect tool to help me feel more confident in my own skin.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: I chose to use the full treatment before bed, and my skin felt very soft and renewed. It has a wonderful, clean aroma, and does not feel like a peel or any other face mask. For those who are using for first time, a word of caution. The mask will slide all over the place after you open it, so slowly open the package holding it up or sideways so that it is flat. Be careful not to drop it! Also be patient and place it on one section of your face at a time. It will fit every area of your face, and you can adjust it to your face shape and size. Depending on how long you choose to use it, may slide a bit.

reviews.title: 10/10 Would recommend!
reviews.text:
I ordered this even after seeing that it is recommended for “young skin...to prevent wrinkles” and I am so glad I did! Old or young, this mask is for you!

It’s a nice, thin sheet and every package has more than enough serum in it. After placing the face mask (which fits me well) I use the extra serum on my neck, décolleté, and hands. I usually read or watch something on my tablet while I’m wearing it which means I have my glasses on. I am so pleased that they sit well on my nose and don’t interfere with the action of the mask in any way. It has never irritated my sensitive skin, and has proven soothing when my skin is having a reaction to something else.

These are also remarkably affordable (when I ordered them) for what you get which means I can use them regularly rather than save them for emergencies and special occasions!

10/10 Would recommend!

reviews.title: Great Serum!!
reviews.text:
I am a serum junky so I feel like I have a pretty good idea on what to look for in serums! Hollyberry Cosmetics, Clinical Strength Hyaluronic + Vitamin C Serum For Dry and Problem Skin - Premium Skin Moisturizer Anti Wrinkle and fine lines. Brighten + Even Blemishes Quick drying, is AWESOME! I truly love most any serums that have Vitamin C in them. I have only been using this serum for about four days and I can already see a difference! My face has cleared up almost completely. It is a clear serum that is not too runny, which I love because there is not such a rush to just "throw' it on your face before it runs down your fingers. This serum soaks in rather quickly, so if you are like me, and have a whole regimen of serums, toners, moisturizers, ect, to put on your face, neck, and chest, following with make up, this is quite important to me. I can also see the brightening part of this serum working for my complexion, evening it out. I am only twenty seven years old, but I did a lot of tanning in high school, so I am trying to make up for the damage I caused to my skin, and its never too early to prepare your skin for aging that will come in the future. I have two children ages four and five, so I am tired quite often, which causes dark circles under my eyes, and this Clinical Strength Hyaluronic + Vitamin C Serum For Dry and Problem Skin - Premium Skin Moisturizer Anti Wrinkle and fine lines. Brighten + Even Blemishes Quick drying works for this as well! The ingredients are perfect in covering quite a few different problems, so its kind of an all in one, type serum, which i love! I am a very impatient person, so I like serums that I can either see or feel a difference rather immediately, than a serum that you have to use for a long time before seeing results, so if you are like me, I definitely recommend this serum!! I have spent all kinds of money on super expensive serums thinking that the more money you spend, the more results you will see, and that is just not the case.

Also, when I try a new serum, I do not use any other serums that are similar to this one, so I can get a good idea of what results this serum will really show. I like to add that in because even though I have many serums, if I were to use a similar serum to this one, I like to give it a fair chance! This one definitely passed!!
I did receive this product for free or a discounted price, but I was in no way compensated or told to leave a good review. I take my reviews VERY seriously, as I am an avid amazon shopper and rely solely on others HONEST reviews when making my purchases. I know there are some bad eggs out there that will leave a 5 star review for any product they receive for free or a discounted price, but I am not one of them. I am asked to leave an **honest** review, and that is what I do. Feel free to look through my profile and see this for yourself. Also, if my review has helped you in any way, please do not hesitate to hit the helpful button! If you feel I could have written a better review or have any tips on how I could improve my reviews please let me know, and I will try my best to improve! I truly hope this helped!

reviews.title: It's great!
reviews.text:
This is a thick vitamin C serum and I am extremely pleased with the results I am getting while using this. There is no added fragrance and it does not sting or burn at all while using this product. (well...at least I haven't experienced it so far.) It comes with a glass dropper to make using more convenient and to use as little or as much as you like. It is clear in color. I only use a little of this serum on my face and neck, as it takes very little to see improvements. If I use too much, it becomes sticky and less likely to dry as fast as I like it to. My skin is brighter and healthier and has a subtle glow that everyone had commented on lately. I am no longer dealing with an oily t-zone because this has definitely had a drying effect on the oiliness of my skin, thankfully! My only issue is, that I can't get much out of the dropper because of the thickness of this serum. Overall, I am very pleased with this vitamin C serum and the effects are wonderful!

*Disclaimer*
I was fortunate enough to have received this product at a discounted price in exchange for my honest and unbiased review

reviews.text:
This hyaluronic acid vitamin c serum came in a 1 fluid ounce brown glass bottle with a dropper. This vitamin c serum is organic and natural. Not tested on animals, no parabens, no sulfates, no alcohol. The serum states it helps with premature ageing, and help with giving your skin a fresh look as well as hydrating, firming, and plumping our skin. I am getting older so I am always looking for a natural product that will help with premature ageing. This serum feels very nice on my skin. I have been using it twice a day since I have received it and I have notice a change in my skin already. I have noticed that my skin is more even and my skin also has a nice glow to it. The serum does have my skin looking very refreshed and hydrated. My best friend just recently asked me what was on my face and neck because I was glowing. I told her what I was using and she plans on getting a bottle her self. Even though I have not started to get any wrinkles I still want to be able to get a jump start on things. I really like this serum, the serum is not that thick and a little goes along way. I also like how the serum dries really fast on my face. I will have to add this to my facial regimen.

reviews.title: Love this product so far
reviews.text: Love this product so far! This is the second time I have purchased it. I use it in the morning and at night. I see a difference in the brightness and a glow in my skin. It appears to be firmer around the sides of my mouth and eye area. Skin undergoes constant wear and tear and with any product you have be consistent and give it time to work. In my opinion about two months before you start realistically seeing a difference.

reviews.title: I love this for long, frizz free hair.
reviews.text:
I really like this! I have long hair myself, and 4 daughters with long hair, I just use a couple pumps right on the brush and it makes hair so smooth and shiny. Adding this to the brush instead of my hands makes it so much easier and less mess on my hands.
this also has such a pleasant smell.

reviews.title: Highly Recommend!!
reviews.text:
I received this product for free in exchange for an honest review. The next morning I washed my hair and followed directions. It felt so smooth and had a nice fragrance to it. I really used a small amount, about the size of a pea – if that. My hair felt amazingly smooth. I use a straightener but it seemed like this product helped that process.

That day it rained and I got stuck in it – bye straight hair! Later I went to fix the frizz and pick up my husband when all of a sudden Im standing there looking in the mirror. My hair was straight. It had picked up some volume from the humidity but it didn’t look bad at all! So now full of confidence I charged on to finish my day. My husband had made a few comments about my hands being soft. I didn’t think anything about that but they did feel softer.

reviews.title: More silicone than argan oil. Actual ingredients not clearly listed.
reviews.text:
I bought this because the seller listed the main ingredients as argan oil and resvesterol, when in fact the product is full of silicon and demethicone is listed before argan oil. I can see why there are rave reviews from other users. This will give your hair a great TEMPORARY shine and silky soft feel but will end up robbing it of shine shortly and prevent your hair from absorbing moisture. You are not coating your hair with Arian oil but a rubber derivative. So th cuticle lays down short term but never gets the moisture that is causing the damage and frizz to begin with. I think someone who has science in their name would know that. Long term demethicone use will cause more drying and damage and is not good for your hair.

I had actually wanted to use this product on my face, not hair because of the resvesterol. But it has an extremely strong scent of sandalwood that is overpowering and I would never be able to use it on my face.

The bottle arrived in a box but leaked all over. I would have returned anyway because of the demethicone and smell. I bought pure cold pressed argan oil to use instead. It smells naturally like poo as all of them do but the smell dissipates in a few minutes.

I do think the seller should make its ingredients clear to prospective buyers and not just list the deceptive "main ingredients" omitting the ingredients that are listed first when the package actually arrives and therefore are really the main ingredients.

reviews.title: Chic bottle, good product.
reviews.text: I wanted to try this argon oil because it has both argon oil and resveratrol. When this product arrived, it was in a cardboard box. I was surprised that the bottle was tucked into a corner of the box, and there was a lot of empty space. I love the bottle in which this product arrived. It is very elegant and chic looking. I definitely will be saving this bottle when it is empty. My hair gets greasy quickly, so this product didn't work for me as a leave - in product. I use it for an occasional deep conditioner, however, and my hair feels amazing afterwards! I also use this product on my daughter's frizzy, curly hair. It makes her curls shiny and soft. I also like to use this product on my face now and then. The smell is very strong, but it smells good.

reviews.title: Anyway I love the way my face feels when I use Visible ...
reviews.text:
I have been useing this product for a couple weeks now, it really makes a difference!
I have only used it on my face so far! I am using up the argan oil I have for my hair
then I will try it on my hair! Anyway I love the way my face feels when I use
Visible Science!

reviews.title: The first product to ever make my hair feel silky.
reviews.text: I recently did a blog post on this product because the company gave me a bottle free of charge to do a blog review and video review on. It is good for skin but I used this on my hair. I have kinky curly, afro textured hair and it can get dry if left untreated. I don't have trouble finding products that can moisturize my hair. I even make my own oil blends to help keep my hair moisturized. This oil gave my hair a nice sheen (my type of hair does not shine it is too textured for that) when used between washings. When I used on freshly washed hair before I set it and then styled it the next day, it made my hair feel soft and silky. I can honestly say this is the first product that ever made my hair feel silky. For that alone I give this 5-stars. I think I will straighten my hair sometime soon to see how it works when my hair straight.

reviews.title: this stuff is pretty good as you can use it on your skin ...
reviews.text: I have been using this on my Goatee because of a dry patch of skin under the air. But, I had a day where my hair was really frizzy and dry and it was making me look and feel awful, so I gave this product a try. I was amazed at the results. My hair behaved instantly and I was able to style it and get it looking like I had it professionally styled.  The bottle lasts a long time, so its also a pretty good value.

reviews.title: I love this Argan Oil
reviews.text: I love this Argan Oil!! It is rich in Vitamin E and omega 3 oils. And it is organic! My hair feels much healthier since I have been using this oil. It actually nourishes and repairs my color-treated hair. My split ends aren't as noticeable, and my frizzies are gone! Especially with winter being here, my ends aren't as dry as they usually are. A few drops goes a long way. And it doesn't leave your hair with an oily feel. Just gives you softer, shinier, healthier hair. I really love my soft curls! I received this product free for my review, but my opinions are my own.

reviews.title: Visible Results with More than one Use - Visible Science Organic Argan Oil
reviews.text:
[[ASIN:B00KQW9ZKI Anti Aging Hair Serum with Argan Oil by Visible Science -- Hair Moisturizer to Repair Damaged Hair with Resveratrol - Antioxidants - Astaxanthin -- Organic - Non-Greasy - Vanilla Scented (2oz)]]

I received my Visible Science Organic Argan Oil as a gift and loved the packaging not to it's completely organic and really delivers amazing results! We all know that their are many different Argan Oil's on the market but all are not created the same. I visited their website and was quickly impressed with the ingredients. I am pleased to see that every purchase supports the women who harvest their Organic Argan Oil. This is a definite plus and I will be purchasing more for myself and family. When I use it on my face it truly gives me a healthy glow and the results are amazing. More bang for your buck since it works on your hair, skin and nails not to mention it fades scars. I'm living proof that it fades scars and works within 3 weeks! My skin and hair looks awesome. I highly recommend purchasing one for you and more for holiday gifts.

reviews.title: Great stuff.
reviews.text: I PURCHASED this due to reviews on the internet and it has not disappointed.  It is amazing that you can put an "oil" on your hair and leave it in, but your hair isn't oily at all - it's sooo soft and silky.  I also use it on my face, for about a month or 6 weeks now.  My skin is just looking better and better.  So I recommend this product.

reviews.title: Pure argan oil is better and lower cost
reviews.text:
This product is not effectively acting as an oil anymore! I have pure Argan oil and this one is totally different when applied. It disappears and contains a lot of silica based products. The scent is strong and heavy to smell it on the self as it doesn't fade at all and is always noticeable.

When I applied it on my hair and shampooed the next day the hair went dry and stuck to each other, losing its natural oils I'm used to.

I'm not sure if I will be able to continue using it. I'm going back to the Pure Argan oil.

reviews.title: Okay
reviews.text: I was sent this product for free. I tried it and it was okay. I used it on my hair, as I have bleached hair and it can get very dry. Often times I like to use an oil to smooth fly aways as well, however this product was a little too oily for my hair. It weighed it down a little and made my hair a bit greasy. If your scalp doesn't get oily fast, then it may be a good alternative to the more expensive products out there that do the same thing.

reviews.title: I love this product
