So what exactly is this? It’s basically a small gel filled cylindrical roller that’s held in handle. This roller is to be detached from the handle and put in the freezer for a couple of hours, and once the roller is sufficiently cool, your insert the ruler back into the handle. Let the massaging begin! For an item that is really so economical, the roller actually delivers some relief right out of the bag as soon as you take it out of the freezer. There is even a pamphlet with instructions, and it’s quite ergonomically designed to hold the handle comfortably while massaging the face. I found that the roller does not get wet during use and actually it’s quite a clever nifty product for such a low price. I have no reason to not give it the full five stars.

reviews.title: Nice and cold, even before I put it in the freezer
reviews.text: I've been seeing a lot of these rollers advertised and featured in articles about skincare and was curious to try one.  This was bigger than I expected, but I am fairly impressed with it.  The plastic handle is about 6-7" long (based on where you measure it to) and the roller is about 3" long with a diameter of 1.75".  Initially I put the whole thing in the freezer but subsequently saw from the listing that you could take the roller off and just freeze that, which is more space efficient.  By taking the roller off, you can also wipe it down, so if you are using it on your face, you know it is clean to start with and you don't have to worry about germs/dirt that could irritate skin or break you out.  It's a little bit big for using under the eyes, where I had most wanted to use it, but it can be used there, just with less precision than a small roller.  The directions say you can use it anywhere - even on sore muscles, for headache relief, to calm skin down after shaving, facial work, insect bites,etc.  I think it has lots of great potential.

reviews.title: So soothing, but huge!
reviews.text: As others have said, this thing is BIG. I expected something for the face to be a bit smaller, but it is quite smoothing and easy to use. Not sure if it will actually help wrinkles, but it does seem to help with puffiness and “tired” skin. I like to use it before applying makeup to help close up my pores some. It is very relaxing and even my husband likes to use it. It feels nice on stuffy sinuses as well. For the price it’s definitely worth it.

reviews.title: Good size
reviews.text: This I feel is more for things on the surface of the skin.  I don't feel like it penetrates deep into your muscles.  Better off using an ice pack.  That said,  my son loves using this for bug bites.  I like using it on my face if I feel it's puffy or irritated. The roller is very smooth. It holds the coldness for a good amount of time. It's a good item to have on hand for various needs.  It fits nicely in the door of my freezer.

reviews.title: Not sure about wrinkles and oversized for face but decent simple massage tool
reviews.text: I don’t know about it reducing wrinkles or anything but does give a nice little massage.  It is especially soothing after you’ve cooled the roller in try refrigerated for a couple of hours.  It gives your face a nice cooling effect.  This is advertised as a face roller but it’s actually quite big.  Works on my forehead ok but oversized for the rest of my face so I don’t see how this would help with eye puffiness.  However, because it is oversized I used it on the back of my neck, shoulders and upper back and it does give a decent massage and it  relieved some of the tension I have in those areas from carrying around my baby.

reviews.title: Ice roller
reviews.text: This ice roller is a life saver. Already comes assembled just pop it in your freezer or refrigerator and when need you just roll away. I use this ice roller for my head aches and for my face. I’ve also used this for fevers. Just a couple rolls on the forehead and back of the neck helps cool you down. In my opinion this is a must in my medicine cabinet.

reviews.title: Great for the value
reviews.text: It was packed very nicely and even came with some instructions. I put it in my freezer and used it on my knee and back after I got home from work and it helped relieve some pain. I do suggest that u use some sort of cloth on ur skin cause the roller is frozen. It rolls very smoothly.

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: The head is detachable so that I am able to toss it into the icebox the night before so that I can use it in the morning. It has helped me deflate puffiness in the face and I feel awake and after using it

reviews.title: Nice ice roller for your face Wife really enjoys it.
reviews.text:
My wife has been wanting one of these for a while now. I seen it up and thought, what the heck will give it a try? After putting it in the freezer overnight, the next morning, after her hot shower, she applied it to her face. She really liked the effects that it had on her face, it helped get rid of the puffiness. Now it has become a daily ritual for her to use it after her shower.

We were both skeptical that something like this would work. But we have both noticed a difference in her appearance, since she has been using it. The product came well packaged and this. And it seems to be a quality product.

I have told many of friends that they should go ahead and invest in this for this price point. You can't really go wrong.

reviews.title: Works as described
reviews.text: This ice roller feels nice on your skin once it’s frozen. I kind of expected it to be silicone or something gentler than hard plastic on the roller itself, but is not. The handle is simple, but feels a bit bulky. It’s a good starter ice roller.

reviews.title: All around, a good headset
reviews.text: Used this on a PS4 Pro and it worked great- clear sound from the game and in chatting. It's bulky but not heavy and comfortable to wear- even for hours at a time. The mic is a good length and able to bend a bit, if needed. The cord seems durable and connected well to the PS4 controller. The controls for the headset itself all work good. All around, a good headset 👍

reviews.title: Lot of bang for your buck
reviews.text:
The quality of the sound is more than the price paid. These headphones will give ones that I paid 10 times the price a run for their money. The cord is plenty long for gaming I just used them on ps4 along with virtual gear and the experience was awesome. I love the way they fit and can't hear much else if anything when wearing this product. One thing I love is the mute Microphone option on them it comes in handy. You won't go regret this purchase and the can't beat the price.

Note
My reviews are honest no matter the product nor the price I paid . If my review helped you in your purchase take a moment and click helpful.

reviews.title: My sons favorite headphones.
reviews.text: These are my son’s go to gaming headphones. He loves them. Says they are comfortable, durable, and good sound. Recommended.

reviews.title: Comfortable, responsive, adjustable - overall great!
reviews.text:
Noise Cancellation:
4/5 - not the best that noise cancelling technology has to offer, but still effective and satisfiable

Comfort:
5/5 - Soft ear pads that don't cause strain even after hours of wearing. Extendable/flexible head band fits all head sizes/shapes without being too tight/loose.

Sound Quality
5/5 - Keeping expectations realistic the sound quality is excellent with plenty of bass/treble, although there is no way to adjust this unless you do so from your audio source. The microphone is responsive and the cable has an adjustable volume dial.

Other:
Cable length is very long (6.6 ft) making it easy to play video games from the couch and relatively light so as to night create neck strain after several hours of use.

Overall:
An excellent headset for gaming, listening to music, skyping, etc.

reviews.title: Good value for the price
reviews.text:
I am not a serious gamer. I don’t stream or use the microphone much. I mostly wanted these for the headphones for sound.

I think they are great for what I needed. I’m not sure if I would recommend them for serious gamers/streamers.

The cups are very big on the ears, but it feels very comfortable. You can control volume on the cord, which is nice.

I feel like they are a good value for the price.

reviews.title: Comfortable, but loose fitting
reviews.text:
These headphones have really decent quality for some budget headphones. The sound is pretty clear coming through and the ear pieces are super cushy.

Unfortunately, where these headphones fall short for me is the fit. They don’t fit snug at all, it’s almost as if the ear pieces just hang off the top of my ears. It’s definitely usable, but loose fitting in my opinion.

Other than that, they are pretty monster headphones, so just be sure you’re ready to be wearing size huge. I honestly wouldn’t have a problem with the size of the headphones if they fit better. I’m too afraid to make sudden movements because they feel like they will slip off.

reviews.title: Gaming headphones
reviews.text: Got them at a great price my boys love them

reviews.title: My son likes this headset
reviews.text:
I gave this headset to my 11 year old son. below is his review. From myself I can add that the manual translation is very lazy and disrespectful to the customers.

"I got the headseat and was very eager to use it. The headset definitely did not disappoint. The noise blocking was nice, and the headset felt very comfortable on my ears. For me the headset doesn't fit perfectly, there is a small space between my head and the bottom of the ear pads. I get uses to it after a while but i wish ear pads would fit all the way around. Other than that, I really like the headset and definitely would recommend."

reviews.title: Comfortable Casual Gaming Headset
reviews.text:
Audio is basic stereo, and nothing to write home about. At best, similar to stock headphones you get with your phone or mp3 player.

Comfort on the the other hand is another story.

Love the padding on ear cups and head rest. Can wear for extended amount of time without any discomfort.

Mic quality is basic. Similar to mic audio on smartphones.

In line controls are huge (for some reason). Has volume slider and mute (on/off) switch. Has enough raised texture/grooves that you're able to blind use the sliders

Works with any device with a 3.5mm headphone jack. Includes a splitter for PC users. Main wire is not detachable from headset

Overall, one of the most comfortable headsets i've tried. Too bad the audio sucks

reviews.title: Excellent Budget Headphones
reviews.text: While this gaming headset by Chamvict is certainly not the best sounding headset I have ever used, it is a very good budget headset. The sound quality is basic stereo; no surround sound enhancements here. However, it is clear and crisp stereo sound. The mike came through loud and clear using the windows microphone set up and by way of feedback from fellow gamers. The ear cups are the over the ear type and completely cover my ears blocking out outside noise. The ear cups are soft and well padded. The headband and ear cups are among the most comfortable I have ever used. I gave them to my son to use over the weekend. He played BFV and Death By Daylight with his buddies all weekend. He claims they are more comfortable and much better sounding than his Plantronics. He was using the Plantronics over his wireless Corsair set.  Chamvict even includes a Y connector for those that need it. For the current price of $27.99, these budget headphones are 5 Star in my book.  If you can get them on sale, they are even a better deal.

reviews.title: Great Value
reviews.text: Headphones are so expensive now a days, so these are at a great price point.  They work perfect for gaming, especially if you are doing online gaming as they do have a microphone.  They do not have too many features, but our a nice pair if you are looking for some.

reviews.title: Not overly impressed
reviews.text: They appear to be made well, but the fit isn't great... I could not get them to stay in place on my head and the earphones don't seal well around the ear. Sound was loud enough, but not very clear. The mic seems to work ok. Everyone could hear me just fine.

reviews.title: Better Than Expected
reviews.text:
When I opened the packaging and examined the hardware of these headphones, I thought I would hate it. The head support on top (the black band) has too much play and I didn't expect they would hold well. The set is very large and heavy lending to my belief. However, when I actually used them I was pleasantly surprised. I was able to wear these for three hours without any slippage issues. The loose band actually seemed to help with comfort, and I found that I didn't have many of the long term use issues I have with some other units (strain, discomfort, things like that).

Sound quality is equal to or better than some others I've tried. I have hearing loss, so my impression of sound quality may not meet what others look for. For me, I need sound that isn't tinny or bassy in the extremes. This unit worked well for me, and I was able to listen to favorite music without any issues.

Noise cancelling was very good and I was able to lock out the outside world pretty easily. The huge size of the headphones helps this by completely enveloping your ears (and maybe your entire head if small enough).

I haven't had an opportunity to try the microphone but I found this to be the most annoying aspect of this unit. The mic is flexible but doesn't stay in a desired position. It wants to always return to the default location which gets in the way. I'm considering adding a piece of velcro to allow me to stick it to the ear piece so the mic ins't stuck right on my face.

For me, I like it so much I've replaced my previous headset at work with this one. I mainly use it for music and conference calls (that will be another test when I actually need to use the mic).

In a landscape where headsets range from price from cheap to absurd and quality doesn't always sync with price I found this one to be a great find. If you don't mind the size of the headset, this is a great value for the price.

reviews.title: Great Value
reviews.text: Headphones are so expensive now a days, so these are at a great price point.  They work perfect for gaming, especially if you are doing online gaming as they do have a microphone.  They do not have too many features, but our a nice pair if you are looking for some.

reviews.title: Great Value
reviews.text: Headphones are so expensive now a days, so these are at a great price point.  They work perfect for gaming, especially if you are doing online gaming as they do have a microphone.  They do not have too many features, but our a nice pair if you are looking for some.

reviews.title: excellent at evening out rosy skin, great smelling tinted mineral sunscreen, great as primer
reviews.text:
Interesting product! I have used another rose tinted sunscreen before and was intrigued enough by it to try another. This one might be even better. Let me tell you about it in terms of my ROSACEA (type 1: redness, and visible veins/telangiectasias). I would not thinking adding MORE PINK would be at all helpful to my already rosy complexion. But it does a phenomenal job evening out my skin tone. I have fair, cool toned skin so I find this is still a tad dark-- so if you have skin that is even a little darker than very pale, then this should blend in real well. Yet even with the clearly pink mask that it gives me, it looks better than pink and red splotches. I just wouldnt go out in public with this alone. SO, this got me thinking about using it as a BASE layer to another sunscreen, mixing it, or the best use.. using it under make up. It will provide a great foundational canvas for a layer of foundation. Wont need to rely on the make up to even things out. If you have splotchiness, you may like trying this out. That's what appeals greatest to me-- that it evens out my skin tone gently.

Nice smell, even coverage.. makes my skin feel really good. Semi dewy supple feel. My skin is DRY, and this feels good on, Maybe it just plays well with my other skin care products? Oddly.. it has a slight gritty feel while putting it on. Yet doesnt have a gritty feel ON the skin. Not sure what I am feeling. Its odd.. but it doesnt impact overall look, feel, or performance.

reviews.title: Light sunscreen with a rose tint
reviews.text: I've liked the different Alteya products that I'd tried but this Rose Face Sunscreen doesn't work well for me.  The texture is nice, light and doesn't feel greasy.  It offers mineral protection against UVA and UVB rays. I'm Asian and  find that the rose tint is a little strong for my skin tone.  While I can use a little and blend it in, there are other tinted and non-tinted sunscreens that are a better fit for my needs.  Similarly, someone with a more compatible skintone might find this to be a perfect match.

reviews.title: Pink, gritty, doesn't smell like roses at all.  But comfortable.
reviews.text: I'm giving this 4 stars because it's one of the most comfortably suncreens I've tried.  However, there are other things to note.  First the scent; I'm obsessed with rosewater, and I expected this to have a rosewater scent.  However, it doesn't smell of roses (or like sunscreen) at all;  I actually dislike the oddly medicinal smell, but fortunately it disappears quickly.  Also, it has a slight, small gritty texture (and I have not encountered in suncreen before); this also doesn't linger.  The textured is watery and easy to distribute.  The tint is very much the color of calamine lotion (really), but it's watery and thin so it doesn't show up that color once distributed.  I have fair, neutral skin, and I think the effect is actually flattering.  However, I am not at all sure how well it will or won't server darker skins.  As I only have my own skin to test it on, I can't assess how well it will suit darker skin, just note that the slight tint is pink.

reviews.title: Honestly Strange And Frustrating, But The End Result Is Great
reviews.text:
I really enjoy using the Alteya Organics rose water, so I was very excited to try this rose face organic sunscreen SPF 30. This sunscreen is very unique to me in that it isn’t white, it isn’t simply beige tinted, but looks dusty rose/beige tinted.

So there are definitely some things about this product that I kind of dislike/ am on the fence about, but ultimately, The end result is surprisingly awesome.

What I don’t like-
I usually start with what I like, but I noticed all the things I didn’t like very quickly, so I’ll start with that.

-The pump dispenser. I don’t know what is going on with this thing, but I opened the box and tried pumping a couple times- nothing came out. I thought nothing of it since it usually takes multiple or many pumps initially to get any product into the pump..... but it never came. I started shaking the bottle and then pumping..... nothing. I almost gave up, but then violently started pumping it by hammering the top with my hand-tiny little bits started to splash out. After some more hammering, it seems to start coming out normally with a simple press. The product it pretty thick, so that could have been a factor I suppose? Now it is easier for it to come out, but still stops occasionally. When I press, the product usually comes out at the very end of a full pump.
-Not incredibly easy to spread and rub in properly. It isn’t terrible and I wasn’t too surprised since it is fairly thick and it is sunscreen, but it did require some effort to work it into my skin.
-It feels somewhat grainy/gritty when I’m trying to rub it into my skin. I’m not sure why or if it is just the product I received. I can’t feel any granules on my face after application, but it was definitely there initially which I thought was odd.
-I had a sensation of wanting to wash my hands afterwards. I could definitely feel it lingering on my fingers.

After all that, I felt a little disappointed... but you know what? I really like the end result and the way it makes me look.

What I like-

-Really subtle natural scent- almost like the smell of clay with a hint of rose. I like it. I do see in the ingredients that there is also lavender oil.
-The tinted color... it is like a dusty rose beige. I really like it. I have somewhat tannish olive skin and something about this color is making my skin look good. It is almost like I’m wearing light makeup. Somehow my skin looks brighter and glowy after application.
-Doesn’t feel so heavy as I’m wearing. I’ll admit- the product is thick, feels somewhat grainy with application, and is not the easiest to rub in, but it feels light sitting on my face. Yes, even after washing hands, I can feel it is there when I run my fingers across my face, but it feels soft. There is a little bit of friction like it doesn’t feel completely silky smooth, but I’m not bothered by it.
-Doesn’t leave a white cast. I suppose this isn’t surprising since it isn’t white to begin with.... but I love that. Does it leaves cast? Kind of, but in a good way. Like I said, I feel like it leaves a very slight color that evens out my skin, almost like light makeup.

I really wanted to leave a 3 star rating because the pump is annoying and frustrating, the grittiness is strange, and it isn’t the easiest to rub in, but darn I like how my skin looks afterwards!!! It doesn’t make any sense to me. It almost feels like it would leave my skin feeling and looking greasy/oily, but it doesn’t- my skin looks nice and somewhat dewy.

If the company finds a way to make the pump dispenser work properly and possibly make it feel easier to apply then this would without a doubt be a 5 star product! I also wish the bottle was larger than 50ml, especially considering the hassle of the pump.

Anyway, I hope my review was helpful in some way, and if so. I would love to know!! Thanks!!

reviews.title: My go to sunscreen/foundation base.
reviews.text: Have been using this product for years. Evens out my skin tone (62 years old, medium complexion, olive/Mediterranean). Glides on evenly & easily. I use a very light weight liquid foundation over it for a smooth finish, ready to head out.

reviews.title: Two Stars
reviews.text: It has color and it has dry texture

reviews.title: Three Stars
reviews.text: Just okay, this product has a very pink tint.

reviews.title: Non greasy sun screen
reviews.text: Was not greasy. Smells like roses. Seems to work pretty well as a sunscreen.Wish it was a tad tinted lighter.Since I have pale skin.Other than that great!👍

reviews.title: Flawless
reviews.text: I sampled this on my hand at my coop and I wasn't sure about it because of the unusual pink tint, but I bought it because I liked the ingredients. This is my second day using it and I absolutely love it! The pink tint is perfect for my skin and it offers a flawless, beautiful finish. It is a little bit dry and sticky when you put it on and it could rub in easier if you added some oil or mixed it with other sunscreen. All in all, I'm very pleased with this product. Most suncreens have an orange/brown tint that doesn't compliment my skin very well.

reviews.title: Love it!
reviews.text: I'm very happy with this product, it's similar to tinted sunscreen from Badger that's no longer available. I hope to buy this again, when it'll be available in USA.

reviews.title: Pls bring it back 🙏🙏 such a beautiful gentle organic sunscreen that didn't leave white cast..
reviews.text: Best sunscreen ..

reviews.title: It works great!
reviews.text: This is by far the best sunscreen I’ve ever used. It gives great coverage from the sun, and the rose smell is awesome. Love this product

reviews.title: Very good product
reviews.text: Loved it!!!! Yes it does have a pink tint but it is oh so perfect for sun exposure! Even when being in the pool, sea, exposed to the sun and sweat it protects your skin and does not dry it!! Really recommend it.

reviews.title: Bad
reviews.text:
Best before August 2021.
So sticky that can't be pumped out.
Some hard powder. No one would put this on their face

reviews.title: Works, but feels a bit Greasy.
reviews.text: The good Nice presentation. You apply this with a dropper my other half says it feels a bit greasy though she thinks it works which is the main objective on the other hand she wouldn't have me get this again. Draw your own conclusions, but I think there may be better options.

reviews.title: More than three oils
reviews.text: This product of Korea comes in am attractive bottle and nice packaging. The listed ingredients constitute a lot more than "three blends of oil" so the description is misleading. Given this, I feel the current price point is somewhat inflated. It has a light, faint, pleasant scent. The consistency of the oil is thick but penetrates the skin without leaving it feeling greasy. I agree it is soothing but I personally don't see any benefit to using this on my face so I'll be using it on my body instead.

reviews.title: Soothes and Hydrates your Skin and Smells GREAT!
reviews.text:
I really like this blend of oils for your face and neck. It goes on nice and smooth and leaves my skin hydrated well. I love that all the ingredients are Natural, Vegan, as well as Cruelty free, all important to me! This blended oil Smells Really Good!

I really enjoy using products that have hemp seed oil and bergamot oil. The use of hemp seed oil in this product serves as a carrier oil as well as soothes and moisturizes your skin. Bergamot helps to calm your skin as well as acts as an anti-inflammatory agent. Holy Basil is also used in this blend of oils and helps improve your skins elasticity. All three of these ingredients work well in concert with each other.

Since this is an oil based skincare product, it’s best to apply at bedtime. Oil based products take longer to absorb into your skin, so nighttime/bedtime is the best to apply.

This product arrives in a nice frosted glass bottle with a built in dropper. You receive 1.01fl oz of the oil, It comes in a pretty white box. This would make a wonderful Christmas gift to any of your family members or a close friend.

I DO Recommend this product as it works really well. You wake with fresh hydrated skin that’s nice and calm and ready to take on all the challenges your day brings!

I Hope you find my Review Helpful, Thanks for Reading.

reviews.title: Superb Face Oil!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:73ac59eea1d96ef33bb985189bf0b474]] This product is excellent for dry or cracked skin! It works very well to keep my face smooth and soft! I like using it at night and due to its size, it’s airplane safe!

reviews.title: Just kind of average
reviews.text:
I don't used to use skin-care products often. As a male, it's just not something I used to give much thought to. However, as I get older, I do suffer from dry skin in the winter months as the lower humidity in my house tends to cause my skin to flake and break out in spots.

So I thought I would try this vegan oil for dry skin and I'm not entirely impressed.

First thoughts are that the bottle is very nice. I love the green color of the oil. When the light hits it just right, it looks very pleasing. The bottle comes with a lid attached to a dropper for application, which makes it a little difficult to apply. You have to hold the dropper with one hand and apply it to the other and rub it in. My concern with this method is how difficult it will be to pull up more oil when the bottle gets low, but I guess that remains to be seen.

The oil itself is very greasy feeling. It literally feels like a lower viscosity motor oil and also has a sandy/gritty texture to it when applied. The scent is very strange as well. To me, it smells 100% like rubber. It's not a bad smell, but it's also not a pleasant smell. It's just a smell. If you've ever smelled rubber, you know what I mean.

As for its effectiveness? Again, not impressed.

I've been using it for about a week now, and I haven't really noticed any huge effects from the lotion. My skin is still peeling and dry in most of the places where I have applied this, but I would say there is a slight improvement. However, I'm not sure it's worth the price. I have used other, much cheaper, lotions/oils that have provided better results.

Overall, this is just average to me. I'm just not sure it's worth the price of admission.

reviews.title: Works well
reviews.text: At first I thought it a little greasy feeling,  but it ended up blending into my skin and leaving it nice and soft. Although it works well I have tried other brands that work better....it does work well, but I  personally don't think it's something I would buy again for what it's priced at

reviews.title: Feels pretty good
reviews.text: I apply this after showering and it does hydrate well. Feels good and is not oily. Smells nice as well.

reviews.title: Working great !
reviews.text: my partner and i tried this oil and it is working great, makes us feel happy and we use it everyday now as  i was not a fan of facial oil, has very pure and great scents

reviews.title: Definitely has a scent suggesting hemp. Spreads nice but a little greasy.
reviews.text: Beautiful product in beautiful packaging. I think it moisturizes well but leaves a greasy shine after application. Too greasy for my face, but I have used it on my dry hands and feet and love it. It does have a distinct scent, but not overpowering and doesn’t seem to linger too long. The greasy shine seems to fade quickly on my skin with the exception of my face. I didn’t get any irritation or I’ll side effects.

reviews.title: Soothing oil/serum
reviews.text:
Each of the isfrom blends seems to have a recommended time of day for usage. Greenery is to soothe you for a peaceful afternoon. Of course, it can be used anytime as needed
The concept behind this three-oil blend is to soothe body mind and soul, using Hemp seed oil to soothe the skin, Bergamot oil to soothe the mind and the visually calming green imparted by the Holy Basil oil to soothe the spirit.
The oil feels, silky, the fragrance is light and balanced, all three oils combining to create a mellow scent. The ingredients are natural, organic, and ecofriendly.
The directions encourage you to make this a moment. Specifically, after cleansing and toning, drop the oil into the palm, inhale to stimulate the senses and tap your skin gently until the oil is absorbed.
A few drops provided good coverage and after patting it in, took a little while to sink in. It never felt sticky, or heavy, just a light silky layer that once absorbed left my skin feeling soft and nourished.
The care taken in producing this is apparent, even to the presentation. This is a beautiful oil and the 1 oz bottle should last a long time.

reviews.title: Leaves Face Soft
reviews.text: I got this for my wife to use on her face. She has used it for several days now and really likes the way it makes her face feel. She just uses a small amount and pats in in according to the directions. The only issue is that it leaves a greasy feel on her hands afterward.

reviews.title: Expensive Herbal Face Oil with Confusing Ingredients
reviews.text: This is a higher priced Korean facial oil for dry skin and is touted as being made from Holy Basil, Hemp and Bergamot.  The first thing I noticed was the ingredients list which placed the Hemp and Bergamot at #9 and #10 on the ingredient list which I found a bit misleading.  It is a very small bottle so coverage is not great if you use it daily.  My wife followed the directions and applied it sparingly to her face and it did rub in well with no greasy residue.  After several days of use there was no difference in the feel, texture or dryness of the skin.  This could be because of her mid 70's age or maybe it will take weeks for a change to appear.  In any case, there are probably other products that might produce similar results at a better price point.

reviews.title: luxurious oil
reviews.text: I was worried about the bergamot in this oil as that scent can be overpowering, however there ended up being surprisingly no scent at all. Some people with love that but personally I was dissapointed. What it lacks in scent this oil makes up for in quality. The oil goes on smoothly and absorbs into skin quickly. I love that even though I'm using an oily my skin doesnt feel oily. Rather it feels soft and moisturized. The bright green color ia interesting, the packaging makes this very giftable. I think I have fallen in love with this brand!

reviews.title: Pleasant and very mild
reviews.text: This is a pleasant and very mild product. It has a barely discernible fragrance, despite containing a variety of oils and herbs. I applied it after shaving, and it was a nice soothing finish.

reviews.title: Moisture without leaving you oily!
reviews.text: First off this product smells fantastic! It has a great dropper with a glass bead at the end that helps you control how much you're applying. I have and incredibly oily T zone, but also suffer from really dry cheeks and chin. I can apply this to my entire face and it doesn't leave me feeling greasy at all. It feels light on your skin and seems to help with the redness from breakouts.

reviews.title: Smells and feels great
reviews.text: This smells and feels great.  My skin feels hydrated and healthy. This is a must have for desert living!

reviews.title: Nice soothing oil
reviews.text: Great on your skin to provide soothing properties. Easy to apply and gentle on your skin. Great product and results.

reviews.title: Great For Body Oils
reviews.text:
This roller works great with my body oils. It dispenses just enough while smoothly gliding over your skin. I find that putting it in the refrigerator before applying gives the roller a nice cooling effect.

The only issue is that the bottle leaks a little when using and should always remain upright.

reviews.title: Great size and value!
reviews.text: Use at home, throw it in your purse, take it  to the office! So many uses! Great for perfume, essential oils or even pain oil/cream! I love this size! Comes with lid & even measurement on the side of the bottle!

reviews.title: Fell apart after two uses.
reviews.text:
I only got to use the product twice before it fell apart when I went to use it the third time.

When it first arrived, I fill the reservoir with some of the oil I have. The roller applied it evenly on my skin. It was smooth and there was no discomfort. However, it did seem that some oil was leaking out of the reservoir as I used it. I also found oil pooling on the bottom of the product.

When I went to use it the third time, the roller itself popped off as I tried removing the cover from it. No matter what I did, even after emptying the reservoir and drying it, the roller would not stay on. Maybe it's a defect with mine, but I had to junk it.

reviews.title: great tool for face massage
reviews.text:
I was excited to get this Jade Roller Bottle, and was even happier when it arrived! It's a larger size than I thought it was going to be -- larger than a lip gloss roller bottle, maybe 2.5 times the size in diameter, but still a good size for facial massage.

The pink jade roller is very smooth (sometimes they are not), and rolls very easily and doesn't get stuck. But, it doesn't roll as smoothly as say, a stainless steel roller ball. There will be a catch every now and then, but I think that's what you can expect with a natural stone. To me, it's worth it because you get the coolness of the jade, and I suppose some healing qualities, but I'm not sure what the science is on that. But, it's nice and relaxing to use as part of your bedtime routine with some nice oil to moisturize and massage your face.

reviews.title: Next application, but it does leak
reviews.text: I used this jade roller on my face with a mixture of essential oil and olive oil. It has a smooth application and goes on nicely and feels good. My only issue is that it is a little messy and does leak from the top.

reviews.title: Great tool for tired eyes
reviews.text: I like this jade roller bottle to use on my face. You can add an ice cube or two to the bottle and use it to massage your skin. It really helps shrink pores and helps promotes blood circulation. You can also put serum or lotion in the roller for your face. You could also add essential oil and use it to massage your skin. You can also use it for pain relief when you use ice cubes. This product is easy to use and easy to assemble The instructions are very clear on how to use this jade roller. I would highly recommend this product.

reviews.title: 💆‍♀️
reviews.text: I got this thing to mix an essential oil blend I like using on my skin and not only does it do the job but I did not expect it to be as big as it was!

reviews.title: So big
reviews.text:
When I ordered this I didn’t realize how bit it really was.I’m able to fit a whole bottle of my serum in it.It would also be great for a cuticle oil on the go.I haven’t been using it long enough to notice a big change with the jade but it does feel nice on my undereye.
6/10 would recommend to a friend.

reviews.title: Big big BIG
reviews.text: This roller is BIG! I wanted to try this out for traveling reason to keep down on products. I was able to fill it up with my oils and apply it daily for five days on my entire body. It rolls nicely but it does leak a little so be sure to have the top in tightly. I do appreciate the screw off roller top for easier filling and less mess. It does feel like a little massage when rolling it all over the body.

reviews.title: Great For Oils
reviews.text:
I was really excited for this purchase.
I’m pregnant and my body oil has a pump that is super messy and I have to act quickly before it drips everywhere.
I was nervous this would spill out the oil, but it’s great!
Some rollers have dry patches when you roll them because the ball gets stuck. This roller was very smooth and have a nice even roll. Extremely happy! It makes traveling with my oil easier too, because my old dispenser was a leak hazard and this has a solid cap!

reviews.title: Not leak proof, but does the trick
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:5546d675e4ced4eb17bff8607e1121a6]] This roller works well if you’re looking for a self-care regimen to reduce puffiness. I like to put a couple or ice cubes inside and use it on my face an neck. It isn’t leakproof, so I’m hesitant to try putting any expensive essential oils in here. I think i’ll stick to ice and water.

reviews.title: Feels so nice!
reviews.text:
I was initially drawn to this product because I love mixing my own body oils but I never have an easy, non-messy way to apply them. I usually end up using my fingers and the oil can get everywhere. This roller is awesome, especially for applying muscle rubs on myself. I'm able to pinpoint exactly where I want to put the oil without worrying about it getting on everything. Also, the ball does feel like real quartz.

Pros:
- good size roller for easy application
- quartz ball rolls really well
- it has a cooling feel to it without refrigeration
- the bottle is marked with the volumes (up to 30mL) so it would be easy to mix oils directly in the bottle
- the bottle is made of a thick, durable plastic
- easy to clean
- giftable

Cons:
- I worry about the bottle leaking if it isn't kept completely upright
- the bottle is top heavy so if there isn't much liquid in it, it may tip more easily

Overall: This roller is really handy. I love the cooling effect and the bottle capacity. This is something I will be using quite a bit. I recommend it.

reviews.title: A tool i didn't know i needed
reviews.text:
- This jade roller is surprisingly good. i wasn't expecting much when i ordered it but i was pleasantly surprised.
- The jade stone is very smooth and glides very smoothly on the skin. The quality seem pretty decent.
- I tried using it with oil and was pleased to see that it just dispenses enough oil for massage as i roll it without making a mess.
- I also tried filling the bottle with water (picture attached) just to see how it will hold while inverted and observed there is no leakage when you hold it still.
- I fill it with a little facial oil and store it in the fridge so it is cold when i'm ready to use it.
- My face gets especially dry during winter so treating my face with facial oil is a must and this roller does a very good job of distributing oil on my face evenly and i find it quite relaxing. I'm really enjoying this little tool. Definitely worth the price. This will be a great and unique stocking stuffer for the holidays. Hope this is helpful :)

reviews.title: smooth and no leaks
reviews.text: I use this jade roller with ice and with oils for my face. It was very hard trying to find a small enough ice cube to fit through the small opening so I fill it with water and place the bottle in the freezer for a few minutes or until the water turns into ice chips. That has worked perfectly for me and it doesn't leak any water if it tips over, plus it glides very smoothly across my face dispensing the right amount of ice water. When I use it with oil it works just as well so it doesn't lather my face with oil, instead it lightly coats my face before I use a facial tool. The bottle is small enough to fit in my makeup organizer and its very easy to wash. i only fill the bottle with the amount of oil/water I plan on using to avoid any messes and for sanitary reasons. I have yet to use the son any part of m body besides my face, but the jade roller doesn't look large enough for anything other than your face.

reviews.title: Huge!
reviews.text: I should have read the description first before ordering! I thought for sure I was getting a little 10ml crystal roller for my purse, but this thing is jumbo!! Not mad about it as I will still use it for perfume oils. But just be aware how big it is. I probably won't be taking this around with me anywhere because the of that. The roller I received is pink quartz and it seems like it's nice quality. Only other thing I wish is that it was made of glass instead of plastic. Overall it's a nice hefty 30ml roller for oils.

reviews.title: Quality
reviews.text: Quality product! I haven’t filled it yet, but the stone rolls well and it seems sturdy!

reviews.title: Roller is Small and Sticks
reviews.text:
I've been searching for years for an easy to refill and clean roller bottle for deodorant. I use Milk of Magnesia because it works great, doesn't make me itch like most deodorants, and is cheap.

Unfortunately, this bottle fell short. The roller is on the small side, doesn't roll well, and doesn't allow enough MoM to come out to be effective. The bottle feels cheap except for the roller ball itself, and is a little small. Seems overpriced to me at $9.90. My search continues.

reviews.title: I Don't Know How I Feel About This
reviews.text:
Pros:

Very cute and compact facial massager in the shape of a lipstick tube. It comes with a USB cable. The massager charges very quickly for immediate use.

Cons:

I feel that the massager is a little weak to actually work. I feel most of the vibration at the base of the product, and not much at the tip. Also, the heating element of this product is very weak. It barely gets warm.

reviews.title: After a month of use I can see a visible difference
reviews.text: I use this every day. While I'm brushing my teeth and getting ready for my day. It cane with no instructions but its fairly easy to figure out. Too, just come back to the product description online and read how to use it. Charged pretty quick and lasts about 4 days on one charge.  The laugh lines and frown lines are slowly loosing their depth and overall, my skin tone has evened out quite a bit. I'm happy with it. Its quick, very convenient and does offer results with disciplined use. Try it!!

reviews.title: Helps with dark circles and wrinkles
reviews.text:
I have dark puffy circles under my eyes and I wanted something that would help with getting my eye moisturizer to really soak in to my skin and this does just that.
After I wash my face I'll add eye serum and use this doing exactly what the instructions say to do and it really feels good the heat feels relaxing around my eyes and my dark circles seem to be disappearing and I even use it on my face and my face looks brighter so far and seems to be less wrinkles. This product really works for me and I use it regularly. Good value for the money.

reviews.title: Interesting device
reviews.text: This device is very thoughtful, and has just about everything you need to massage under and around you eyes - or any area that needs attention on the face. Very gentle.

reviews.title: Cute - works OK - doesn’t get too warm…No directions
reviews.text:
This eye massage thing doesn’t come with any directions. Now it’s not rocket science but I would like to know if there’s supposed to be heat in each function - if it supposed to pulse on the blue and the red light etc. I say this because I think there’s only heat when the red light is on. The rest seem to have no heat. And it is very light - very slight heat as it is. It makes me question is there even heat or has my face heated the crystal up. So I was really expecting it to have much more heat. Also with both the red and the blue light it’s not a constant vibration - it’s kind of like a pulse vibration it goes on and it goes off then it goes on and it goes off.

I do like that you can use it without the red or the blue light because the third setting is just a vibration - and that one is a constant vibration. But again that setting seems to have no heat at all.

The crystal does seem to be some kind of quartz. It is a clear type of crystal so I assume it’s quartz because quartz is pretty common.

It feels pretty nice around my eyes and if you hold it a certain way the red and/or or blue light will not get into your eye - you won’t see it while you use it. And I do like that. So this is OK and it looks just like a tube of lipstick.

reviews.title: Refreshing
reviews.text: There were no directions so I wasn’t quite sure what to do. I’ve been applying it often but haven’t really seen any difference.

reviews.title: On the fence…
reviews.text:
I’m still on the fence about this product. It doesn’t come with any directions but, because I’m basically an expert user in red light therapy devices I know how to use this. Someone who is not though, may not be sure…?
The component itself just feels kind of cheap. It’s not a ‘real’ stone. It doesn’t heat up very well. And although it charges super quickly, I just don’t think this device is strong enough to be helpful to the under eyes. I don’t think it’s hurting anything. But, I don’t think it’s helping in any way either, unfortunately.
It is very cute though.

reviews.title: Heat feels nice, but otherwise not impressed.
reviews.text:
I wanted to like this product, but overall I'm not particularly impressed with it. The lipstick design is cute, but the entire device is covered in a cheap hard plastic that attracts dust and smudges, and doesn't feel particularly durable. The gemstone tip looks dull and cloudy, and has bubbles within it. Not a pretty pink rose quartz like in the product photos. The stone also doesn't feel perfectly smooth, but somewhat coarse or tacky.

I'm not really certain what the difference between the red and blue light modes is; They both seem to head the gemstone head. The 'button' being a touch sensor makes it easy to switch modes on accidental during use. Perhaps one of the biggest flaws of this device is that the motor is in the base, and the vibrations are extremely weak. This means that you can barely feel the vibrations at all during use. Additionally, the charging port is completely exposed on the bottom of this device with no water-resistant cover, so there's the potentially to accidentally get liquid on it if using this product to encourage product absorption.

Overall, I'm highly disappointed with this product. I think it's a really cool idea, and the heat emitted from the stone feels nice, but I feel like the overall execution of this product is poorly done.

reviews.title: Heating and vibrations feel good on my face
reviews.text: Seemed like good quality. Packaging was impressive. Felt good on the skin and the warmth was very pleasant Time will tell if good results with this

reviews.title: I don’t get it
reviews.text: This thing sucks, it has zero power and doesn’t even heat up and get warm. It’s like massaging a rock on your face, and idk why it looks like lipstick. I’d choose something else if you’re looking for an eye massager.

reviews.title: Vibration is not very strong
reviews.text:
I'm giving this eye massager 2 stars for its design alone. I really liked the lipstick shape. It was easy to massage my under eye. That is about the only thing I liked about it.
The rose quartz feels more like cheap plastic. Vibration is not very strong. Doesn't get very warm.

reviews.title: Cheaply made, not real quartz stone
reviews.text:
I think this product has been falsely advertised and the stone is not quartz. It is made and feels like cheap plastic. The heating and massage is very weak and can barely be felt. Overall, not a good product and package is not even sealed.

What I like:
None.

Concerns:
1. Not quartz
2. Weak if any massage function
3. Cheaply made
4. Not sealed package for a hygiene product

reviews.title: Doesn’t really do anything
reviews.text: It’s a cute little gadget I’ve tried it both by itself and to apply facial serum and I really see no noticeable effects. It doesn’t stay charged well and the stone doesn’t really seem like a stone.

reviews.title: No directions and not very effective
reviews.text:
There were not any directions with this. It's not rocket science; but, directions are always nice so you at least know you're doing it right.

Overall this was not very effective for me. I was disappointed.

reviews.title: Great eye massager
reviews.text:
In love with this
Works great
I use it with my serums
Has 3 modes
Very relaxing
Durable
Value
And comes with a charger

reviews.title: Good sensation but not worth the time or money
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:cf747606acf9b5900867c48bd6720d4]] This under eye massager comes in a conveniently small package that can be easily stored. It comes with three massage settings. The first is the red light which warms the massage stone and provides a pulsating massage. The second is the blue light which cools the massage stone and provides a pulsating massage. The Third leaves the stone at room temperature with no light indicator, and provides a constant massage vibration. Hall of the massage settings feel nice on your under eye area, but I didn’t find that they helped in absorption of my under eye creams, nor did they help with  any under eye discoloration or puffiness. So though the massage tool felt nice on my under eye area, I didn’t find any effectiveness that would necessitate use of this on a regular basis.

reviews.title: Eye Massage
reviews.text: Great eye massage!! Comes in handy when your on the go!! I like how it looks like lipstick!! Massage my eye good!! Love it

reviews.title: Cute little device
reviews.text:
This review is for a MEIQIER Eye Massager with Natural Quartz Jade. I ordered this to replace a similar device that didn't have a Quartz head or blue light(just red). This device has a Rose Quartz tip, heat, massage, red light(collagen production) and blue light(calms inflammation) therapy. It uses USB charging. The eye massager comes with a protective tip cap/cover and looks like a cute lipstick.
I like to use first the red light, heat, massage with my eye serum and then I use blue light, heat massage, with my eyecream. I am using this device only on my eyes(I have full face device with a larger head). It feels very soothing on my eyes and helps with puffiness too. Since it is small and has a cap, it is easy to just toss it in a purse on the go. This device would make a great gift!

reviews.title: More novelty than productive
reviews.text: This has a fun design, masquerading as lipstick. However, it when it comes to efficacy, it falls short for me. The vibration and heat are weak compared to other facial devices. It is mostly made of lightweight plastic, so I'm not sure the quality is there or the lifespan.

reviews.title: Works better than I expected
reviews.text:
I have been looking for a fragrance-free shampoo for a long time which is harder than one would imagine. Retail stores rarely carry any fragrance-free stuff, which might surprise some - people talk about it, but it isn't easy to find (try to find it next time you are in one of the major stores).

I have a very sensitive sense of smell and wanted something that doesn't have a strong odor. This item (Sweet Baby Shampoo) seems to clean well, with no odor, and it doesn't leave the hair too dry or too oily. I am happy about the lack of other chemicals in it, but that wasn't my main reason for the purchase. It doesn't lather up like other shampoos do, but lathering is really a gimmick, so I don't mind this.

I have just ordered a bottle of the new packaging (Paradise Island Shampoo) and I expect it to be the same.

I'm a happy customer so far.

reviews.title: So Healthy and Effective
reviews.text: I love how healthy this product is. The people who manufacture it clearly know a lot about avoiding the harmful ingredients that many shampoos contain. It also works great for me-I'm a very physically active 21 year old male with dry, course hair. I also have really sensitive skin and a lot of allergies. This shampoo doesn't dry my hair/skin out or cause my skin to itch. That's really all I can ask.

reviews.title: Washes Off Waxy Build-Up
reviews.text:
I had not been able to find a shampoo that lives up to its promises of removing waxy build-up. After the birth of my second son, every shampoo seemed to leave waxy layer in my hair. This Sweet Baby Shampoo actually removes waxy build-up.

I bought it for my sons because my brainiac wanted a dye-free, gluten-free shampoo. It's tough finding a dye-free shampoo, but his arguments are sound. The kid's very convincing.

I borrowed his shampoo and love it. My hair has greater body and feels wonderfully clean.

reviews.title: A shampoo you can trust
reviews.text: I bought this shampoo based on the fact that I could get it in unscented and have a very hard time finding a so called unscented shampoo that is truly unscented and that has no harmful chemicals in it.  It is one of the best shampoos I have used simply because it doesn't make any extravagant claims and is just a simple, unadulterated, clean shampoo that leaves my hair shiny with healthy body, is pleasant to use,  and does not irritate my scalp or ears.  I am over 60 and have not tried the same brand in the adult shampoo, but am purchasing this again and will continue to in the future as long as they don't change the ingredients.  I am also thinking of washing my dogs in it.  This product is well worth the price which I find to be quite reasonable.  I have not been able to find a cheap unscented shampoo. The market seems to be saturated with many, many brands of scented shampoos, but nothing unscented for all us people who have chemical and fragrance sensitivities.  Thank you, Paradise Island, for providing something for us.

reviews.title: Two Stars
reviews.text: didnt like

reviews.title: Sweet Baby Shampoo has been the only hair product I've ...
reviews.text: My hair stylist told me that I should write a review for this product.  She was impressed by my hair's condition and asked me what products I used.  Sweet Baby Shampoo has been the only hair product I've used for quite some time. I have a contact sensitivity to an ingredient in most fragrances and I've never found a conditioner (even a fragrance-free conditioner) that doesn't make me itch or develop a rash.  I've tried other fragrance-free shampoos,  and those that I've tried (including Free and Clear, DHS) eventually  leave my hair feeling like straw.  With Sweet Baby Shampoo, I am itch- and rash-free and my hair feels great!

reviews.title: My honest, unbiased review
reviews.text:
I would like to first start out by saying I LOVE this product. It might seem a little pricey at $20 dollars for the larger of two bottles, but keep in mind, it is shampoo AND body wash along with free shipping and if you're not in Texas (like I am) then you shouldn't have to pay tax on it! (Amazon just starte requiring taxes be collected on purchases in Texas, which STINKS!) If you figure how much you pay for two separate bottles of "the other stuff" (especially if you go to the store to buy it and also have to pay tax), you may as well have paid the $20 for one bottle and gotten the benefits of it being so safe for you or your child.

I cannot comment on the stinging of the eyes as written in some other reviews because I am diligent about keeping the water and soap out of my baby's eyes. It's not that hard to pay attention and go slow as you rinse.

I hear this company is soon coming out with conditioner AND body lotion; I cannot wait! I currently use Burt's Bees Pomegranite (sp) conditioner along with this product and it works well in conjunction with this shampoo. I have never had an issue with it drying out either one of my daughters' hair and one has a full head to the nape of her neck (12 months old) and the other has long hair past her rear-end. It works equally as good on both.

So far I have tried the Tropical and the Vanilla Baby. Out of those two, I do prefer the Vanilla Baby. There is nothing wrong with the tropical, but it's not as intoxicating as the Vanilla Baby was. The tropical would probably be a good choice for a little boy (or man) though!

The bottle itself is a nice bottle; thick but not so thick that you can't squeeze it easily with one hand. It's not too thin that it feels flimsy.

I also like that it is PEANUT-FREE as I have a child with a lethal peanut allergy. The company was VERY helpful in contacting their resources to verify that all ingredients are peanut-safe. (Very important to look because a lot of organic products use plant, fruit, vegetable or food-derived ingredients.)

I will definitely be trying all of the scents (except the unscented, because I'm BIG on yummy smells!), given that they are all equally as safe for my children. I LOVE that they rated a number 1 on whatever website it was that gives ratings for safety of products. A 1 is as safe as water, basically in terms of ingredients that could be harmful.

I can honestly say that I am glad I bit the bullet and tried this product. I used to be a "buy it at Walmart ONLY if I have a coupon" but it dawned on me one day that my little ones rely on me for EVERYTHNG, including things "behind the scenes" that they never realize or think about. I can say all day long that I give my kids fruits and veggies along with healthy meals, but what I am putting on their head/hair and skin is just as important! Everything we expose ourselves and our children to somehow end up inside of our bodies, one way or another. I will never go back to the store bought, non-organic shampoo and body washes for my kids. They blindly trust in me to make the right choices for them and I take that obligation very seriously. I am a return customer and will continue to be as long as they make this product.

reviews.title: TROPICAL BABY CAUSED BREAKOUT/ LIKE UNSCENTED
reviews.text:
I had used Sweet Baby no scent w/o any problems but we were super low and they only had Tropical Baby avail so I decided to try it. My baby broke out in a rash all over her trunk/ midsection. It was all over her back & stomach. This ONLY HAPPENED W/ TROPICAL. We have had zero issues w/ the no scent for our baby. SO use the scents w/ caution on your little ones.

JUNE 21, 2012 ***Camille sent us an unscented replacement bottle!! THANKS Great company!
IT WAS THE SCENT THAT CAUSED THE BREAKOUT. I am still upset that a "natural" scent caused such a bad rash. Our Dr. confirmed it as irritation/ reaction to something b/c my husband used the Tropical by accident when I was out one night and she had the same reaction.
The no scent works fine. We wash her hair every other day at most and it is soft w/o using conditioner.

reviews.title: love it!!!
reviews.text: LOVE vanilla baby shampoo on my baby-- soft silky hair, smells amazing, non-toxic--wish they made lotion and adult shampoo :)

reviews.title: works well and no chemicals
reviews.text: We've been using this shampoo with our elementary school aged kids for a few years.  It works well.  Shiny hair and we feel good knowing they are not being exposed to unnecessary chemicals.

reviews.title: AMAZING!!!
reviews.text: I was sick of my daughters hair being dry after I shampoo it so I decided to buy this shampoo..  Boy, I've only used it twice on her hair & it is truly amazing the difference it has made.  Used to use California baby & Mustela, they both had the same drying and nonnorishing effect on my baby's hair.  Thank GOD for this shampoo!  Now I'm going to buy some for myself!

reviews.title: Great product!
reviews.text: This was the first shampoo I tried on my newborn son and the only one I've continued to use 12 months later. I got lucky on the first try, I guess! I have the peace of mind of not using phthalates or sulfates on my baby and it works and smells great.

reviews.title: Can't stop laughing!!!!!
reviews.text: I would like to give thanks to Count Beefula for an outstanding and inspiring review of this product.

reviews.title: Really though?
reviews.text: This is fake, right? All of these reviews have to be fake, or sarcastic.

reviews.title: The other lip balm
reviews.text:
Best gift idea ever! I got some for all my girlfriends and they raved about it! I did not get to try it myself however, as the dog stole mine and later there was a horrible mess to deal with.
Oh, and speaking of horrible messes, be more careful than I was- I got the stocking stuffers mixed up and it caused an acute scene on Christmas morning when little Jackson opened what he thought was lip balm in front of grandma- just before she opened hers.
We are celebrating the holidays in a foreign country next year.

reviews.title: This stuff taste awful.
reviews.text: They said bubble gum? A friend of mine told me about this stuff and I just ordered it without reading the description. Yuck taste like wax. This product was as misleading as that other nasty jam, KY Jelly.  You know that stuff isn't really jelly at all?  It's something to grease your ball bearings with or something.  But I didn't find out until I ruined what could have been a perfectly good peanut butter sandwich.  Anyone have any other tastey treat ideas they would like to give me?

reviews.title: This kitty's got a new coat ... of paint!
reviews.text:
I wasn't even aware of my embarrassing genital discoloration before I stumbled across this product. I haven't been this "fresh" and (temporarily) pink for 25 years! (I'm 32, you do the math ...).
My boyfriend hasn't noticed the difference yet (he prefers to do it with the lights off, eyes closed), but one of these days I'm going to "accidentally" show him my sexy new vagina and prepare to get skewered!
Just think ... if it weren't for your product, many women might not even consider the color of their labia to be a problem at all. Can you imagine? Women walking around with gray, discolored vaginas in their pants and feeling totally OKAY about it? Gross!

reviews.title: Doesn't your man deserve perfection?
reviews.text:
Ladies, we all know that we are nothing unless we can catch a man and keep him. We also know that the fat, balding, underachieving, middle-aged shlub we married will ditch us in a moment for that man-stealing ho Miss Universe if we aren't superficially perfect at all times. But what to do when we start to look like one of those "normal" women instead of an always-perfect supermodel?

My New Pink Button is the answer! Formulated by a quack manicurist - sorry, I mean a "paramedical esthetician" - My New Pink Button will take off the years, take off the children, and take off the reality! Its patented "natural" "formula" (wink wink) is guaranteed to remove what other, lesser women call "normal vaginal coloration" and replace it with pink perfection! And all this with a minimum of permanent scarring and complete loss of sexual response - but who needs that anyway, sex is for men!

My New Pink Button has never been tested on animals (so if it burns your skin off or causes cancer that's your problem) and contains twenty disposable applicators (so you'll be able to fool him twenty times!).

Remember, girls: when your man comes home after a long, hard day of standing around the water cooler telling dirty jokes and ogling the secretaries, he deserves the hottest, most ultra-conformist woman he can find. You owe it to him to be as superficially perfect as you can! Buy My New Pink Button today!

reviews.title: Why?
reviews.text:
I tell my children not to rub mystery substances on their genitals. I would hope that most intelligent human beings would follow suit.

If you get to a point in your life that you feel it's necessary to change the color of your labia in order to feel good about yourself, you should perhaps re-examine your priorities.

reviews.title: if the underwear fits!
reviews.text:
uhm.can i use this on my ex boyfriend's junk? i figure since he IS a p*#sie,he may as well look like one,too.
please reply soon.i am working against the clock and only have a small window of opportunity to help me bc he is
passed out drunk.
thanks, in advance!

reviews.title: On behalf of adult film stars everywhere - We are angry about this product!
reviews.text:
What was once reserved for the elite echelons of adult film is now available for the general public?

May I be the first to say this is an outrage! MNPB is an industry leading special effect makeup created by our top labia color and design experts. Our unions payed billions of dollars to perfect the day glow pink hue you see here. Clearly some scab has gone and leaked the secret formula and supplied this precious gem to all you prudish peasants.

Where this traitor found a reliable supply of blue-ringed octopi venom is beyond me. (The most natural of natural ingredients!)

Let me tell all you peasants out there that just because this is publicly available now does not mean we wont always be pioneers in labia special effects, just now we are working on a new secret formula that is the perfect shade of tangerine which we are sure will make your husbands and boyfriends reject your blinding pink beef curtains and come calling for stage lighting on lovely tangerine flesh. Because remember ladies, no man wants you to look natural, if everything about yourself isn't a lie, you will never find true love.

reviews.title: MNPB Gave My Vagina A New life!
reviews.text:
I'd been using MNPB for months and let me tell ya, my sex life was NEVER better!

Each night I would slap some of this snatch staining salve on and hit the club. While the rest of my bloated lush body got sweaty and lackluster throwing back drinks and grinding up against a cloud of Axe body sprayed men to the latest MyCy jam, my vajay stayed as pink and fresh (from a distance) as ever. Each night I'd take at least one new guy home with me, and dude, the free drinks did. not. stop. That was the most fun 9-months of my life!

Only complaint: I could never tell if I was on my period or not, and turns out I was pregnant the whole time. Bummer. But don't worry betches, this story has a happy ending... little Baby Gaga was delivered in the club's bathroom by a super muscular bouncer (and, yes, my new common law husband) Brad-the-Dad. Can you believe that was already his nickname?!? Kinda perfect....

reviews.title: Kind of an acidic, astringent, bubble-gum flavor.
reviews.text: Looks great, but I could not say the same for the taste. My husband was so very disappointed. It's back to the drawing board.

reviews.title: Glows in the dark?
reviews.text: I put this on my button and turned the lights off, and my boyfriend still couldn't see it. I thought this was supposed to make it easier for him to find it in the dark? It would be nice if it came in some other colors. Please make a glow in the dark version. The Techno-Glow body paint gives me a UTI.

reviews.title: pretty good, fast shipping
reviews.text:
Arrived on time, came with an extra sampler pack, which was nice. I had to call customer service to change the shipping address but they were very helpful.

My only issue was the size of the portion. Valentine's day was on friday, and by the next week's tuesday my girlfriend had already run out. And the color of her crotch hadn't really changed that much. I tried some myself and noticed some change but I was hoping for more. I wish they sold bigger sizes or maybe bulk packs like at Costco, because I think my girlfriend needed a few more applications to really start looking good again.

The cream goes on smooth but its pretty hard to get off fingers or most clothes. Khakis were the worst probably, couldn't get the drips out until we tried some selzer water. However no problem with cotton socks! If it gets on your skin, peanut butter actually works better than soap to remove it. Someday the company needs to start making a travel size or a cleaner scrub, because she was always spilling it, which really gets on your nerves when its such an expensive item.

I would recommend this to most people but I've had somewhat better luck with other types of dye. This one seems to work more on the skin than the pubes. The directions were sort of confusing but if you contact CS they can pdf you a clearer version. They usually have a good deal on rush shipping, just remember to ask first, same with re-orders, you get 10% off but you need to request the discount code.

reviews.title: Offensive
reviews.text: Really? Now we're supposed to be dying our coochies in chemicals to be sexier? On top of Brazilian waxes, we now have another useless and probably painful (and probably unsafe) step to take in order to get us closer to our pre-pubescent forms. How totally offensive, absurd, and disgusting.

reviews.title: It's paint.
reviews.text:
Originally posted by 'Me'
"I tell my children not to rub mystery substances on their genitals. I would hope that most intelligent human beings would follow suit."

Very good advice.
If anyone really wants a home remedy to make their labia smaller and redder, then poultry shears are the way to go.

And why's there no video review ?

reviews.title: My hair was too short
reviews.text: Was easy to use and some parts curled but my hair was too short for it to actually work.

reviews.title: Curls are Beautiful
reviews.text: Amazing product! Love the curls it did in my hair and the simplicity of achieving those curls is a huge bonus!

reviews.title: Not comfortable for me
reviews.text: I certainly do like the idea of this non heating hair curler. But as one who often shampoos at night, t does have some holdbacks for me to give it a 5. I did not find it easy to to use, but maybe it's just me. I'm older perhaps than the target buyer, and I also have some shoulder problems that make it harder for me to reach around to the far and back side of my head. It takes a LONG time to dry your hair. Even wearing overnight was not long enough for me. It was not comfortable to sleep in, so I would not do that again either. I find that when I have the time, not going out for a few hours, it works OK if I air dry my hair till still slightly damp, add some voluminzing mousse and let it dry from there, about and hour. On the plus side, this method did give me a lasting and loose curl. So I would use for special occasions more than all the time. May also work for touch up curls between washings. Will try that next.

reviews.title: Heatless curling rods
reviews.text: These arrived fast. Packaged well. Just like I’ve seen on Tik Tok. I like how easy they are to use. Appear to be of good quality. I recommend these if you’re looking for some.

reviews.title: Works well
reviews.text:
These are simple to use
Makes nice curls
Easy to store and great for travel
My wife would recommend these

reviews.title: Easy use, handy accessories and beautiful curls if soft & natural wave long hair
reviews.text: There’re 2 headbands, one is flat on top (not round) which make headband easy to stay on head. The clips help to secure the head band so both hands can be free up to twist the hair on to the band. The headband is light.  If hair is too straight or too thick, the product may not have good results.  The value of product is great, you got 2 sets of headbands and very handy accessories.

reviews.title: It’s very easy to use
reviews.text: Ok so this is a must get! Very easy to put on your hair my kids and I have long hair so it takes a lil longer for our hair to curl as it is very long. But it works and it’s comfy and very cute.

reviews.title: Ok, but not great
reviews.text: The version that has the flat bit in the middle is preferrable to me for sleeping. The large foam roller one was not comfy or easy to use for me. I did get a decent curl, but honestly I think I just prefer the sock method for sleeping. I think if you showered in the morning and then were able to use this while you were awke and doing chores or reading it would be better. I didn't overly enjoy sleeping with this.

reviews.title: This heatless curling rod made it possible for my hair to curl without any hair damage
reviews.text:
I always wanted to change my hairstyle to make it curly but was afraid of the damage

it would suffer due to the heat from the electric curler. 

This heatless curling rod made it possible for my hair to curl without any hair damage. 

At first, I was unsure how to use it, but the leaflet given with this product makes

it really easy. It's pretty simple and straightforward. 

Applying this overnight gives beautiful results in the morning. It actually works.

I love the long waves from this hair curler.

reviews.title: Simple and comfy
reviews.text:
I love having curls in my hair but I hate using heat to achieve the look. I also used to get perms when I was younger but hated how long it took at the salon and the subsequent trips I would have to make a year later.

I have also tried other heatless curlers that usually gave me headaches or unraveled while I slept. Or sometimes the curls didn’t look good.

But not this one. This one was easy to use and took me was less time than the other curlers I have tried. I would towel my hair a bit after a shower, apply some products, and then get to wrapping my hair up around this. Once I got used to using this, I could wrap my hair up in less than 5 minutes and jump into bed immediately after. I didn’t worry about any rollers coming out or may hair coming loose since I was able to secure it well. Using this also made me sleep more on my back, which my neck REALLY appreciated so that was another win in my book.

The curls I got from using this were some of the best I have gotten from any product I have used. My hair feels soft, my curls look natural, and I don’t have to suffer through a headache after using this during the night.

This product produces really nice curls, doesn’t feel heavy, and is easy to use. I love it and highly recommend it.

reviews.title: Not a winner
reviews.text: Had high hopes for this but it didn't work for me. I think the barrel itself it too big to really get good results. It was rather uncomfortable and honestly for the time it took to do it I could have just curled my hair.

reviews.title: Did not work at all!!
reviews.text: I had high hopes for these as I have had pretty good luck with ither heatless curling items. Sadly these were not one of them. The set is nice as it comes with 2 of them. One is a microfiber and one is a satiny material. They each have 2 scrunched made of the same material. It also has one claw clip and one gator barrette with a plastic carrying bag. I started with about 60% wet, clean hair. I did spray texture spray and use Beachwavers braid balm before wrapping my hair around each side. I had my hair in it for a total of 8.5hrs. I kept them in overnight and all morning while getting ready. I sprayed my hair with hair sprayed and removed it. Once I took them out a majority of my hair was still damp. I tried to scrunched it and do what u could to save some kind of waves. As you can see in the 2nd picture that it really did nothing at all. It was also not the most comfortable thing to sleep in but is doable. Overall I would pick other heatless curling methods over this set. It could be fun to do at sleepovers or for other types of hair but it just did not work for me at all.

reviews.title: Eh
reviews.text: It wasn't the greatest thing. It worked, but didn't turn out perfect. Was my first time using it on my daughter who has curly hair that is medium thickness.  Pictures are while hair is secured and after. Perhaps there is a learning curve needed that I haven't quite mastered.

reviews.title: Maybe not best for already curly hair
reviews.text:
I already have reallllly curly wild natural hair, so my hope was that this would help me achieve more of a wavy tamed look. Not sure I got the waves I was hoping for, but I think I achieved somewhere in between wild and wavy. Ha
I tried it on damp hair and slept overnight in it. The wrap itself didn’t interfere with my sleep and has an amazing silky feel.

reviews.title: Perfect
reviews.text:
This is so easy to use. Make sure you have damp and not super wet hair.
Came with everything you see in the listing.
Soft and comfortable.

reviews.title: I was hoping these would work!
reviews.text: I did like the product for the fact it curls without heat but it didn't stay in well and when it was taken out the curls did not stay long because they were not very tight and still damp. I would suggest using a blow drier quickly after you wrap your hair so it adds just a little heart.

reviews.title: Maybe if you already have wavy hair?
reviews.text:
First, out of the package it smells like petrol. Yuck and not something I want direct on my hair or to sleep in.

I have naturally straight hair that takes volcano heat to curl and stay curled. Every time I curl my hair the damage is instant and extreme so I only do it a few times a year. The grass is always greener, so to speak, and LOVE my hair wavy without the damage so I was hoping this worked as well as Tic Tok said these things should.

It's super funky to get in your hair. I don't have a ton of thick wavy hair for the claw clip to grip onto so it kept slipping out. I did the best I could and got this in my slightgly damp hair and went to bed. It was fairly comfortable to sleep in, but easily worked its way out of the top of my head, so when I awoke the following AM I had a tight spiral of hair at the last 2' of each end and straight until that point.

On me, the only bit that took any type of curl or dent was where I put the rubber bands to hold my hair onto this thing. My hair took zero curl.

Maybe this works for folks that already have hair that curls but didn't give this long straight hair any bounce at all.

reviews.title: Easy to use
reviews.text:
Sooo easy to use.
The rod itself is nice and soft, and comfortable to sleep in.
It creates nice, soft voluptuous curls that last all day. Can be used on dry hair, or wet hair depending on the type of result you’d like.
Perfect for beginners, or anyone looking for a heat-free way to curl your hair.
Would recommend ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

reviews.title: Excellent hair tool
