reviews.title: Great Product
reviews.text: Great

reviews.title: Not what I expected but...
reviews.text:
When I ordered this, I thought it was a regular ol' hose nozzle. It's not -- you can actually attach it to a pressure washer as well. I was not overly impressed with this at first. The pressure washer attachment came connected to the hose nozzle and it was an absolute pain to remove (my husband had to use pliers to get it out). It was easy enough to attach to the hose but somewhat a pain to take off. It also only seems to have 2 spray patterns, not 4 like advertised (a hard "line" spray and a softer line spray).

I was not comfortable spraying my flowers with this because it seemed to spray fairly hard, even when I turned the nozzle to reduce the spray. So, I started spraying off the mold on my sidewalk. Our house faces north and is fairly shaded in the front and, since it rains a lot in Florida, tends to get mold build-up on the front sidewalks. As you can see from the picture I posted, this nozzle does actually help spray off mold. It's not quite a pressure washer but it was able to remove the heavy stuff (but, remember, it does come with the pressure washer attachment). I am giving this four stars because it's not quite what I expected but it does help remove mold from cement, which makes it worth having.

reviews.title: Heavy Duty
reviews.text: This is a very heavy duty hose nozzle. It four spray adjustments are easy to make. It came with a quick attachment. The parts are brass, which means years of use.  Powerful spray. Excellent product.

reviews.title: Great water pressure
reviews.text:
This hose head is really made well. It’s solid metal and has a nice heavy duty feel to it. I was a little confused at first because it comes with that smaller screw in attachment already screwed into the base. I almost though I got something that wasn’t for a garden hose but you just need to unscrew it an take that piece out if your using with a standard garden house.

The water stream comes out very strong and it is adjustable by turning the head. It does have the little metal clip so you can lock it and not have to keep holding the handle down. What I really like though is the water pressure aspect. I’ve been using those expandable garden hoses and they tend to not give you much pressure. This head really gives you the extra pressure and makes it so I can reach the further spots of the yard. I’m very impressed with this. All around it’s a well made product.

reviews.title: Durable!
reviews.text: We've always had the plastic cheap kinds so thought this might be an interesting replacement and we were right! It feels really good in the hand and comes w/ the little rubber washers to keep a seal and works very well! It feels well made, no drips yet. Only thing is, we -really- have to remember to take it off and inside down here in Texas because ohhh, it will get very hot otherwise! But just one more reason for us to take good care of it and bring it in when not in use!

reviews.title: This is a BEAUTIFUL design, and very ergonomic
reviews.text:
The first thing I noticed when I unpacked this nozzle was its WEIGHT. Then its BEAUTIFUL "liquid" sleek design. And then its Ergonomics -- how nicely it fits in my hand!! It fits in such a way that my hand does not get tired from holding and operating it -- which means I get to spend more time using it.

What a contrast between this (fairly inexpensive!!) beautiful hose nozzle and the usual plastic ones you find at your local hardware and garden stores!!

I can't fault the price - it is WORTH it for such a beautiful and very functional nozzle. It attaches easily to the hose, the spray patterns are well-thought-out -- settings that range from washing and flushing dirt and grit from the car and all its crevices, to a setting that gently mists plants or dogs.

reviews.title: Garden spray Nozzle
reviews.text: The only issue I have is because it is not covered with any insulated material, the metal gets really cold especially if you are using it in a cool day.  Otherwise, it is good.

reviews.title: Easy to connect to regular threaded hoses or a quick connect. Jet is powerful and spray is gently.
reviews.text: This is a vey well made spray nozzle.  This is able to to be as a quick release or you can remove the attachment and thread it on to a regular hose without any issues.  It comes with 2 extra rubber washers to help prevent leaking while in use.  All you do is twist the tip go the nozzle to change it from a spar to a jet stream.  The jet is fairly powerful and does a good job at cleaning porches ,driveways house siding, etc.  Just be careful on paint, especially old paint while on the jet stream as it can and will likely chip away pieces of paint.  This is very well made, very durable, and works as you would expect.  I have only used it a few times now but I give it a spritz of wd-40 when I am done to help prevent it form rusting,  This could be overkill but it is showing no signs of rust.  This does a good job of cleaning off siding and in the spray function it does well at watering flowers too.  This is an overall good spray nozzle and should last quite some time.

reviews.title: All metal has its pros and cons.
reviews.text:
Nicely made and sturdy with a good finish. The operation has been smooth, and its design with the valve directly in the middle should be a more durable design than a spray nozzle that relies on a pull piston.

The brass tip screws in and out to adjust the spray pattern, from a gentle mist to a sharp stream. No flat or rectangular spray patterns; just the basics. The extra hose washers are a nice bonus. I did not use the quick connect, as I don't have a standard female connector; it unscrews easily.

But I currently can't use it for one major reason -- the weather. It's been around 100 degrees in recent weeks, and with the hot water comes a very hot metal spray nozzle -- so hot that I feel like I'll burn my hands, even though this has been left in the shade. That goes with any all metal nozzle, though, so I'm not docking my rating; it's just something to consider when choosing a spray nozzle. 5 stars (except right now in the summer).

reviews.title: Heavy duty and solid feel
reviews.text: Quite impressed with this sprayer, it feels heavy duty and has a good finish on it.  It comes with a few extra gaskets so there are no leaks from the connectors.  The spring action handle is solid and easy to use.  The adjustable spraying pattern makes it ideal to use on a large garden or on potted plants.

reviews.title: Looks nice, but POOR quality
reviews.text: Used it for  5 minutes, worked nice...until i dropped it. Broke the trigger pin immediately.  An outdoor hose nozzle should be able to take a fall. Junk

reviews.title: Nice all metal sprayer
reviews.text: This is a fully adjustable sprayer nozzle, so there is really more than four spray patterns.  A little buckle can hold the spray handle in the on position so that your fingers do not get tired.  The only thing I needed to do is change the quick connect to the type of quick connect adapters that we use on our water hoses.  We have quite a collection of spray nozzles and this one is the fanciest looking.

reviews.title: Super heavy duty
reviews.text: This nozzle is super built to last. It’s rather heavy but I know it will withstand the much abuse. My only worry is we have hard water and sometimes that eats away at our nozzles over time. Great product that will last though!

reviews.title: Very heavy duty!
reviews.text: Really nice heavy duty garden hose. My husband was even impressed by it. It's very solid, and heavy, definitely doesn't feel like it will be breaking anytime soon.  It's easy to fit to your hose and to use. You can adjust the water spray, and it has the lock feature so that you can keep the water running without holding the handle down. Overall I think this sprayer has it all!

reviews.title: Heavy Duty
reviews.text: I was delightfully surprised by the heft of this spray nozzle! It has a nice weight to it and I can tell it's well-made to last a long time. I have been through 4 hose nozzles in the last year and most are made from cheap plastic that cracks, rendering them useless. But THIS Growom Garden Hose Nozzle works wonderfully, was easy to install, and is NOT made of plastic! It's a winner for me.

reviews.title: It's a very nice nozzle
reviews.text:
As most of the reviews state, this is a heavy duty metal spray head. HOWEVER, if you think that you can just remove the male quick connect and thread the spray head directly onto your hose, you are WRONG!!! The threads of the hose do not mate with the threads of the spray head. Hopefully, the one I received is defective and this is not a design flaw.

Update.... The seller contacted me to let me know that they shipped the European model, with metric threads, to the USA Amazon distribution center by mistake. They corrected the mistake and now I have a great hose nozzle that threads onto my American hose. Who knew hose threads were not standard around the world.

reviews.title: Useless low quality product. Arrived broken.
reviews.text: Terrible product. Came broken. Can’t even use

reviews.title: delivered promptly, good quality
reviews.text: it was delivered promptly and is of good quality - strong.

reviews.title: Get you feet ready for flip flops!
reviews.text: I got this for my younger cousin who kept stealing my as seen on TV version of the callus remover.  She would use it to remove the hard calluses she had from wearing her soccer cleats and I was always left with dead batteries!  I ordered the Calily for her because it is USB rechargeable, and even comes with a USB cord!  However, it does not have the USB wall plug adapter, so you will need to get one or use the same one you use for a smartphone.  She just uses the same plug adapter that she uses for her smart phone.  If the rechargeable battery didn't have her sold, the 2 speed settings and inclusion of a rough and fine grain so she can get her feet in flip flop wearing condition!  She called me to thank me and said it was very easy to use and works well.  She was defiantly a fan of the 2 different rollers!  Overall, it is working great for her and is easier to maintain as the batteries do not need replaced.

reviews.title: I'm not happy.
reviews.text: This looks like a nice little callus remover. It comes with a charging cable and a storage bag. Being chargeable helps save money as you don't have to continuously buy batteries. It also comes with a second head. Now all that said I'm not a happy customer right now. In fact I'm disgusted. They sent me a used one. That's incredibly unsanitary. I can't even...I don't know. I'm so nauseated right now. There is a strip of skin cells around the whole thing. So, no I would not recommend this product.

reviews.title: Works well and has extras & options.
reviews.text: Nice bag, extras and love it's rechargeable.

reviews.title: Works Great!!!
reviews.text: This is a great callus remover,,,and it works great! I used this on my heels,,they were pretty rough and this really made a visible improvement on the first use....It comes with 2 rollers..course and fine...and has 2 speeds.....I think its great you charge this with a USB cord which is included..Also comes with a pretty silver drawstring bag for storage...This would make a very nice gift!

reviews.title: Finally home pedicure!
reviews.text: Finally I can do a home pedicure! Very easy to handle!  Comes in a cute silver bag with 2 types of rollers one is for harder callus the other for lighter callus.  Rechargeable by USB. Works super fast and effective.  No more blades, this really works very well right out of the box. I am really happy with this product.

reviews.title: ... my callus remover a few days ago and it great! This one is so much easier to hold ...
reviews.text: I got my callus remover a few days ago and it great! This one is so much easier to hold than the expensive $50 one you buy at the store. This one has two speeds which is great for little feet if you kids are outdoorsy and a higher speed for the adults who have hobbit feet (my husband). It comes with a cute little bag for trips, and charging cable. The sanding stone on the remover is better than some others you see on Amazon, and I can go a while with this one before I have to go and order new refills.

reviews.title: but this is simply much better solution. It has a built in battery that ...
reviews.text:
My wife loves this callus remover. I got her a callus remover rock and she was using that, but this is simply much better solution. It has a built in battery that is rechargeable. Usually it lasts about 3-4 uses for my wife. Comes with its own USB charging cable. There are two rollers, one is fine and one is coarse. Make sure to change out appropriately. The only thing I'd like this thing to do is to make it water safe, which it isn't. My wife likes to clean her callus in the shower.

I HAD RECEIVED THE ITEM FOR FREE/AT A DISCOUNT IN EXCHANGE FOR AN UNBIASED HONEST FEEDBACK.

reviews.title: Works well
reviews.text: works really good for a lower priced unit, i have purchased other brands which were not effective

reviews.title: I have ordered other Calily products and highly recommend them. This one did not disappoint
reviews.text:
I was so excited to order myself this electric callus remover. I have ordered other Calily products and highly recommend them. This one did not disappoint.

This little hand held callus remover is rechargeable and includes a mini USB cord, a travel bag that fits the remover perfectly, and an extra roller. It was surprisingly already charged so I was able to use it immediately. It has two speeds by pushing the button once for low, twice for high and third for off. It is very simple to use, and does not hurt at all. I am amazed at how quiet it is. All around, this is a great product and I highly recommend it.

reviews.title: After years of abuse his feet need some serious work and I figured this would be great to finally tackle his calluses
reviews.text:
I got this to help manage my husbands dry feet. After years of abuse his feet need some serious work and I figured this would be great to finally tackle his calluses. It worked great. I love the fact that it is rechargeable (and comes with the cord that plugs into a USB) there is nothing more annoying than batteries dying and your tools loosing their power. This seemed to stay strong through all the abuse. I could literally see the skin flaking off it looked like smoke- it was gross. It made a huge difference and even the next day he was able to feel a difference in his feet. We have a long way to go to get them to an "acceptable" level but this is making huge improvements.
The only thing I wish it had was some way to kind of trap the skin flakes so I didn't feel like I was covered in it but really that isn't the end of the world. It is a huge bonus to see it and know that it is working.
I am excited to see what we can get his feet to look like with this. So far so good

reviews.title: I love this Callus Remover
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:1da6497fdd5253aa724883767877e504]] I love this Callus Remover. It has smoothed out my feet a great deal all ready. I have only used it twice. It hasn't completely removed them yet but I'm still impressed. I wasn't expecting a miracle anyway. It comes with a coarse or a fine dermabrasion roller. It has 2 speeds, low and high. It's small and compact and easy to use. No need for batteries, just turn on and rub on calluses. It came in a timely manner and packaged neatly.

reviews.title: Two Stars
reviews.text: Motor bogs down under pressure needs stronger motor

reviews.title: Easy to use
reviews.text:
I have used it on the bottom of both feet for plantar warts, and it helped a lot. If it runs down, I just plug the cord into the necessary outlets to get it
fully charged. Easy to use, and efficient!

A very good tool.

reviews.title: Time to Say Goodbye to Dry Heels!!!
reviews.text:
I have used many different ways to smooth out my rough heels including a Dremel and this by far the easiest way. I will never have to use pumice stones or those handheld micro plane files that look like cheese graters again. This does all the work for me. To use it, you just gently place the head against your rough skin and it begins to smooth them out leaving behind a fine powder of dry dead skin.

I only used it for 30 seconds on both heels on my first try, to gauge the length of time to use it and its effect. It was really all I needed. My heels felt a tad warm from the friction. Surprisingly, my heels were smoother already. It is better to do a little at a time so you don't do any damage. I was a bit skeptical about this product but was pleasantly surprised. It pops right out of the packaging and after reading the directions it is ready to use. The dead skin removal is painless, and not as messy as I thought it would be. It also performed well on the rougher patches, I did not have to apply much pressure at all It left my skin smooth but not raw (this resolved most of my trepidation). This product does what it advertises and is a simple easy to use tool. I would highly recommend it. But best of all I will be saving a lot on pedicures. Now that is something to smile about!!

reviews.title: The Calily Electric Callus Removed is awesome. I was really excited to try it out
reviews.text:
[[VIDEOID:43ab53e7d4f49a52e5ddf66736d1ff75]] The Calily Electric Callus Removed is awesome. I was really excited to try it out. I really liked how easy it was to use. Power button of course powers it on of course, then if you push it again it turns to night. Its nice that if comes with both the course and fine buffer, so you can really get rid of those callus's. There is side button that releases the buffer without a problem. You can hold it with one hand, and simple to clean. I loved that it came with a little pull bag to store it in. Only thing I wish it had as a regular power cord, this however doesn't hinder my opinion of the product.
All around great product.

reviews.title: It's nice and small and fits perfectly in my hand
reviews.text: It's nice and small and fits perfectly in my hand, it's comfortable to hold while filing down my husbands Sasquatch feet. He likes to walk barefoot 99% of the time while he's home, which causes real thick foot calluses. As the woman of the house, I find it my duty to nit pick and groom him, because if I don't, who will? It does a great job filing through his calluses, with minimal effort. It comes with a spare sander blade for me as well so we don't mix up the skin cells (yuck) and comes with batteries, which saved me a trip to the store. Would definitely recommend to anyone.

reviews.title: Great Idea, Needs Some Fine Tuning
reviews.text:
I own a foot filer (Amope-style) already and was intrigued by an electric nail filer. The product came well-packaged and with some toe seperators, which was a nice bonus. I also appreciated that it comes in a plastic, TSA-type storage pouch.

As for the product itself, there is still some work to do before it's a great product. Firstly, the fact that they do not offer refills yet is a huge deterrent. I've only used mine a few times and the heads are still functioning adequately, but soon I'm sure they won't (particularly the filer) and then it will be useless until they offer refill file heads.

Secondly, the file head itself could be of better quality, in terms of filing power. The buff and shine ones are pretty good, but not amazing, as it still takes a little longer than I'd expect to get great results.

Finally, because everything just work "okay", the end result is perfectly fine. Fine is not bad, but I can achieve a better, more fine tuned result with a quality multi-way filing block in only slightly more time. Changing the file heads vs using 1 block for my hands, it's a no brainer I'm better off just using the block. I have found the buff & shine heads useful on my toes, though, for a quick shine boost when I'm in-between polish and letting my toenails breathe. For my toes, the speed of the machine is a little helpful to be bent over lslghtly less long.

All in all it is a pretty okay little device, but for the price it's not quite "ready for prime time". I can only see this being beneficial to those with hand problems, such as carpal tunnel, arthritis, etc, because then not having to grip a block and make a repeated motion for so long would be helpful.

I did receive a discount on my purchase, but my review is honest & unbiased.

reviews.title: Lack of power, needs more aggressive pads
reviews.text: I originally got this to prevent ingrown toenails and to use on my fingernails after cutting, but was disappointed on both counts. The roughest pad took forever to file down my nails, and the device had very little power, bogging down with any more than the slightest pressure, meanwhile my manual crystal file took a few swipes and was done. I don't have heavy or thick nails, but this still wasn't up to the job. Maybe if you have lots of time, or you just want to gently polish out slight imperfections then this is for you.

reviews.title: It makes their nail care easy and complete.
reviews.text:
I can't get too crazy about a nail care system but my wife and granddaughters love this tool.
They tell me it makes their nail care easy and complete.

reviews.title: Don't waste your money
reviews.text: Very poorly made.

reviews.title: Works great, added free bonuses but they don't sell the file refills
reviews.text:
Before you buy this...
Make sure you can buy replacement files for it. I cannot find that this company sells them. I see that Amope does sell them and although I do not know if they would fit this file, I have a strong feeling they would fit. Many times beauty gadget dupes are almost exact replicas in my experience so other brands of replacement items do normally fit (i.e. clarisonic off brand brushes, amope off brand file rollers, etc). I checked the Amope refills & at the time of writing this, they sell for about $10 for all 3. I normally won't comment on price but I find that to be ridiculously high considering it is just a piece of plastic with basically a sticker on it with a rough or smooth edge. Regular emery boards are so cheap so I am surprised the refills would go for that much. Now that is for the name brand of Amope. If dupe companies make them, they should be cheaper.

Pros...
* Includes AA battery, 3 heads (file, buff, shine), soft top separators, nail clippers & bag to keep it all in.
* Works good.

Cons...
* I think this company not selling the file refills is a HUGE NEGATIVE. At the time of writing this, I searched the internet and cannot find anywhere that they sell them.

I read some reviews about how some people didn't feel it was powerful enough. I felt the same thing when I used it but really it is powerful enough for just filing your nails. You wouldn't want anything too rough for that.

This vs Amope...
I do not own the original Amope so I cannot compare the two directly. I looked closely at the photos and they look identical to me. This brand you do get the added extras of the clippers, toe separators and bag. With the Amope brand, you are able to purchase the nail file refills. With this brand, you are not able to purchase the nail file refills at the time of writing this. It is likely the amope refills would fit this. My advice is if you are wanting an electronic nail file like this, go with the Amope version because you know you can buy refills & they will fit. I normally will not comment on price but I will say that I am taken aback that this Amope dupe is priced as high as it is. Even though this brand is at a lower cost and you get the added bonuses, I am still a little surprised that there is not more of a price drop to remain competitive since they do not have the name brand recognition.

I like to write product reviews & because I rely heavily on what other people write when I am buying items, I try to write reviews that highlight the good and the bad. I rate things from as low as 1 star up to 5 stars. I base my judgment on my experience with a product and not on the price, since the price value of an item is ultimately up to the buyer (what is a good deal for one person might seem expensive to another). That being said, I did receive this item at a discount in exchange for my honest, unbiased opinion.

reviews.title: Watch the Pressure Applied when Filing
reviews.text:
The nail kit comes with everything you need to do a pedicure and/or manicure.The device requires one AA battery. You have to hold the device a certain distance to get it to work properly as if you press down too much, it will not work. The filing pads works pretty good as long as the right amount of pressure is applied with the right amount of distance from the nail. When the right pressure is applied, it works like a charm and I like it better than manual filing because it requires less work. I did my daughters toes and fingers and applying nail polish took the longest time instead of filing which use to take a long time. The kit is handy and travel friendly.

CONS:
I did deduct some star because you have to work with how much pressure is being applied to the device onto the nail in order for it to work. I think if they fix that issue this would be an awesome device. Also, it doesn't seem like you can buy refill heads as I searched all of Amazon, even looking at other companies with the same product but different brand name and could not find any.

Kit Includes: nail kit with cover, 3 filing head, one AA battery, nail clipper, and a gel toe stretcher/separator

I did receive this item at a discount in exchange for my honest and unbiased review.

reviews.title: Four Stars
reviews.text: these work well I wish they would have replacement heads to buy.  they do wear out.

reviews.title: Wow really impressed how easy this was to use
reviews.text: Wow really impressed how easy this was to use, I like how I can switch different heads easily. I found it less work for me to buff, shine and filing my nails. I recommend this.

reviews.title: Cheap Asian junk. And battery is an awkward size ...
reviews.text: Cheap Asian junk.  And battery is an awkward  size so you can't buy  a replacement  at your corner store.  Stick to a ¢. 10 file it will work just as well.

reviews.title: Great for your nails
reviews.text: My daughter is a teenager and loves to so her nails, so I bought this for her to try out, she loves it and says its easy to use. Unloved the price and fast shipping along with the bonus nail clippers and pedi toe separate . thank you for your product

reviews.title: Disappointing...
reviews.text:
Little disappointing. it works fine but when using any sort of pressure the head stops moving...
Haven't used it too much, only used it 2 so far, but so far it looks like its good fir finishing yet not actually filling to hard

reviews.title: Nail
reviews.text: The battery compartment has a major flaw in it. It's easy to put the lid on without battery in it. I couldn't get the lid to attach with battery in it. It took someone else to get the lid on it and even for them it was a struggle. Once battery was in the product worked well. I would like to have more files won't be able to use many times before I have to reorder files. Came with nice zip lock case and clippers as well as soft finger/toe seperators. All in all its a great travel item, pack in suitcase for emergencies.

reviews.title: Two Stars
reviews.text: cheaply made and noisy. The 3 files do: little, very little and nothing at all.  Not worth buying.

reviews.title: May work for you depending on eye shape
reviews.text: Magnetic eyelashes are an interesting concept for those times you want a dramatic look but don't want the hassle of glue on lashes.  The magnetic liner works well but it must be applied pretty thick in order to give enough area for the lashes to stick.  You have to be careful when placing them also as  you cannot really adjust the position because pulling the lashes off usually tears the liner off with it, so you have to then clean the lashes and reapply liner if you make a mistake which is kind of a hassle.  The two lashes included here are nice but neither one really worked for my eye shape, I got another kit which had 7 different shapes in it and that one had two styles that work well for me so I would probably recommend getting one with more options to ensure you find one that fits your eye shape.

reviews.title: Why didn't they add another magnet, so you can trim them?
reviews.text:
This was my first magnetic eyeliner and eyelash kit. The eyeliner works great and the lashes adhere very well. The eyelashes themselves are beautiful and I love the lengths. The liner is easy to put on and so are the lashes. And, they stay on very well, with one exception.

The eyelashes are too wide for my eyes, and I need to cut the last magnet off for them to fit properly. But, when I do that the outer end flips up and makes the lashes look terrible. If I don't cut them, they stick into the inner corner of my eyes, causing major irritation and immediately flip up, also making them look terrible. 
I feel like they need one more magnet on the outer end, close to the last magnet. Because, most people need to trim any and all eyelashes, in order to make them fit their eyes better. In every video I've ever watched with glue on lashes, the person always has to trim the eyelashes just a little bit shorter in width. Why didn't the manufacturers of these eyelashes think that it would not be the same for these lashes?

I love the concept, and really wish that these worked for me, because I have very dry eyes and cannot wear eye makeup and mascara. They just need another magnet!

reviews.title: I am pleasantly surprised!
reviews.text:
I've never used magnetic lashes before, but was very intrigued! These magnetic lashes + the eyeliner are STRONG! I've attached photos of the lashes after wearing them for 10 hours at my workplace. The magnetic lashes and the liner are so strong in fact, that I actually ripped out a lash because I accidentally had the magnetic liner on my lash!

I'm very impressed by how well it stuck onto my eye throughout the day. I am also VERY surprised of the formula of the eyeliner. I have tried many, many waterproof, smudgeproof eyeliners, but this eyeliner is by far THE MOST waterproof and smudgeproof! I have oily eyelids and my original waterproof eyeliner would still smear on my lower lids (I bought a waterproof Missha eyeliner for $27 and it still smudges!)

Not only that, the liner will also remove very easily with micellar water or makeup removing face wash -- it washes off so clean that I don't have to follow up with another makeup wipe after the shower. This is amazing!

I only really took off 1 star for three reasons:
1) The formula of the eyeliner has a scent that is very perfume-y/chemical-y. This doesn't bother me too much, but I do think that some customers may be bothered by it.
2) The brush of the eyeliner is very flimsy -- it is difficult to get a sharp line, because the brush is so thin.
3) the inner corners of my lashes began to curl up and off my lash line, pulling some eyeliner with it (leaving gaps in my liner).

Overall, I really like this small kit! It is VERY easy to apply and the lashes look so natural! I got very many compliments while wearing these!

reviews.title: Nice quality
reviews.text: These lashes have multiple magnets, and since my eyes are small I usually have to trim the lashes, but it still leaves me with several magnets. Providing a nice base to adhere to the liner. . THe liner does not irritate my eyes.  Great help for this lady without much lashes. Thank you

reviews.title: Not working out for me
reviews.text:
I was so excited to try these because I am not capable of applying the false eyelashes with glue and occasionally I want some extra flair. I know with most makeup you have to practice a few times before you can get it right, but I’ve tried these eyelashes many times and I cannot make them look good for the life of me.
If you are not good at applying liquid eyeliner then you definitely won’t be able to get the magnetic fluid across your eyes to look good. When you try to apply the eyelashes to it, you will still see a choppy line. If you don’t get that right the rest of it looks terrible. I had to watch a few different YouTube videos to see if I could get any tips or tricks.
One thing that did help was trimming the eyelashes. I could not figure out why my eyes kept watering every single time I applied the lashes and I found it was because the lashes were too wide. Once I did that, they did not irritate me as much. Before I trimmed them it felt like little metal pieces were scraping me. I’m using the smallest size which is 12 mm and they still look very exaggerated. There is no way that I would wear this for every day use as it suggests.
I’ve attempted to wear these about 5 times. They just don’t line up on my lashes and look horribly fake.
On top of all this, through my 5 attempts of trying to apply these, 2 of the 5 magnets have fallen off. The information in the item description says you can use them as regular falsies when the magnets fall off but that’s not going to happen for me.

reviews.title: Magnetic magic !!!
reviews.text: MAGNETIC MAGIC!!! Love these magnet lashes. They attach so easily and quickly. Love the magnetic eyeliner that it comes with it. Stays on all night! Super cute and fluffy lashes with a soft comfortable band.

reviews.title: Disappointed
reviews.text: I wanted to love this product but can’t. The magnet from one of the lashes was stuck on the magnet holding them in the box so that pair was done for. I used the other pair for Halloween and they did not stay on. Disappointed.

reviews.title: Only lasted about 3 hours
reviews.text:
Here are my thoughts after trying them three times. I’m not sure if I’m doing something wrong and perhaps it may require more practice and lots of patience.

So #1: They look beautiful and natural.

I attempted 3 different days to apply the lashes.
1st day I may have applied the lashes to soon, they immediately fell off.

2nd day I allowed the lash glue to dry. Lashes lasted only a couple hours and then began to fall off.

3rd day they lasted a couple hours until they fell off again.

The biggest issue is there were no instructions provided.

reviews.title: Good if you like eyeliner
reviews.text: These are just okay. They look really nice and are attractive lashes, but you have to put on so much eyeliner to get them to stay on that you end up looking ridiculous. I trimmed the lashes to make them shorter so as to take up less room on my eye so I didn't have to do such dark liner all the way across and it still looks ridiculous. Then, once you've put them on, you can't move them around or else the liner starts to come off! I also can't figure out how to get them to lay on my lashes so it looks like I have two sets of lashes on. These are likely for someone with way more magnetic lash experience than I have. I wouldn't recommend to beginners or people who don't like bold liner.

reviews.title: Wasn't impressed
reviews.text: I love the look of fake lashes but I totally suck at putting them on with the glue and just forget about getting them done professionally that cost is ridiculous. I thought these magnetic ones might be a good alternative. The lashes are  a little too thick and didn't fit the length of my eye. I tried trimming them down but then the ends would not stay on good. The liner bottle is tiny and seems like it barely has anything in it. After I put the liner on and then placed the lashes over it, I could not move or adjust them or the liner would peel right off and I'd have to reapply it again.

reviews.title: Actual magnetic lashes
reviews.text: I'd ordered another inexpensive set that claimed to be magnetic, only to be the normal sort of false eyelashes that I cannot use due to an adhesive allergy. Once I received my refund, I ordered this set. It's exactly what it claims to be, and you might even get a bonus in your package like I did.

reviews.title: Works great
reviews.text: I got these for my daughter for her birthday! They were super easy to put on and they looked awesome! They are long and fluffy. They work great !

reviews.title: like a black body suit is being painted onto each lash; zero eye irritation, easy to wash off
reviews.text:
I may be in the minority here, but I rather like this mascara. And yes, it is made in China. Not, "made for USA but made in China", but it is a Chinese beauty product. No idea if its been around, how it ranks with beauties on that side of the world. Couldn't tell you the ingredients. Tried translating, but I repeatedly failed. Search engines insisted that I was looking for CPAP not CPCP.

So, I usually end up with more mascara that I DONT like rather than what I DO like. I LIKE THIS.

Why? Because my eyes are super sensitive to make up, and this doesn't bother me. AT ALL. I love mascara, but often find myself needing to wash it off after a couple of hours (if not immediately, depending on the brand). No joke. It sucks. So when I encounter a mascara that..well.. allows me to actually wear it- I add to my list of potential repurchase. I have tried so many over the years. Funny thing, a few on my list happen to be cheap mascara (Essie, Wet-n' Wild,), --but not all-- and most mid level priced brands bother me as well as uber expensive "natural, healthy" brands. What I have noticed is that the WATERPROOF brands do the best in terms of feeling gentle and non irritating (probably less likely to flake). Next up, is the most recent generation of mascara that includes "4D silk fiber lashes", which this is.

The 4D Silk Fiber Mascara is so very different in feel and performance over traditional mascara. It has this interesting ability to coat the lashes- like a black body suit is being painted onto each lash. It easily and instantly really darkens the lashes, and can add volume and length. The formulas tend to be waterproof, and yet somehow wash off much much much easier than typical waterproof formulas. So for me, from application through face washing, the 4 D silk mascara is much easier and gentler to work with.

My lashes do not look like how they have it portrayed in the pics. If you already have long lashes, I imagine this will be extra glamorous on you. For me, with my mediocre lashes that simply need a boost of color to make me happy (and not make me want to claw my eyes out)- this works well on me. I included several pics. 3 with one eye with it on, one eye with it off. Then I followed up with 3 pics of the mascara on both.

It shouldn't matter, but the box is super pretty. I still have it, and I have no use for it, but it is just so pretty to look at. Added a picture of the mascara wand.

If I can glean any further information about this product, I will come back and add to this review.

reviews.title: Great box
reviews.text: The box is the best thing here. I had high hopes for the mascara. It's string, so it doesn't go on easily. It clumps. And I also found it very difficult to remove, Of course it is waterproof and that feature works. It took many swipes with oil to start to break this up and off the lashes.

reviews.title: no ingredients listed, smells
reviews.text: The brush on this is like one of the $1 mascara brands - incredibly short stiff brush that hurts your lashes and barely holds any mascara. No ingredients are listed! Product smells! Sadly, a product made in China that could be toxic - or just junk.

reviews.title: Works well but....
reviews.text: This mascara came beautifully packaged and in an aquamarine tube. However, there is no list of ingredients and it comes from China. I would like to now it is cruelty-free and what is in its ingredients. While it did a good job of being mascara and has a nice applicator brush, not knowing what is in it makes me skeptical.

reviews.title: Dramatic length. Long drying time. Stringy mess.
reviews.text: In my photo, the left side has 2 applications of peacock mascara, the right side has none at all, the difference in length is dramatic. This mascara glides on smoothly and clump free... HOWEVER, it’s stringy if that makes since, like the tiny fibers in it are extremely noticeable. (I attached a photo where even the wand itself is stringy.) The mascara doesn’t dry in a timely manner either. Five minutes after applying the mascara and it’s still not dry. I really wanted to love this mascara for the dramatic length it adds, however the quality is not what I expected.

reviews.title: Not impressed at all!
reviews.text:
Not impressed.. My cover girl lash blast does waaay better!
Also..the wand wasnt good either!

reviews.title: Will get Again!
reviews.text: If you have problems wearing false lashes like I do, then this is the next best thing! I like to use about 2-3 coats when I'm going for that long dramatic effect but for everyday wear, 1 coat is plenty. It gives your lashes length and volume.  Base to tip application for the first swipe then mid way to tip for added length is how I do it. Pic is with just 1 application.

reviews.title: 4D Silk Fiber Lash Mascara
reviews.text:
I have been search of the Holy Grail of mascaras for all my life. A few times, some have come close (Max Factor 2000 Calorie Mascara has been the closest). This product is so far off the mark, it's not funny. The price point is good but it is clumpy and although I didn't have a bad allergic reaction, I did get raccoon eyes and resembled Rocket from Guardians of the Galaxy. Not the look I was going for but in the deep South with 93 degrees and 100% humidity, I need a mascara that won't smear.

On the plus side, it came off with simple soap/cleanser but I'm still on the hunt for the perfect mascara.

reviews.title: Good length and volume
reviews.text: I really liked the way the mascara stretched my eyelashes but it clumped my lashes together a lot and it was also really hard to remove. I had to scrub my eyes vigorously two times just to get them off and even then I wasn’t sure if it was off the way. But if your a person who wants length and volume and doesn’t really care about clumping them definitely get it.

reviews.title: Da buen volumen , buena inversión.
reviews.text: Super, es duradero. Da un buen volumen. Me encanto.

reviews.title: Smelled bad. Don't use two coats.
reviews.text: So this smelled strongly of chemicals. It was easy enough to remove with soap and water, then face cleanser. It didn't smudge overnight. One coat looked nice, gave decent length but no volume or thickness. Beware of the second coat. It will clump up and make your lashes stick together like glue. Awful. If you want a simple one coat mascara for everyday and can deal with the smell, this will be nice. But I can find better. And the smell turned my stomach. Kinda scared me.

reviews.title: I like the brush and goes on good
reviews.text: Went I try to remove it,it’s like flaky and hard to get off

reviews.title: Lash heaven!
reviews.text: Presentation is nice and product is good. It’s very light on the eyes but definitely adds definition and makes a difference. I like how light the brush is and nicely it applies to the lashes. It does not bleed either!

reviews.title: Great mascara
reviews.text: Does a great job of making my lashes look lush and full plus it also makes them look longer. I usually have mascara that does one or the other but not both  so this product is great. It's waterproof but easily removable with a makeup wipe or eye makeup remover. Very happy with this purchase.

reviews.title: The box is gorgeous, and your eyelashes will look great too!
reviews.text: Honestly, the peacock artwork on the box is what captured me for this product. I was so hoping my fascination with the box wouldn't backfire on me by ordering a bad product, and I was in luck! The mascara wand is simple and thin, but creates beautiful lashes that won't clump. It really is waterproof so you have to use makeup remover to get it off, but it won't smudge or clump!

reviews.title: Pretty tube and goes on nicely
reviews.text: I love anything peacock and so this caught my attention because of the packaging. But it’s actually a very good mascara that goes on nicely without clumping. The brush is on the thinner side but that makes it especially useful when doing your lower lashes. I was very impressed with the packaging which went beyond my expectations. I really like this mascara!

reviews.title: Love this mascara!!
reviews.text: It’s really hard for me to find a mascara that I like, especially waterproof. For me, I love the rubber tips but they have to be just right to make my lashes look great and these definitely do the trick!! The tip is perfect and tapered well to get all those little lashes. I also love the formula of this mascara!! I normally stay away from waterproof because it’s very hard to get off even with makeup wipes. However, this formula is so easy to come off with the wipes so it’s perfect!! Absolutely love.

reviews.title: Grainy but perfectly fine to use
reviews.text:
This shea butter is a good quality shea butter. It is ivory and reasonably priced. As a person whose been using shea butter for well over 10 years for ecezma treatment I can say that this shea butter is a quality product. Although it is a quality shea butter, the way it has been processed left the butter very grainy and not as creamy as I was expecting. It is a thick, heavy butter that is solid at room temperature and has a lot of use for hair and body purposes. It is sourced from an area in Africa that doesn't produce a real rancid smelling butter. It smells distinctly like shea but not like the shea sourced from more eastern countries. The butter when applied to the skin feels thick and heavey but that isn't a problem for me. I would need to indirectly melt and re-solidify this butter in order to smooth it out and kill the grainy texture it comes with. I'd also whip this butter to make it creamy.

Price: Reasonable
Texture: Grainy but not too smooth, sort of like peanut butter but thicker
Color: Ivory, more of an off white, cream like tone
Scent: Hard to describe but it's distinctly Shea which never smells pleasing

Overall, this company's shea butter is a good quality butter, high quality for some but for me good/decent due to the fact it's grainy and doesn't have the smooth texture I'm used too. The color is normal and the butter feels thick, heavy and heavenly on thick dry skin like eczema. I'd recommend this company's shea butter and possibly repurchase in the future.

•This quality shea butter was purchased for a promotional price in exchange for my unbiased and honest review.

reviews.title: A DIYer dream butter.
reviews.text:
Body Wonders Shea Butter arrived in a 16 oz plastic jar, with no sealed liner inside the cap. It has a creamy yellowish beige kinda of color and it smells like the very distinct smell of Shea butter. It's a very heavy butter, so a little can go such a long way. In winter month the butter is amazing, its thick enough to not disappear in the harsh winds and moisturising enough to keep your skin hydrated and soft. I use it has my night time face cream, it has helped with my dark spots.
There are so many benefits to adding Shea butter to your daily routine:
Shea butter aids in the skin’s natural collagen production and contains oleic, stearic, palmitic and linolenic acids that protect and nourish the skin to prevent drying. With longterm use, many people report skin softening and strengthening as well as wrinkle reduction.
A 2010 study found that due to its cinnamic acid and other natural properties, shea butter was anti-inflammatory.One compound in particular, lupeol cinnamate, was found to reduce skin inflammation and even potentially help avoid skin mutations. This also makes it beneficial for some people with acne.
I received this product at a discount

reviews.title: Ivory colored shea butter with a smoky scent
reviews.text:
Body Wonders Shea Butter 16 Fl Oz sates it’s 100% pure and virgin. The main name on the label is Organic Shea Butter. The color is a light ovoty and the scent is typical of shea butter. What the bottle doesn’t have and I would have preferred to see is a logo denoting the ‘organic’ certifaction. The back of the label states it’s from Ghana and has not been tested on animals. I think for the price it’s not a bad deal and I like that it comes in a tub. I would have prefeered it to be safety sealed especially since it came with a broken lid. The product appeared to be fine inside. On top of the jat there is also and expiration date of 12/22/18 for Lot 1222BW-sb.

I am a big fan of shea butter and use it daily after my shower. It helps to keep my skin moisturized and and I love the smoky and nutty scent. If you are looking for authentic shes butter this is it…if you are looking for a lotion with shea butter that doesn’t have a strong scent you may not like this. The jar weighs in at 1 pound and 7/8 with the lid off so you are getting a pound of goodness. I have purchasedother products that have been short so I started weighing my products.

I purchased this product at a discounted price in exchange for an honest and unbiased review. I do not guarantee 5 star reviews unless the product is one I would buy again and/or recommend to friends. I like to test out products that I typically would purchase at full price so I can provide a review based on a real trial. My comments and opinions are based on my experience with the product. I hope sharing my experience and writing this review helps you with your purchase decision.

reviews.title: Perfect for DIY lotion, and sensitive skin
reviews.text: This Shea butter is great. It has a bit of an earthy smell to it, but being that it's completely natural and organic, that doesn't bother me. I personally use it to mix into lotion with coconut oil, rose hip oil, and other essential oils it works great for me. I've also heard you can use it in do-it-yourself deodorant, and lip balm recipes. I've also used it as massage oil as it provides enough lubrication, but doesn't have so much that it's difficult to apply firm pressure. If you use it on your heels and put socks on before you go to bed, it makes them super soft in the morning. If you can get past the mild earthy smell, you're going to love this product! I would buy this a million times over.

reviews.title: I liked this brush more than I had expected I would
reviews.text: I liked this brush more than I had expected I would. I mean a brush is a brush right? I like the design of it. It covers more surface area than any other brush I've owned. It feels good in your hand because it's made to fit it. What really surprised me was how much I like the feeling of the bristles on my scalp. Since there are so many bristles and they are small and firm, it feels like a thousands little fingers massaging your scalp. I found that it's easy to keep clean because the bristles are a slippery plastic and the hair slides right out with very little effort. Using this brush actually feels good on your head and I didn't even think that was possible. It's very lightweight and easy to move through your hair. I do like this brush and I'm happy with it. Otherwise, there isn't too much to say, except that it's a great value for the price and what you get. Sure you could buy a more expensive brush, but what more do you really get? All in all, a fully functional brush. What more can I say? I was given this one for my objective evaluation.

reviews.title: Great detangler with a handle for longer hair
reviews.text: Nice black and hot pink color. Many of the detangling brushes are like horse brushes, you have to hold them straight on top. That can get a little unwieldy with long hair. This one is nice because it has a handle. The curved design flows well over the curves of your head. Works best on wet hair, but not too shabby on dry hair either.

reviews.title: I got to say this one is not as good. The Hair Tamer brush does not have as ...
reviews.text:
I own this hair brush and one made buy a different brand. I got to say this one is not as good. The Hair Tamer brush does not have as many bristles as the other one I own. The bristles it does have are also sharp and scratch the scalp. My other brush does not do that. So did the Hair Tamer brush do a good job? Yes, but who wants your scalp scratched? I would not be surprised if it ends up kicking up dandruff since it is scrapping the skin.

I did test this brush out on some of my synthetic hair extensions. If you own hair pieces with synthetic hair you know they are a nightmare to untangle. I found that since this had fewer bristles than my other brush it made brushing out my extensions much easier. So this will probably be my main brush for hair extensions.

This is not a brush I can recommend since it hurts to use it. I don’t like the idea of having a brush sitting around that I only can use on extensions and not on my head. If the manufacture smooths the tips then this would be a five star brush.

*************************************************************************************************************************************************

Pros:

-Ergonomically designed handle
-Works wonderfully on synthetic hair extension
-Light weight
-Fits in the hand well
-Did a great job of detangling

Cons:

-Sharp bristles
-Item description says that it is great for children. I think you will have a very unhappy child if you try to use a sharp bristle brush on them.
-Will probably kick up dandruff since it scratches the scalp

*************************************************************************************************************************************************

I received this item for free for my honest and unbiased review of this hair brush. I never review a product that I have not tried and tested out myself. I rely on product reviews as much as you do when I make my buying decisions, and I hope you found this review helpful.

reviews.title: Multiple uses for cold therapy
reviews.text:
This little tool is going to see many types of use in my home. I suffer from migraines, so cold therapy is my go to for those. In addition to headaches, we also have out share of muscle aches and bumps and bruises. This tool will be great for giving those localized attention without the bulk of an ice pack. We can also control the pressure applied.

The two heads are easily popped on and off. It's nice that you get two, because you can always have a spare in the freezer, and switch them out when needed. This is also going to be a great cool down tool for my husband after doing yardwork. The Texas sun is brutal in the summertime. Applying this to his face and the back of his neck is going to be a real treat. I think that with the multiple uses this provides, it's worth grabbing one.

reviews.title: Roller barely rotates, you'd basically get same effect by keeping some metal spoons in your freezer
reviews.text:
If this device had a motor in the handle that caused the cold head to rotate, there'd be more to talk about here, but frankly this is just two metal discs you can put in your freezer with cheaply made plastic attachment pieces to stick on a small cheap handle. It doesn't rotate on its own, you have to do that for it, and when you try to, the poor connection between the cold metal heads and their plastic bases and the handles doesn't even produce consistent spins the way it's supposed to.

You'd honestly be better served by just keeping two metal spoons in your freezer and using them the same way: put it on your skin and move it in a circular motion. If you find it's slightly too cold, wrap a paper towel square around the spoon head and rubber band it in place. Same effect.

***Overall Value***

This is a pretty blatant cash grab that offers little no nothing for what you're paying. If there was a motor in the handle to rotate the head, that would be one thing, but this is akin to selling a normal toothbrush and asking for 3 times as much many saying it's like an electric toothbrush because you can move it in a circular motion with your wrist and make your own humming sound.

Save your money, go put some spoons in your freezer. Apply to face as needed.

reviews.title: Soothing

reviews.title: Refreshing
reviews.text: This ice roller feels refreshing on my eye area, it the part of my face more affected due to seasonal allergies, so, the cold gives me a soothing an calming effect, it also feels relaxing.

reviews.title: So soothing!
reviews.text:
I got this to use on my face, but the day after it came in the mail, I pulled a ligament in my knee. This face roller was the perfect size and shape to apply cold to my injury! It was very comfortable to use, didn't 'burn' my skin like when I use plain ice or ice packs, and since it is smaller and curved, I could really apply the cold to the area in the crevice of my knee where the pain was.

I did use it on my face the next day, and that was great, too. But I'm still using it for my knee after a long day of standing, and it works wonders!

reviews.title: Alleviated puffiness
reviews.text: Love this ice massager! It’s very lightweight and I like having the two interchangeable heads. I put both of them in the freezer and used one. And if you still need it, you can swap it out for the other from the freezer. Its size allows you to target the under eye area easily. And it stays cold for quite a while. Perfect for those mornings when you need a little extra help to look refreshed.

reviews.title: Helps with puffiness
reviews.text:
This has really helped alot with the puffiness under my eyes I use it 2 or 3 times a day depending on how puffy my eyes look but mainly before bed and in the morning and so fare its helped alot my eyes aren't really that puffy anymore but ill keep using so I can make sure it dont come back I never knew something like this could really work.
Oh and it only takes like 15 minutes in freezer and its cold for like a hour and when you think its not cold anymore just stop and give it a second and then put back on your face you will see its still cold that your face just warmed the outside a bit but this really is amazing how this works.

reviews.title: Facial Ice Roller
reviews.text:
Ice Roller for Face & Eye, Face Roller with A Replaceable Head for Reducing Puffiness, Migraine, Pain Relief & Minor Injury.

Straight out of the box, I was impressed with how cold the head felt without being placed in the cooler. So smooth when gliding along on cheeks and forehead. Once chilled, I was even more impressed. The coldness was a little jarring on my sinuses, but I can definitely see how beneficial it would be to reduce a migraine or headache. Most excellent on under-eye bags. Invigorating and refreshing, a quick wake-me-up.

Love the white and teal color scheme, the handle a nice size to grip to control the movements. I appreciate that this set came with two heads, so quick and easy to change them out and pop back into the cooler.

[[VIDEOID:9afbc03a2aa79005b3f61c7ab46c06a0]] A great cool massager for sure- it comes with an extra head which is convenient. It is well made and it cools quickly - it can be used on face to alleviate puffiness and tighten the skin! It can be used on injuries too.

I also used it on my tired eyes after too much device time and believe me it helped cook my eyes instantly- you can apply cream on face and massage over that too!

I am very happy with this little device!!

Highly recommended!

reviews.title: LOVE
reviews.text: Love this! You would think putting this on your face while cold would be too much but its just right! Love using it on my face! the only thing I dont like is that the attachments sometimes come off while using it. I dont like that but it is still usable and I love it

reviews.title: Soooo much better than an ice pack
reviews.text:
I've had migraines since I was a kid and have never lived anywhere where my freezer didn't have numerous ice packs for migraines to help ease the pain and bring down the temperature.

While I wont be using this to try to drop my body temp which shoots up with a migraine. I will absolutely use this to ease the pain - it feels delightful rubbed across my temple, between my eyes, etc. All of those places where you migraine is felt to the touch.

Genius product.

Love this item! Ive been using the ice stick style that melts… or the glass ball that you freeze… this one is my favorite. So more sturdy & no leaking water down my face. I use this every morning now!

reviews.title: Ice Roller for Face & Eye - Great relief for burning eyes due to allergies.
reviews.text: Anyone who suffers with allergies knows just how red and itchy it makes the eyes, not to mention the pain due to rubbing them raw. This little eye roller is absolutely fantastic for relief. Just pop the heads into the freezer, remove one, attach it to the roller machine thingy and gently glide it over the eyes. Once it warms, pop off, get the cold one out of the freezer, put the warm one in it and repeat as often as needed. It's saved my poor eyes.

reviews.title: Doesn't really roll.
reviews.text: Comes with handle and 2 ice rollers (with plastic for the metal portion of the roller).  The rollers push in or pull out of handle.  The metal part that gets cold is 1.75" and round.  There is nothing to keep the coves on the rollers.  Have to store vertical or back in box that it came in.  To use, just put metal ice rollers into freezer/fridge to make the cold and then put onto handle for use.  These rotate and are really hard to make them roll/rotate.  Most of the time, they kind of slide on your face or forehead.  Think it is a bad design for a "roller".  Can kind of use just for putting cold metal round part on face or eye area so I guess not totally useless.  Only 2 stars and don't recommend.

reviews.title: Cooling is relaxing
reviews.text:
I found that this is a very easy wand to operate. If you put one head in the freezer or fridge, you always have one ready.

It's a nice size and fits my hands well. I have found that around "that time of the month", my eyes are puffier and this seems to help with the inflammation.

I think my only issue with it is it's not a true "roller". It's more of a wand and it doesn't really roll over your face. Otherwise, it feels nice and does seem to help reduce inflammation.

reviews.title: If you want to do your own gel nails
reviews.text: You will need a nail gel lamp to cure the gel. From my experience with different lamps, leave your nails in the curing lamp for the maximum time. This is quite handy and easy to use. Follow all instructions and you should get great results. Hint: when you go to start your  nails, put a coat of Elmer's glue around your skin around the nail and it will keep the gel, base and top coat from sticking to your skin.

reviews.title: Salon Perfect Nails!
reviews.text:
I just wan't ya'll to know.. I have never given myself a gel polish manicure in my LIFE before yesterday. I had been wanting to for the longest time, but I wasn't 100% prepared to make the commitment to purchasing the light and the top coats and the bottom coats and the paint, etc, etc..

Well if you are on the fence, jump it!

First of all, the lamp works. You set your timer and once you do that, all you have to do is put your hand it and it starts automatically. Awesome! Like a real salon. I was able to do my hands in 45 minutes. It would have been even faster but I did a test run on my thumb before doing them all at once to make sure I didn't mess anything up.

Overall, I am SO happy to have this nail curing lamp!

reviews.title: Easy to use
reviews.text: This lamp is super easy to use. After installing the batteries you just turn it on the length of time that you need and you are ready to go. I do dip powder nails, not gel... but everytime I have been to the salon, they have always used a lamp to help cure the top layer faster. This worked exactly the same. Anything that saves me time is a great thing! I would recommend this. the price is great and the product is even better!

It was harmless, and it works with all kinds of nail polish, not just Gel. It is really fast and would be great if you are in a hurry. My daughter approves
